title: 剛到工廠啊偉打電話來聯絡
body:
<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站通話)>>
Wayne Zheng(c): Hi! Jason? Are you at the farm yet?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->I'm here.
    Wayne Zheng(c): Good.
->How did you know?
    Wayne Zheng(c): I thought it's about time.
<<#EndSimple>>
//if沒錄取篩選組但有錄取操作組
<<#If($UpShelfWrongCount<4&&$SelectGroupScore<0)>>
    Wayne Zheng(c): Go to the contract rooms. Justin Wu will be there waiting for you.
    <<#GoTo(@阿緯不解釋幹嘛去簽約室)>>
<<#EndIf>>
Wayne Zheng(c): Come find me in the contract room. The one we had field practice in.
<<@阿緯不解釋幹嘛去簽約室>>
Wayne Zheng(c): Don't forget to put on your uniform!
<<#Simple(8)>>
->What's happening?
->Is it urgent?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Wayne Zheng(c): That's it. See you there.
Thought: He hung up...;<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Thought: What's this about? Time to announce that I failed the interview?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站通話返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 換完衣服司徒來了
body:
//在廁所裡換衣服的時候
<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話)>>
Nin Situ(c): Jason Dai. Do you copy?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Ms. Situ?
    Nin Situ(c): Yes.
->I copy.
    Nin Situ(c): Good.
<<#EndSimple>>
Nin Situ(c): Comms are good.
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Are you done with the job?
    Nin Situ(c): Yes.
    23(c): Yes my ass! There's a whole report to write, and didn't you want to—
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Nin Situ(c): We are back at the safehouse. Lawrence is on his way.
Nin Situ(c): Report your status.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->The Screening lead wants to see me.
->I just changed into my uniform.
    Nin Situ(c): Roger.
<<#EndSimple>>
Nin Situ(c): Today is your big day, isn't it? They're gonna decide whether you should go to Screening or Ops.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yes.
    Nin Situ(c): Roger.
->How did you know?
    Nin Situ(c): Frances told me.
<<#EndSimple>>
Nin Situ(c): Hmm...
Nin Situ(c): Based on the result, we may have to make adjustments to our plan.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Do I need to pick a division over the other?
    Nin Situ(c): No. Both sides have pros and cons.
    Nin Situ(c): And you will remain an employee there after the investigation. Choose whatever you see fit.
->Roger that.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Nin Situ(c): More work coming in. Excuse me for a while.
Nin Situ(c): 23 will remain online for comms support.
23(c): I'll mute myself on restroom breaks. If I don't answer, you know what's happening.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->What about my restroom breaks?
    23(c): Haha! I'll mute you. Chill.
    Thought: Hmm...
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Nin Situ(c): Lawrence will join you over the comms when he arrives.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭返回)>>
Nin Situ(c): Start the job once Lawrence is in position.
Nin Situ(c): Situ out.
<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 簽約室定操作還篩選
body: //先判斷 //俊恩:錄取、不錄取 //$UpShelfWrongCount<4 = 錄取 //$UpShelfWrongCount>3 = 不錄取 //阿偉:主角表現好可以錄取、還可以、不好 //$SelectGroupScore>-1 = 錄取 //$SelectGroupScore<0 = 不錄取 //if阿緯錄取+俊恩錄取 <<#If($UpShelfWrongCount<4&&$SelectGroupScore>-1)>> Thought: The atmosphere in this room is suffocating...;<> Wayne Zheng: I guess you know what we're about to announce.;<>;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm fired? Wayne Zheng: No way! What made you think that!? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->The vibes are kinda...ominous. Wayne Zheng: I see...;<> Wayne Zheng: You're not fired. Rest assured. It's something else.;<> ->I was joking. Wayne Zheng: Joking about your own career? Haha... ->What else could it be? <<#EndSimple>> ->Time to decide my division? Wayne Zheng: Yes.;<> ->I have no idea. <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: We're about to decide which division you should go to, Screening or Ops.;<> Wayne Zheng: Or rather, you are about to decide. Justin Wu: Yes.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: After two hectic days, you have finally finished your field practice.;<> Wayne Zheng: Before anything, though, let us explain the current situation of the farm.;<> Wayne Zheng: First of all, Ms. Yeh will be absent for a while. Because of…reasons.;<> Thought: She's absent for good, I reckon... Thought: I wonder how much they know about what happened to her...? Wayne Zheng: With the manager absent, according to company policies, each division shall manage itself. Justin Wu: The lead of Ops, however, will be absent for a while, too. I am the acting lead.;<> Thought: What happened to the Ops lead? Thought: Ah, right, Mr. Hsu knocked their asshole lead into next week. Wayne Zheng: As a result, Justin and I have the power to decide whether or not to hire you.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: We both decided to hire you, which makes the situation awkward.;<> Wayne Zheng: After negotiation, we agreed that it should be up to you. Wayne Zheng: Think about it. Which division would you like to go?;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Do I have to decide, here and now? Wayne Zheng: I'm afraid so. Unless you prefer Silencio to make the decision. ->I see. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Oh, right, folks at Screening want me to tell you welcome aboard. Justin Wu: ...I thought we agreed not to play the friends card?;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: I'm just passing a message for my colleagues.;<> Justin Wu: Good. I have a bit to add, myself. Justin Wu: Our paycheck is about twice as much as what you get at Screening.;<> Wayne Zheng: Not the salary card, man... Justin Wu: He has the right to know.;<> Wayne Zheng: I don't think judging a job solely by its salary is a good idea. A positive, friendly atmosphere is a big plus.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Working constantly under pressure and risk is not good for your mental health. Justin Wu: Says the division that caused that risk...;<> Wayne Zheng: Huh? What are you blaming us for?;<> <<#Simple(3)>> ->Calm down, you guys. Justin Wu: I am calm. Wayne Zheng: Calm my ass! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Screening is at the forefront of our business. We try hard to broker deals with contributors!;<> Justin Wu: You call that the forefront?;<>;<> Justin Wu: What about us then? Who rack juicers up? Who take the fall when shit happens? Wayne Zheng: Shit wouldn't happen if only you listened to us!;<>;<> Justin Wu: Who are you to talk about listening?;<>;<> Justin Wu: We said a million times. We can't adjust generation power case by case! Justin Wu: What did you do? You kept sending unqualified juicers down!;<> Justin Wu: How could you ask us to listen when you don't listen? Wayne Zheng: We listen to reason, not command without real explanation.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: We tried to explain things to you, to find a middle ground... Wayne Zheng: Every time we ask questions, you slap a stack of tech documents in our face.;<> Justin Wu: We don't have the time to read it to you. Can't you just trust professional judgments?;<> Wayne Zheng: I can't, if "professional" means snobby attitude. Justin Wu: Damn...;<>;<> Justin Wu: Whatever you say. Jason worked with us. Justin Wu: He knows what it's like at Ops. Wayne Zheng: And he knows better than you do how hard we have been trying.;<>;<> Justin Wu: Let him make the decision.;<> Wayne Zheng: That was the plan in the first place.;<> Justin Wu: Which side do you choose, Jason?;<> Thought: Heck, they're both grilling me with burning stares... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->May I ask questions? Wayne Zheng: Ask away. Justin Wu: Hold on.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: What?;<> Justin Wu: Let's make this clear. When one of us is answering his questions, the other must shut the hell up. Wayne Zheng: Agreed. What are your questions?;<>;<>;<> <<@問兩邊一些問題來決定去哪組>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Does Screening really pay less? ($SelectGroupPoorSalaryTrue) <> <> Wayne Zheng: Yes, although...;<> Wayne Zheng: It's just the base salary. We have bonuses to somewhat level the playing field. Justin Wu: Tsk.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: What?;<> Justin Wu: I said nothing. "Tsk" is not a word. Wayne Zheng: Whatever it is, say it already. I'm not like you. I listen.;<>;<> Justin Wu: Don't you get it?;<> Justin Wu: They get bonuses for signing more people. That's why we have so many unqualified juicers down there.;<> Wayne Zheng: I told you. We don't have incentives for that...;<>;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->I believe Wayne and Screening are only trying to help more people. Wayne Zheng: See? Thought: Justin doesn't want to respond... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Anything else you'd like to ask?;<>;<>;<> <<#GoTo(@問兩邊一些問題來決定去哪組)>> ->Is Ops really working towards farm closure? ($ControlGroupShutDownFabTrue) <> <> Justin Wu: We are.;<>;<> Justin Wu: ... Thought: But looks like he doesn't want to offer any explanation...?;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Won't I lose my job? Justin Wu: You will, but not in the immediate future. Justin Wu: Even if the board decides to shut down Silencio right now, it takes 5 to 8 years to close the deal. Justin Wu: You have plenty of time to learn skills that will easily get you a job in other Vision farms. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#GoTo(@問兩邊一些問題來決定去哪組)>> ->I'm done with questions. ($FinishAskSAndCQuestion);//選過起碼一題後出現 Wayne Zheng: Which side do you choose? Thought: Gah, that grill-you-with-stare treatment again... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Ops. <<#GoTo(@玩家確定選操作組)>> ->Screening. <<#GoTo(@玩家確定選篩選組)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Ops.;<> <<@玩家確定選操作組>> Justin Wu: I see. Wayne Zheng: Are you sure? After you've seen how terrible things are?;<>;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm sure. Wayne Zheng: Okay. ->All the more reason for me to change it. Wayne Zheng: Um... ->Well, they pay better. Wayne Zheng: But... Wayne Zheng: Okay, it's a legit reason. <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: As long as you've thought it over.;<> Wayne Zheng: That's it, then. I'll leave the rest to Justin. Wayne Zheng: And, there's something you should know.;<> Wayne Zheng: I've decided to make some changes while I have the power? Justin Wu: What changes? Wayne Zheng: From today on, the Screening office is permanently open house. People from Logistics and Ops could come any time. No paperwork needed.;<> Justin Wu: You don't have this power. Even Ms. Yeh doesn't. It's up to HQ—;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: That is not true. Wayne Zheng: I spent years lobbying for more transparency. HQ gave us the green light long ago.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Only Ms. Yeh didn't allow it, saying some directors of the board might be unhappy. I don't care about them. Justin Wu: You...;<> Wayne Zheng: Justin, I'm doing what we always wanted to do, facilitating communication across divisions. Wayne Zheng: I never gave up trying. You?;<> Justin Wu: ...;<> Wayne Zheng: When I say welcome aboard, I mean it, Jason.;<> Wayne Zheng: The fact that you're joining Ops doesn't change a thing. You're still a friend. Come visit us. Wayne Zheng: See you guys around.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Bye. // ->Thank you, Wayne. Wayne Zheng: Hey, I'm doing this for the greater good, not just you. Haha!;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> //鄭緯離開簽約室 <> Justin Wu: First of all, welcome aboard.;<>;<> Justin Wu: But we're not sure when you can start yet. Thought: I guess he won't explain why if I don't ask... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why's that? Justin Wu: Ms. Yeh's suspected espionage threw everything off track. Justin Wu: HQ told us to suspend certain operations before the investigation is closed. Justin Wu: Hiring is one of them. <<#Simple(6)>> ->I see. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: You're not surprised? About Ms. Yeh? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I always thought she's fishy. Justin Wu: Really? Then you're much better at reading people than I am... ->I was sort of involved, so... Justin Wu: Huh? What? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Never mind. Justin Wu: It's OK. I won't force you. ->She asked me to cover up for her. Justin Wu: She must be pretty desperate... <<#EndSimple>> ->I thought it's common in big corporations? Justin Wu: Huh. No, not as common as you may think. <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: I still have trouble facing that fact...;<> Justin Wu: And Wayne just said she was against cross-division transparency... Thought: He looks confused. And a bit angry, too...? Justin Wu: *Sigh* Justin Wu: She must have her reasons, I guess.;<> ->I understand. Justin Wu: Good. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: We may restore operations next Monday. Your new job starts by then.;<> Justin Wu: Before that, feel free to walk around the farm. I advise you to do so. Justin Wu: Get to know what's what. Maybe help people with errands, too.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Sounds good. ->Errands, like? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: Oh, wait, no...;<> Justin Wu: The entire Cellar is now under maintenance. There's no one at the Ops office. Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: Anyway, you have the security clearance to walk around, but the job won't start until next week.;<> Justin Wu: Maybe you can spend some time with Screening, too. Thought: He really hates the mere idea of Screening. <<#Simple(8)>> ->It's a shame, you and Wayne. Justin Wu: Yeah...;<> Justin Wu: He used to trust me unconditionally. These days whatever I say, he just asks for evidence. Justin Wu: Asking for evidence is not the worst. It's that—;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->It's that he stopped trusting you. Justin Wu: Exactly. Justin Wu: You're awfully perceptive. //if之前俊恩等電梯有猜到鄭緯心情 <<#If($GuessAWeiReactionAtTheTime=true)>> Justin Wu: You read Wayne correctly last night, too. <<#EndIf>> ->It's that he couldn't adapt and learn. Justin Wu: No, I think he could. It's just that... Justin Wu: He simply needs me to convince him. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: I just don't know what he's thinking... ->He just refuses to listen, right? I mean Wayne. Justin Wu: Yeah... Justin Wu: Won't listen, no matter what. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: OK, I'm running out of time.;<> Justin Wu: I'll get in touch with you next week. Again, welcome aboard! Justin Wu: Sorry to put you under so much stress.;<> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: See you next week. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //吳郡恩離開辦公室 <> Thought: Ops, huh... <> <<#End>> ->Screening.;<> <<@玩家確定選篩選組>> Wayne Zheng: Yes! Justin Wu: That is a good decision.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Sorry, Justin. Justin Wu: Nothing to be sorry for. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: I said I'm with you, whatever you decide.;<> Justin Wu: I know that Ops is a terrible place. Sparing you of it is actually a relief. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why? Justin Wu: Knowingly leading someone to a terrible place? I'd feel guilty about it. Wayne Zheng: ... ->Good to know. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: That's it.;<> Justin Wu: See you guys around. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //俊恩離開簽約室 <> Wayne Zheng: You made a wise decision, Jason.;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I think so, too. Wayne Zheng: Great! ->Probably. Wayne Zheng: It is! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: And one more thing that you should know.;<> Wayne Zheng: We're not sure when you can start yet. Thought: ...What?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why's that? Wayne Zheng: Ms. Yeh's suspected espionage threw everything off track.;<> Wayne Zheng: HQ told us to suspend certain operations before the investigation is closed. Wayne Zheng: Hiring is one of them.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->I see. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: ... //if有跟阿緯猜過阿姨竊取機密(有說只是猜可能是這樣，也可能選直接說阿宜有找自己幫忙) <<#If($ToldAWeiYehAskMCForHelp=1)>> Wayne Zheng: Say, you guessed it right yesterday? <<#Simple(8)>> ->Guessed what right? Wayne Zheng: What you told me before I asked you to the roof. Wayne Zheng: You said Ms. Yeh was probably suspected of stealing confidential documents. Thought: Right. I did say that. ->Yes. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //if有跟阿緯猜過阿姨竊取機密(有說只是猜可能是這樣，也可能選直接說阿宜有找自己幫忙) <<#If($ToldAWeiYehAskMCForHelp=2)>> Wayne Zheng: Say, what you said yesterday turns out to be true. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What do you mean? Wayne Zheng: What you told me before I asked you to the roof. Wayne Zheng: You said she asked for your help to cover up. Thought: Right. I did say that. Wayne Zheng: Well, I didn't quite believe you back then... ->Yes. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: I still have trouble facing that fact...;<> Thought: He look quite disheartened... Wayne Zheng: *Sigh* Wayne Zheng: I don't believe she did what she did for personal gain. There must be a better reason... Wayne Zheng: Hey, let's put that aside! Now, about your new job.;<> ->I understand. Wayne Zheng: Good. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: We may restore operations next Monday. Your new job starts by then. Wayne Zheng: Before that, feel free to walk around the farm. I advise you to do so. Wayne Zheng: Get to know what's what. Maybe help people with errands, too. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Sounds good. Wayne Zheng: Ha, you agreed! Don't complain when I dump work on you.;<> Thought: Ugh... Wayne Zheng: No, I was just kidding! Hahaha!;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Ah, two more things! Wayne Zheng: Sorry, this is taking longer than I intended. Wayne Zheng: First, the Cellar is still under maintenance, due to yesterday's incident.;<> Thought: Yesterday's malfunctioning is that bad...? Wayne Zheng: Second, I've decided to make the Screening office permanently open house!;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Open house? Wayne Zheng: Right!;<> ->That sounds like...a good thing? Wayne Zheng: Hopefully!;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: From today on, the Screening office is permanently open house. People from Logistics and Ops could come any time. No paperwork needed. I don't care about them.;<> Wayne Zheng: I always wanted to establish proper communication and cooperation between divisions. Wayne Zheng: Now is the time!;<> Wayne Zheng: That's all the news I have today. We should get going.;<> Wayne Zheng: I'll get in touch with you next week. Again, welcome aboard! Wayne Zheng: And sorry to put you under so much stress. <<#Simple(10)>> ->It's not a big deal. Wayne Zheng: I knew you'd take it like a man.;<> ->As long as I do get the job. Wayne Zheng: I like your attitude!;<> ->*Sigh* Wayne Zheng: Look forward. The tough days are now over.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: That wraps it up. I'm running out of time. Wayne Zheng: Someone needs to use this contract room.;<> Wayne Zheng: Bye. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //鄭緯離開辦公室，在小峰泰銘面前停下 <>;<> <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> //if阿緯不錄取+俊恩錄取 <<#If($UpShelfWrongCount<4&&$SelectGroupScore<0)>> Justin Wu: I'm about to announce the result of your field practice. Thought: I knew it.;<> Justin Wu: Before anything, though, let me explain the current situation of the farm.;<> Justin Wu: First of all, Ms. Yeh will be absent for a while. Because of…reasons. Thought: She's absent for good, I reckon...;<>;<> Thought: I wonder how much he knows about what happened to her...? Justin Wu: With the manager absent, according to company policies, each division shall manage itself.;<> Justin Wu: The lead of Ops, however, will be absent for a while, too. I am the acting lead. Thought: He's absent, too? Thought: Ah, right, Mr. Hsu knocked their asshole lead into next week.;<> Justin Wu: As a result, Wayne and I have the power to decide whether or not to hire you.;<> Justin Wu: Unfortunately, Wayne has decided to not hire you.;<> Thought: I knew it. //if阿姨不爽 <<#If($InterviewHandleBadCount>1)>> Thought: Ms. Yeh was mad at me. <<#EndIf>> Thought: Wayne didn't like me much better, either... Justin Wu: However, I have decided to hire you.;<> Justin Wu: That's the reason why I'm here. Justin Wu: Welcome to Ops, Jason.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Great! Thank you! Justin Wu: Don't thank me. You deserve it. ->I understand. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: One last thing. We're not sure when you can start yet. Thought: I guess he won't explain why if I don't ask... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why's that? Justin Wu: Ms. Yeh's suspected espionage threw everything off track.;<> Justin Wu: HQ told us to suspend certain operations before the investigation is closed. Justin Wu: Hiring is one of them.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->I see. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: You're not surprised? About Ms. Yeh?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I always thought she's fishy. Justin Wu: Really? Then you're much better at reading people than I am... ->I was sort of involved, so... Justin Wu: Huh? What? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Never mind. Justin Wu: It's OK. I won't force you. ->She asked me to cover up for her. Justin Wu: She must be pretty desperate... <<#EndSimple>> ->I thought it's common in big corporations? Justin Wu: Huh. No, not as common as you may think. <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: I still have trouble facing that fact...;<> Justin Wu: And Wayne just said she was against cross-division transparency...;<> Thought: He looks confused. And a bit angry, too...? Justin Wu: *Sigh* Justin Wu: She must have her reasons, I guess.;<> ->I understand. Justin Wu: Good. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: We may restore operations next Monday. Your new job starts by then.;<> Justin Wu: Before that, feel free to walk around the farm. I advise you to do so. Justin Wu: Get to know what's what. Maybe help people with errands, too.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Sounds good. ->Errands, like? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: Oh, wait, no...;<> Justin Wu: The entire Cellar is now under maintenance. There's no one at the Ops office. Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: Anyway, you have the security clearance to walk around, but the job won't start until next week.;<> Justin Wu: Maybe you can spend some time with Screening, too. Thought: He really hates the mere idea of Screening. <<#Simple(8)>> ->It's a shame, you and Wayne. Justin Wu: Yeah...;<> Justin Wu: He used to trust me unconditionally. These days whatever I say, he just asks for evidence. Justin Wu: Asking for evidence is not the worst. It's that—;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->It's that he stopped trusting you. Justin Wu: Exactly.;<> Justin Wu: You're awfully perceptive. //if之前俊恩等電梯有猜到鄭緯心情 <<#If($GuessAWeiReactionAtTheTime=true)>> Justin Wu: You read Wayne correctly last night, too. <<#EndIf>> ->It's that he couldn't adapt and learn. Justin Wu: No, I think he could. It's just that... Justin Wu: He simply needs me to convince him. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: I just don't know what he's thinking... ->He just refuses to listen, right? I mean Wayne. Justin Wu: Yeah... Justin Wu: Won't listen, no matter what. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: OK, I'm running out of time.;<> Justin Wu: I'll get in touch with you next week. Again, welcome aboard! Justin Wu: Sorry to put you under so much stress. Justin Wu: ...;<> Justin Wu: See you next week. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //吳郡恩離開辦公室 <> Thought: Ops, huh...;<> <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> //if阿緯不錄取+俊恩不錄取 <<#If($UpShelfWrongCount>3&&$SelectGroupScore<0)>> Wayne Zheng: I guess you know what we're about to announce. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm fired? Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: Yes.;<> <<@呀阿緯告知主角一組都沒進>> Thought: Damn...;<> Thought: Wait. That means I don't have a reason to be here anymore. What about the investigation? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Should I show myself out? ->This is it? I don't have second chances? Wayne Zheng: ...;<> ->... <> <<#EndSimple>> ->Time to decide my division? Wayne Zheng: I'm afraid not. Wayne Zheng: You are not hired by either of us. <<#GoTo(@呀阿緯告知主角一組都沒進)>> ->I have no idea. Wayne Zheng: I'm very sorry to tell you that... Wayne Zheng: You are not hired by either of us. <<#GoTo(@呀阿緯告知主角一組都沒進)>> <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Let me explain the situation of the farm first.;<> Wayne Zheng: First of all, Ms. Yeh will be absent for a while. Because of…reasons. Thought: She's absent for good, I reckon...;<> Thought: I wonder how much he knows about what happened to her...? Wayne Zheng: With the manager absent, according to company policies, each division shall manage itself.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: The lead of Ops, however, will be absent for a while, too. Justin is the acting lead. Thought: He's absent, too?;<>;<> Thought: Ah, right, Mr. Hsu knocked their asshole lead into next week. Wayne Zheng: This is the reason why I'm talking to you, instead of Ms. Yeh.;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You and Justin both decided to not hire me. Wayne Zheng: ...Correct. ->Why bother, if I'm fired? Wayne Zheng: I'm getting to that. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Like I said, Silencio is currently under the joined leadership of Justin and I. We have more power than usual.;<> Wayne Zheng: The decision to not hire you is largely due to Ms. Yeh's opinion. Wayne Zheng: I, personally, don't think you're a good fit, either. However... Wayne Zheng: With my temporary power, I decide to hire you.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why? ->Great! Thank you! Wayne Zheng: Let me finish. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: I want to change the corporate culture here. Ms. Yeh used to judge Screening candidates by their moral standard.;<> Wayne Zheng: I do agree with the general principle, but not her specific approach. Wayne Zheng: I believe Silencio, as it is, needs cross-division communication more than moral standard.;<> Wayne Zheng: A large part of our problems boil down to the lack of transparency. We waste too much resource on infighting.;<> Thought: This is not the usual Mr.-nice-guy Wayne. Thought: He's a proper leader now. Wayne Zheng: To solve this issue, the simplest way is to break down the walls between divisions. Wayne Zheng: For example, I'm making the Screening office permanently open house from today on.;<> Wayne Zheng: Members of Ops, either for business or otherwise, are always welcome. Wayne Zheng: And from today on, we need people who have experience in both Screening and Ops. Wayne Zheng: This is the reason why I'm deciding to hire you. Wayne Zheng: There's a probation period, of course.;<> Wayne Zheng: There is still a chance that you may be fired at the end of it. Wayne Zheng: What do you think?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm happy enough to have a job. Wayne Zheng: Great!;<> ->I need some time to process this. Wayne Zheng: Take your time.;<> ->I'll try my best. Wayne Zheng: Great!;<> <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: We have no idea when you can start, though. Ms. Yeh threw the entire farm off track. Wayne Zheng: HQ wants us to suspend hiring for the time being, in case the situation gets more complicated.;<> Wayne Zheng: We may restore operations next Monday. Your new job starts by then. Wayne Zheng: Before that, feel free to walk around the farm. I advise you to do so.;<> Wayne Zheng: Get to know what's what. Maybe help people with errands, too. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Sounds good. Wayne Zheng: Ha, you agreed! Don't complain when I dump work on you.;<> Thought: Ugh...;<> Wayne Zheng: No, I was just kidding! Hahaha...;<> Thought: Back to his usual self, huh.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Oh, and one last thing. Wayne Zheng: The Cellar is still under maintenance, due to yesterday's incident.;<> Thought: Yesterday's malfunctioning is that bad...?;<> Wayne Zheng: That wraps it up. I'm running out of time.;<> Wayne Zheng: You may stay here a bit longer if you want to, but not for too long.;<> Wayne Zheng: Someone needs to use this contract room. Wayne Zheng: Bye. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //鄭緯離開辦公室，在小峰泰銘面前停下 <>;<> <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>>

title: 阿姨辦公室門前進不去
body: //靠近阿姨辦公室觸發 <<#If($GoYehOfficeFirst=0)>> Thought: She's not here anymore. <<#EndIf>> //阿姨辦公室門口鎖住了，玩家調查後得知這點。 //如果玩家先去阿姨辦公室門口會看到調查人員站在門前 Thought: The IIB locked the door after their investigation... 23(c): What's up? Door locked?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. It's locked tight. 23(c): Figured. ->How did you know? 23(c): Well, because they must know what they're doing? <<#EndSimple>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why didn't you tell me, then? 23(c): I was counting on the slim chance that you may hit the jackpot. Lawrence Chang(c): Typical 23. 23(c): Shut up, boy. ->Is there any way to open it? 23(c): There is, but you won't like it. ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): I suggest cutting off the power.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->That will attract a lot of unwanted attention. 23(c): What attention? It's a total blackout! 23(c): No one's gonna see you. Relax. ->I may as well kick the door in. 23(c): It's a steel door, dude. ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Listen. Follow the wiring. Locate the breaker box on your floor.;<> 23(c): Turn the master switch off. That will get you a total blackout. 23(c): Then the magnetic lock disengages! 23(c): I have the floor plan here. The breaker box should be in the break room. //電梯也會不能運作，辦公室會開進去要有一些小對話 <<#Simple(8)>> ->How do I turn it off? 23(c): You will know when you see it. Self-explanatory. Trust me. ->Can't you use some of your hacker mojo? 23(c): What happened to your morning briefing? 23(c): I can't hack anything unless you have the beacon up and running. 23(c): Capeesh? ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Hey. 23(c): If you seriously don't like my idea, think of something yourself. 23(c): You've been there for two days. Use your field knowledge! <> Thought: Ways to open the door without attracting attention...?;<> <<#End>>

<<#EndSimple>>

<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 到茶水間
body: //進到茶水間發現葉慈恩在泡茶 Edith Yeh: Oh hi, Jason!;<> <>;//確認有在茶水間葉慈恩碰上 //IF操作組 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> Edith Yeh: I heard you chose Ops in the end? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. Edith Yeh: Wow...;<> Edith Yeh: I'm surprised. <> ->Who told you? Edith Yeh: Wayne. Who else? <<#EndSimple>> Edith Yeh: We are adults. So I won't judge your choice.;<> Thought: This comment is already judging... <<#EndIf>> //IF篩選組 <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>> Edith Yeh: I heard about it. Welcome aboard!;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Thank you. Edith Yeh: You're welcome. ->But I heard the salary here is kinda low. Edith Yeh: You heard it right, haha... Edith Yeh: But we have nice office vibes! Thought: Exactly like what Wayne said. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Edith Yeh: So, what are you doing here? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Mr. Liao asked me to make him some tea.;//之後裝轉送器或是停電進去慈恩會提。;//鋪陳廖哥喜歡叫人幫忙泡茶，要去茶水間按一個機器。 Edith Yeh: Eh? He just asked me for tea. Thought: Shit... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Maybe he forgot? Edith Yeh: ...Huh? ->Maybe he thought you may forget. Edith Yeh: I feel hurt. Everyone knows I never forget things. <<#EndSimple>> Edith Yeh: Anyhow, his tea is made. I'll bring it over.;<> //慈恩離開 <> Thought: Phew, that was close... ->I'm not here. You didn't see me. Edith Yeh: You're not here?;<> Thought: What the hell am I talking about... Edith Yeh: Is that a joke? You're weird. Haha.;<> Edith Yeh: See you around. <> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //葉慈恩離開 <> ->Um, what happened to that guy? The one I knocked out. Edith Yeh: You're asking about him? That's awfully nice! Edith Yeh: I don't have any good news to share, though. I heard...;<> Edith Yeh: Death sentence, most likely.;<> Edith Yeh: This is unfair. He's a victim, too... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->The one killed by him is the real victim. Edith Yeh: And I thought you'd have a bigger heart than them.;<> Edith Yeh: Turns out you're the same, after all. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Wait. That came out wrong. I didn't mean that. Edith Yeh: Good!;<> ->I just meant the deceased deserve the most sympathy. Edith Yeh: What about those forced to kill?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I didn't mean that. Edith Yeh: But it sounds to me like you mean it.;<> ->Alright. They deserve as much sympathy, too. Edith Yeh: I'm glad you understand.;<> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Edith Yeh: I should go now. Edith Yeh: Bye. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //葉慈恩離開 <> Thought: Talking to her is like treading on thin ice... <<#GoTo(@跟葉慈恩茶水間喇類結束)>> ->Yeah. There's something fundamentally wrong with this world. Edith Yeh: Right!;<> Edith Yeh: We must try to make it a better place! <<@迴避詞恩問體趕快關掉電>> Edith Yeh: Ah, I should go now.;<> Edith Yeh: Nice talking to you. See you later.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //葉慈恩離開 <> Thought: Talking to her is like treading on thin ice... <<#GoTo(@跟葉慈恩茶水間喇類結束)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@迴避詞恩問體趕快關掉電)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<@跟葉慈恩茶水間喇類結束>> 23(c): I don't like this woman.;<> Lawrence Chang(c): Eh? Why? Edith is awfully nice. 23(c): You will know when you grow up. 23(c): Go cut the power, Jason. 23(c): If you're really, really sure about it. Thought: I was really, really sure, until you asked that way...;<>;<> <<#End>> //成功切斷電源

title: 阿姨辦公室出來
body:
//if走球球路線
<<#If($BallHelpOpenDoor=0)>>
    <<#GoTo(@跳過23聽到電恢復聲音)>>
<<#EndIf>>


23(c): What's that sound? Power is back on?
<<@跳過23聽到電恢復聲音>>
23(c): Did you get it?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yeah, I have it.
    23(c): Well done!
->Guess.
    //剛剛選過
    <<#If($YouGuessResult23=true)>>
        Lawrence Chang(c): That means yes!
        23(c): Good guess.
    <<#EndIf>>
    //沒選過。
    <<#If($YouGuessResult23=false)>>
        Lawrence Chang(c): You blew it!?
        23(c): Relax. He wouldn't ask you to guess if he blew it.
    <<#EndIf>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang(c): Now what? Attach the beacon to Wayne's computer?
23(c): Yes. Easy peasy. Just don't get caught.
<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#End>>

Edith Yeh: Some colleagues are summoned to HQ for questioning. I was asking Jeff to cover for them.;<> Edith Yeh: He's not responding to my message, though. title: 去鄭緯電腦裝轉送器
body: //主角蹲下靠近主機，攝影機拉近拍不到旁邊，但會看到慈恩走過來 Thought: Man, installing this thing is so much harder than pulling it out... Thought: Now, here you go. //if沒有支開慈恩 <<#If($LieToYehTsuFongNotThere=false)>> //慈恩走過來 <> Edith Yeh: Jason?;<> Edith Yeh: What are you doing? <> Thought: Crap, I'm caught... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I dropped something. ->My shoelaces are loose. <<#EndSimple>> Edith Yeh: I mean, what are you doing in Wayne's cubicle?;<> Lawrence Chang(c): Aaaaahhhh he's caught! Alert! Alert!;<> 23(c): Shut the heck up and calm the heck down! <<#Simple(3)>> ->Shut up, you both! Edith Yeh: We...both? Thought: What the hell am I doing... 23(c): Hey, don't talk to us! ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> Edith Yeh: I'm asking you a question, Jason?;<> <> <<@慈恩質問幹嘛在阿緯座位>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Huh? Why ask? ($DLStateFloat) <> Edith Yeh: Because you look suspicious?;<> Edith Yeh: Appearing in Wayne's cubicle and acting shady. Thought: She won't let go me of so easily...;<> Edith Yeh: So...? <<#GoTo(@慈恩質問幹嘛在阿緯座位)>> ->I'm checking out Wayne's pictures here.;//會問上面的細節 Edith Yeh: Ah!;<> Edith Yeh: Which one? Thought: She seems somehow...expectant? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->The one of all you guys at a dinner party. Edith Yeh: That one, huh...;<> Thought: She's a bit disappointed...? Edith Yeh: That was taken at an end of the year party. Edith Yeh: I thought you were looking at the award one. <<#GoTo(@領獎照片慈恩開心)>> ->This one here. Some sort of...award ceremony? Edith Yeh: Ha, that one!;<> <<@領獎照片慈恩開心>> Edith Yeh: That's from last year. We won the bronze trophy for outstanding performance!;<> Edith Yeh: Everyone was sooo happy. Our hard work was appreciated! Edith Yeh: Especially when we were giving so much to our contributors.;<> Thought: She's heartfelt proud of it.;<> Edith Yeh: Ah, sorry I'm rambling. Edith Yeh: Take your time! There are some good memories there.;<> Edith Yeh: I'm going back to work, then.;<>;<> 23(c): Niiice. Lawrence Chang(c): Well done, Jason! ->Wayne's selfie. Edith Yeh: Selfie? I don't think he has a selfie there?;<> Edith Yeh: Who puts selfies on their desks? That's like, ego trophies.;<> Edith Yeh: ... Edith Yeh: You're not trying to delete files from his computer, are you?;<> Thought: Huh? Edith Yeh: Don't bother to pretend. You can be honest with me. It happens. Edith Yeh: Sometimes we are caught by Silencio for breaking rules. The system sends notices to Wayne.;<> Edith Yeh: Some of us would try to delete these notices before Wayne could see them. Thought: Well, I didn't know that...;<> Edith Yeh: These notices are kept in the cloud, mind you. Deleting local copies is useless.;<> //if茶水間 <<#If($PantryYenTsuMeet=true)>> Edith Yeh: Heeey, the breaker box, don't tell me it's really you? <<#Simple(6)>> ->It's not me. Swear. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Edith Yeh: Anyhow, Wayne will find out eventually.;<> Edith Yeh: Don't worry if it's really not you. <<#EndIf>> //if沒有茶水間 <<#If($PantryYenTsuMeet=false)>> Edith Yeh: I don't know what you're trying to do, and I won't ask, Jason.;<> Edith Yeh: If it's something not important, Wayne will find out. <<#EndIf>> Edith Yeh: Don't let me catch you next time.;<> Edith Yeh: *Sigh* Edith Yeh: Okay. Get going before someone else catches you.;<> <> Lawrence Chang(c): Man, you're in a ton of trouble.;<> //if操作 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> 23(c): Doesn't matter. He belongs to Ops now. <<#EndIf>> //if茶水間 <<#If($PantryYenTsuMeet=true)>> Thought: The priority now is the break room surveillance... <<#Simple(6)>> ->The surveillance footage, 23. 23(c): Wiped clean, just like that. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <> <<#EndSimple>> ->Wayne asked me to fetch some files. //if操作組 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> Edith Yeh: But you work for Ops now. Why would Wayne ask you? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Hey, Screening, Ops, we're the same big family. ->What's wrong with helping a buddy out? <<@慈恩反對啊緯隨便讓人進辦公室>> Edith Yeh: Wayne's problem is that he's too busy trying to be nice. Edith Yeh: There are rules and procedures. Confidentiality! He can't ignore them like that.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Sorry, my oversight. Edith Yeh: It's not your fault. ->But he has decided to make this office permanently open house, no? Edith Yeh: ...He told you? Edith Yeh: I don't think it's a good idea, but he went forward with it anyway... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Edith Yeh: ...;<> Edith Yeh: You do what Wayne asked you to. I'll talk to him later.;<> //葉慈恩走掉 <> 23(c): She wants to be the boss but doesn't want to admit it.;<> Lawrence Chang(c): Edith isn't the ambitious type. I guess they just have disagreement on this specific issue? 23(c): No. Normally she should feel her opinion is unappreciated, or ignored. 23(c): But the way she put it, she thinks Wayne is wrong. In other words, she believes she should be the one giving orders. Lawrence Chang(c): Aren't you reading too much out of a short conversation? 23(c): She's like an empress dowager, getting mad when the young emperor starts to make his own decisions.;<> ->What's your problem? Edith Yeh: ... Thought: I'm too mean... Edith Yeh: *Sigh* <<#GoTo(@慈恩反對啊緯隨便讓人進辦公室)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //if篩選組 <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>> Edith Yeh: But... Edith Yeh: Alright. You're one of us now. It makes sense.;<> <> 23(c): Niiice. Lawrence Chang(c): Well done, Jason! <<#If($BallHelpOpenDoor<0)>> 23(c): Hey, I've deleted the breaker room surveillance footage. Relax. <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //if 有支開 <<#If($LieToYehTsuFongNotThere=true)>> <<#Simple(6)>> ->The beacon is on, 23. 23(c): Great! ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> 23(c): Yeah, establishing connection... 23(c): Let me see... Surveillance... Access control... Rating system...;<> 23(c): Ah, feels great to be in control again. Lawrence Chang(c): Control freak. 23(c): Don't stand there, Jason. You're attracting attention. 23(c): Go back to your seat. //if操作 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> Lawrence Chang(c): Jason works for Ops now. Is that still his seat? 23(c): Didn't they say something about open house, blah blah? 23(c): Feel free to take a seat! <<#EndIf>> 23(c): Quick. We need to discuss next steps. <> Thought: Bossy...;<> <<#End>>

title: 張三李四_自動
body:

Nobo Dee: Holy mother of...
Soma Wan: *Huff* *Huff*
Nobo Dee: Rose moves this shit by herself?
Soma Wan: I don't freaking care. The question is, where the heck is she?
Nobo Dee: Most likely at screening. She likes to go there every once in a while.

<<#If($ConvinceHeShinYeeWeiLove=0)>>

    Cynthia Ho: *Sigh*;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_走廊正坐右看低頭)>>

    Cynthia Ho: ...
    Rose Sun: Right?
    Cynthia Ho: Hmm...;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_走廊正坐右看低頭返回)>>

    <<Set($DLState,孫茹何歆翊自動對話結束)>>
    <<#End>>
<<#EndIf>>

Rose Sun: *Sigh*

Cynthia Ho: Impossible. Widespread malfunctioning like this, caused by one person's negligence?;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_走廊正坐右看低頭)>>
Rose Sun: I didn't say it's one person.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_走廊正坐左看抬手返回)>>
Rose Sun: There could be multiple of them, years of negligence.
Cynthia Ho: In that case, everything can be chalked up to staff negligence.;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_走廊正坐右看低頭返回)>>
<<Set($DLState,孫茹何歆翊自動對話結束)>>
<<#End>>

title: 遇到小峰跟泰銘
body:
//一出簽約室小峰跟泰銘在外面剛好碰上主角，如果是篩選路線阿緯ˇ還會在


Tyler Cao: Hey, Jason!
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Hello.
    Jeff Wu: Come on! Don't be so formal.
->Hi!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Jeff Wu: I didn't see you yesterday!;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站細看)>>
Tyler Cao: He was at Ops for field practice.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站看內)>>
Jeff Wu: Oooh, right!;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站細看返回)>>

//if操作
<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
    Jeff Wu: That reminds me. I saw Justin Wu just now.;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站抓頭)>>
    Tyler Cao: Yeah, coming out of a contract room.
    Jeff Wu: Wayne said you will be assigned today. Then you and Justin came out of the same room...
    Tyler Cao: Don't tell me you've chosen Ops, Jason?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站看內返回)>>;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站抓頭返回)>>
    Thought: I've never seen Tyler so surprised before...
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Yeah.
        Tyler Cao: Ugh...;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰)>>
        Jeff Wu: Wow.;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭)>>
    ->Sorry, but I think Ops is a better fit.
        Tyler Cao: Don't apologize. Your career, your choice.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰)>>
        Jeff Wu: Right. We're just...
        Tyler Cao: Surprised. Yeah. Surprised.
        Jeff Wu: I see.;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭)>>
    ->I flunked the field practice for Screening. ($SelectGroupScore);//if篩選組沒有錄取才會出現這個選項，$SelectGroupScore<0 = 不錄取
        Jeff Wu: Seriously?
        Tyler Cao: No can do, then...;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰)>>;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Jeff Wu: It's a shame.
    Jeff Wu: QQ will be sad.;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭返回)>>
    Tyler Cao: Sad, or mad?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰看內)>>
    Jeff Wu: Haha, right, he could totally be mad.;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Mad at me?
        Tyler Cao: No, not you.;<<PlayUntil(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰看內返回)>>
        <<#GoTo(@球球會不爽操作組搶走主角嗎？)>>
    ->Then what for?
        <<PlayUntil(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰看內返回)>>
        <<@球球會不爽操作組搶走主角嗎？>>
        Tyler Cao: He'll probably blame Ops for baiting you away.
        Thought: That does sound like QQ.
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>

//if篩選
<<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>>
    Wayne Zheng: Don't try to change the subject, you guys. The work I talked about...    
    Jeff Wu: Oi! Hold on!;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_正站左看轉右)>>;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰)>>
    Jeff Wu: Jason and Wayne coming out of the same room...
    Tyler Cao: Were you talking about Jason's job?;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_正站右看轉左)>>
    Jeff Wu: What's the verdict, Wayne?;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰看內)>>
    Jeff Wu: Did you let Jason go?;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_正站左看轉右)>>
    Wayne Zheng: Let him go? It was his own choice!
    Jeff Wu: Huh? You gave him to Ops?
    Wayne Zheng: No! Jason decided to work with us!;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站看內返回)>>
    Jeff Wu: Awesome!
    Tyler Cao: I was expecting that.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰)>>
    Wayne Zheng: I have work to do. See you guys later.;<<PlayUntil(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_正站右看驚訝)>>;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰看內)>>
    Jeff Wu: Oh, bye...;<<Set($DLState,阿緯不跟穩哥小峰瞎聊了)>>
    Tyler Cao: He's gone.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰看內返回)>>;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰看內返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->He's always like that, busy with this or that.
        Jeff Wu: I'm used to it.
    ->Does he really have time to manage the division...?
        Jeff Wu: Too late to change your mind! You're stuck with us. Haha!
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>> 
Jeff Wu: Congrats for nabbing the job.;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰抬手)>>
Tyler Cao: Welcome to Silencio, for real this time.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰點頭)>>
Tyler Cao: Not much of a career, though. Haha!;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰抬手返回)>>;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰抬頭)>>
Jeff Wu: Haha!;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰返回)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Haha!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Jeff Wu: Hey, it's about time.;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站看手機)>>;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰抬頭返回)>>
Jeff Wu: I have contract sessions. Edith asked me to cover for someone else.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰看內)>>
Tyler Cao: I've got files to prepare, too.
Jeff Wu: Talk to you later.;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站看手機返回)>>;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰看內返回)>>
Tyler Cao: Bye.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰返回)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->We can still hang out in the future. ($MCBelongControlDepartment);//if選操作組
    Jeff Wu: Sure thing! Another day, then!;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站抓頭)>>
    Tyler Cao: When you say that, it often means there's no next time.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站看內)>>
    Jeff Wu: I mean it!;<<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站抓頭返回)>>
    Tyler Cao: It's settled then. Let's hang out another day.;<<PlayUntil(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站看內返回)>>
->Bye.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
//吳晉峰走進簽約室，曹泰銘走到椅子旁淡入淡出做下看螢幕。
<<#End>>

title: 遇到球球
body:
//站在飲料機前，主動跟她互動
<<Set($TalkToBallFirstPlace,true)>>

<<@現在才第三日第一次跟球球對話欸啊>>

Quentin Qiu: ...
Quentin Qiu: Oh, hey!;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右)>>
Quentin Qiu: It's the big day, yes? You're about to choose between Screening and Ops.
//if篩選有入選
<<#If($SelectGroupScore>-1)>>
    Quentin Qiu: Wayno's pretty nervous. Keeps saying you'll probably go to Ops.
<<#EndIf>>
Quentin Qiu: How did it go? Which side did you choose?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬手)>>
//if篩選
<<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Screening, of course.
        Quentin Qiu: Ha! I knew it!;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬手返回)>>
        Quentin Qiu: I told Wayno that you'd never choose Ops!
    ->What if I told you that I chose Ops?
        Quentin Qiu: Huh? Do you think I'd be mad?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬手返回)>>
        Quentin Qiu: No! I'm a bigger man than you thought!
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->I thought you hated Ops.
        ->Just curious, haha.
            Quentin Qiu: I hate Ops, but not you!;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬頭)>>
            Thought: He's a good buddy.
            Quentin Qiu: But if you work there for too long, I may end up hating you, too.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬頭返回)>>
            Quentin Qiu: Let's not worry that far ahead, haha!
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Quentin Qiu: So, you did choose Screening, right?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Of course.
            Quentin Qiu: You're the man!
        ->I had to. For you.
            Quentin Qiu: Say that again in front of Tyler. Haha!
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>


//if操作
<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I chose Ops in the end.
        <<@主角選操作組球球震驚>>
        Quentin Qiu: Ugh...;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬手返回)>>
        Quentin Qiu: I'm surprised.
        Quentin Qiu: Why?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->For the money.
        ->I don't like talking to people.
            Quentin Qiu: Understandable.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右返回)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Quentin Qiu: Your job, your choice! Wish you all the best!
        Quentin Qiu: Wayno said he's making the Screening office permanently open house. Come over when you have time.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右)>>
        Quentin Qiu: We can hang out later.
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->Tyler and Jeff said that, too.;//有選要糾
            Quentin Qiu: Then all of us together!
            Quentin Qiu: And you can be our mole within Ops.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬頭)>>
            <<#Simple(8)>>
            ->I'm not a mole!
                Quentin Qiu: See? Your heart belongs to them already!
            ->What's my mission, commander?
                Quentin Qiu: Collect gossips and keep a record of their dirty deals!
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple>>
            Quentin Qiu: Haha, I was kidding.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬頭返回)>>
        ->Sure!
            Quentin Qiu: That settles it, then!
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->What if I told you that I chose Ops?
        Quentin Qiu: Huh? Do you think I'd be mad?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬手返回)>>
        Quentin Qiu: No! I'm a bigger man than you thought!
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->I thought you hated Ops.
        ->Just curious, haha.
            Quentin Qiu: I hate Ops, but not you!;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬頭)>>
            Thought: He's a good buddy.
            Quentin Qiu: But if you work there for too long, I may end up hating you, too.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬頭返回)>>
            Quentin Qiu: Let's not worry that far ahead, haha!
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Quentin Qiu: So, you did choose Screening, right?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬手)>>
        Thought: Hmm...
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Sorry, I chose Ops.
        ->You guessed wrong.
            <<#GoTo(@主角選操作組球球震驚)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>

Quentin Qiu: Now, enough about you!;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右返回)>>
Quentin Qiu: Now I must make the big decision. The soda today!
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Take your time.
    Quentin Qiu: Of course I'll take my time...
    Quentin Qiu: Choose carefully...
    Quentin Qiu: Or shall I buy both...?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Decide already.
        Quentin Qiu: Quiet. I didn't ask for your opinion.
    ->Just get both. Give yourself a treat.
        Quentin Qiu: You're a bad influence.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Invest in health, not soda!
    Quentin Qiu: Get out!;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右)>>
    //if操作組。
    <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
        Quentin Qiu: Don't try to trick me, minion of Ops!
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        ->Oi!
            Quentin Qiu: Hahaha.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndIf>>
->...
    <<PlayUntil(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Quentin Qiu: ...
Quentin Qiu: Hey, for real... If there's anything you need help with...;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看插腰)>>
Quentin Qiu: Just come find me. You can always trust me, sweetie.
//if操作
<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
    Quentin Qiu: Even when you choose to go with Ops.
<<#EndIf>>

//if篩選
<<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>>
    Quentin Qiu: We're on the same team now!
<<#EndIf>>

<<#Simple(8)>>
->Thank you.
    Quentin Qiu: Heh.
->I'm not your sweetie!
    Quentin Qiu: I'm giving a generous offer, haha!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Quentin Qiu: OK. Now I have a big decision to make...;<<PlayUntil(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看插腰返回)>>;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右返回)>>
//IF需要幫忙後才來找球球
<<#If($TalkToBallFirstPlace=false)>>
    <<#Simple(10)>>
    ->Actually, I do need your help with something now. ($HelpYehOfficeDoor)
        Quentin Qiu: What is it?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右)>>
        <<#GoTo(@第一次沒搭話後來直接找球球幫忙)>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>

<<#Simple(6)>>
->Bye.
    Quentin Qiu: Bye.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>



<<#End>>
//球球雖然留下了，但之後要記得把它關掉，或是直接讓他走掉

title: 等地窖電梯時
body:
<<@下地窖前23最後聊天對話>>
23(c): Ah, a reminder before you go down.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站低頭)>>
23(c): We will be out of touch while you're in that elevator.
23(c): The walls are radio-proof. Let's establish comms again when you come out of it.
Lawrence Chang(c): I need to cut comms too. Talk to you later.
23(c): Hurry the heck up, Lawrence. Don't count on Jason for everything!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站低頭返回)>>
23(c): Oops, he's already out...
23(c): That boy needs to learn his manners.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站低頭)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Because you've been mean to him.
    <<@23解釋自己鬧隆生有意義>>
    23(c): The problem with Lawrence is that he thinks in a linear way.
    23(c): I have to nudge him every once in a while to change his course.
    23(c): It's hard to be me.
    Thought: I can't tell if she means it...
->I'd hang up on you, too, if I were him.
    23(c): Oi!
    <<#GoTo(@23解釋自己鬧隆生有意義)>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Say...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站低頭返回)>>
23(c): It's just you and me on the line now.
<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站歪頭)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->So?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Never mind. You're boring.
23(c): Hey, your ride is here.;<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站歪頭返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 離開地窖電梯
body:
//搭地窖電梯的過程中，中空空間燈光閃爍無人機維修

//出電梯以後，通話有一點雜訊？

23(c): Hello? Jason, do you copy?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Copy.
    23(c): Good...
->No.
    23(c): Damn you're funny, haha!
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Got bad news for you.
23(c): They have shut down most things in the Cellar for maintenance.
23(c): That includes the surveillance network. I don't have a camera to hack into.
23(c): Hmm, looks like they simply cut the power...
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Does that affect my mission?
    23(c): It shouldn't.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Shouldn't?
        23(c): OK! It won't!
    ->Good to know.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->What do we do now?
    23(c): We don't have any other option. Have to push on.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): I don't have visual on your position. Can't tell if there's anyone coming.
23(c): You're on your own. Improvise.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Are they after me?
    23(c): No. But you don't have a legit reason to be here. Don't get caught.
->Roger that.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Go to the garage. I'll start a car for you.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Will this leave any record?
    23(c): No.
    23(c): Don't be a baby like Lawrence. I thought you're the cool one.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->What does this have to do with being cool?
        23(c): Do you mind?
        Thought: She's being a pest...
    ->I'm just trying to follow Situ's orders.
        23(c): Beep beep. I. Am. A. Robot. I. Follow. Orders.
        Thought: She's being a pest...
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Do I need a car?
    23(c): Huh? Haven't you been to the Ops office already?
    23(c): Aren't supposed to be shuttled around in the Cellar?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Seriously, get moving. Quick.
23(c): Anyone coming down to the Cellar would catch you there.
23(c): I'll try to help where I can. 23 out.
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Thought: I don't know if I can trust her...;<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 躲車子
body: //走進停車場有一台車子突然啟動。 //玩家走道車子旁邊的時候，突然停車場大門打開一點點，車燈從外面照進來。這時進入緩速。 //反應成功 <<#If($CellarHideCar=true)>> Thought: Damn... Harold Zhu: Huh? I thought I saw someone.;<> Stella Huang: You must be seeing things. Harold Zhu: Probably.;<> <> Thought: Phew. I don't think they saw me... 23(c): Is there someone coming? Don't answer if yes. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Yeah. 23(c): Shhh! I said don't answer! 23(c): Stay low. Wait for them to leave. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //反應失敗 <<#If($CellarHideCar=false)>> Thought: Shit. They saw me... Thought: Trying to hide only makes me even more suspicious. <> Harold Zhu: Huh? I thought I saw someone.;<> Harold Zhu: Hey! Who's there? What are you doing here?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Can I be here? ->I'm a member of the Ops team. Can't I be here? Harold Zhu: We're having a break today. Don't you know?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I know. ->It's just that I have unfinished work. Harold Zhu: What work would that be? Stella Huang: What do you care? Let's go.;<> Harold Zhu: A lot of systems are offline today. I don't want him to have this run for nothing! Stella Huang: He said he knows.;<> Harold Zhu: Really? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm not born yesterday. Leave me be. Harold Zhu: Hey! What kind of attitude is that? Stella Huang: Come on, just leave him be.;<> ->Thank you. I know what I'm doing. Harold Zhu: Oh, good. Stella Huang: Come on, stop bugging him.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Stella Huang: Let's go.;<> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //等兩人走掉 <<#End>>

title: 下車以後
body:
Thought: It's dark in here.
23(c): I checked the access log. The Ops office should be completely deserted now.
23(c): Go right in.
<<#End>>

title: 升降梯搭下去以後
body:
//主角在黑暗中下升降梯，往前走兩步突然開燈，兩個特勤拿槍指著主角，徐媛站在他們身後。
Yuna Hsu: It's you again.
Thought: Crap...
Yuna Hsu: I will take over from here. You are dismissed.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站揮手)>>
Yuna Hsu: Open that door for me.;<<Set($DLState,徐媛保鑣們去操作機器)>>
//徐媛揮揮手，他的手下退開從右離開畫面
//徐媛同時坐下，面朝攝影機翹二郎腿

<<PlayUntil(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站揮手返回)>>
<<Set($DLState,徐媛在操作組走向主角對話)>>
23(c): Calm, Jason.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
23(c): I know that voice. Yuna Hsu, of the IIB?
23(c): Let's find out what she wants first.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
<<CloseCommunicator()>>


Yuna Hsu: Got to say, you're a special man.
Yuna Hsu: Always appearing in the wrong place at the wrong time.
Yuna Hsu: How did you pull it off? You don't have the security clearance to come down here.

//IF有加入操作組
<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
    <<Set($DLStateFloat,0)>>
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->I'm a member of the Ops team now. ($DLStateFloat)
        Yuna Hsu: Ops is taking a day off. Haven't you heard?
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    23(c): Listen, Jason. The only rule you're breaking is entering your office on an off day.
<<#EndIf>>
//IF有加入篩選組
<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=-1)>>
    23(c): Listen, Jason. The only rule you're breaking is entering an office that is not yours.
<<#EndIf>>
23(c): Otherwise she's got nothing on you. She can't touch you.
23(c): Don't take her bait.
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Yuna Hsu: I didn't know the army is training agents to infiltrate civilian corporations now.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站抬手)>>
Thought: She knows my background...
<<PlayUntil(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站抬手返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->I'm an employee of Vision.
    Yuna Hsu: For now.
->You ran a background check on me?
    Yuna Hsu: Of course. It's part of my job.
    Yuna Hsu: After yesterday, I think you, a seemingly harmless nobody, deserve more attention.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Yuna Hsu: Let me guess. You're here to find out who is trying to kill your girlfriend.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰)>>
Thought: ...Huh?
Yuna Hsu: I'm sorry for what happened to Frances. I respect her as a woman.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰抬手)>>
Yuna Hsu: Capable, independent.
Thought: How much does she know? Is she part of it?;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰抬手返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->You can save the sarcasm.
	Yuna Hsu: No, I mean it.
->Yet you hurt her.
    Yuna Hsu: Believe me or not, I'm not part of this.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>


Yuna Hsu: Tell me. What did you find up there?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->What do you mean?
    Yuna Hsu: *Sigh*;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰低頭)>>
    Yuna Hsu: Please. Let's skip the playing dumb part.
->I found nothing.
    Yuna Hsu: I'm not convinced.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰低頭)>>
->None of your business.
    Yuna Hsu: I don't think so.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰低頭)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Yuna Hsu: You know, my job is to catch and investigate rule breakers.
Yuna Hsu: I can ask those gentlemen to search you, if that's what it takes.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰低頭返回)>>
23(c): Give her the decryption device if they choose to use brute force.
23(c): Your safety is the top concern.
23(c): Even if you manage to take them down, you can't get out of the farm.
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Thought: No, I can't just...
Yuna Hsu: Don't want to?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->OK, here it is.
->Over my dead body.
->I have no idea what you're talking about.
<<#EndSimple>>
Yuna Hsu: ...
Yuna Hsu: On second thought, never mind.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰返回)>>
Yuna Hsu: Forget that I asked.
Thought: ...Huh?
Yuna Hsu: Consider this an offer of friendship.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站抬手)>>
Yuna Hsu: Whatever you found, keep it.
Yuna Hsu: Hopefully you will trust me more in our alliance.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站抬手返回)>>
Thought: ...What alliance?

Yuna Hsu: We are here for the same reason. I'm trying to figure out what's happening behind the scenes, too.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰)>>
Yuna Hsu: It's a shame to admit, but they used me.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰抬頭)>>
Thought: She's lying. She can't possibly know nothing...
Yuna Hsu: Vision is trying to hide something.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰抬頭返回)>>
Yuna Hsu: The hiding part is not a problem. Corporations have secrets.
Yuna Hsu: But when they try to hide things from the IIB, that's a real problem.
Thought: She doesn't know what's on the hard drive, however...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
Yuna Hsu: See? Our interests are aligned. We should form an alliance.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->How do I know I can trust you?
    Yuna Hsu: Trust or not, does it matter?
->Sounds reasonable.
    Yuna Hsu: It is reasonable.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Yuna Hsu: I don't want, or need, you to agree.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰抬手)>>
Yuna Hsu: You know you don't have any other option.
Yuna Hsu: From here on, I will conduct my own investigation.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰抬手返回)>>
Yuna Hsu: I'll let you know when I need you.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->And when you don't need me?
    Yuna Hsu: Feel free to do your own little investigation.
->I'm not cooperating with you.
    Yuna Hsu: Don't rush to conclusions. You don't know what you're talking about.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Yuna Hsu: I can't stay on this farm all the time. There must be an insider to run errands for me.
Yuna Hsu: I'll be in touch.
Yuna Hsu: Now, show yourself out. I have work to do.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->What kind of work?
    Yuna Hsu: Do you think I'd tell you?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I thought we're an alliance.
        Yuna Hsu: We are an alliance only when I need you.
        Yuna Hsu: And I don't need you now.
    ->You don't have a reason to refuse.
        Yuna Hsu: I refuse, for no reason.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Yuna Hsu: Now, show yourself out.    
->You're letting me go, just like that?
    Yuna Hsu: What should I keep you here for?
    Yuna Hsu: You're more useful to me elsewhere. Now leave.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<PlayUntil(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰返回)>>
<<Set($DLState,徐媛進操作組長辦公室)>>

23(c): You did well, Jason.
23(c): Don't dwell on it.
23(c): Bring the decryption device back and we're done.
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
<<#End>>
//玩家走到停車場時車子一樣自動啟動

title: 地窖端電梯下車
body:
//玩家停好車後
Thought: Phew, now I should be safe...
23(c): Gah. I have to go off the grid for a moment.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Not you, too?
    23(c): Sorry, have to.
->Roger that.
    23(c): Simple as that. You're the cool guy.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Nin needs me to prepare something.
23(c): This disrupts the plan. The van...
Thought: What van?
<<#Simple(6)>>
->What van?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): That's it. 23 out.
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Thought: Hey...;<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 出地窖電梯
body: //出電梯走一下以後 23(c): Hey, Jason. I see you're out of the elevator.;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Why do you keep watching me? 23(c): My job, okay? Need to know where you are. 23(c): Are you shy or what? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Fill me in. What's next? 23(c): Boring. ->Yeah, I'm blushing all over. 23(c): Heh. <<#EndSimple>> ->I just came out of a relationship consultation session. 23(c): Something's wrong between you and F? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I was the consultant. 23(c): Wow, I didn't know you're a therapist. ->Who's this F supposed to be? 23(c): Who else? Frances, of course. Thought: ...? <<#EndSimple>> ->Are you done with your...thing? 23(c): Yessir! ->Where should I go next? <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): To the shuttle platform, for rendezvous. <<#Simple(8)>> ->You're here? 23(c): Yeah. ->Which part of the platform? ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): There's a cargo van. I'm in it. 23(c): Aaaaand there's a surprise for you! <> Thought: ...Surprise? <> <<#End>>

title: 走過去找蕭勇明對話
body:
//從貨車上下來後，到電梯時會看到蕭勇明剛好走過來，然後盯著貨車。可以走過去跟她對話

Michael Hsiao: Hi, Mr. Dai.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站插腰返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Hi.
    //
->What are you doing here?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>

Michael Hsiao: That van is weird.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_抬手)>>
Michael Hsiao: You just came out of it, right?
Thought: And 23 promised this van will blend in perfectly...;<<PlayUntil(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_抬手返回)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yeah.
    //
->You saw me?
    Michael Hsiao: I did.
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: Did you see anyone else in the van?
Michael Hsiao: I suspect it contains unauthorized personnel or shipments.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->No, there's nothing inside.
    Michael Hsiao: Really?
->What made you think that?
    //
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: Its load seems...off.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->What do you mean?
    Michael Hsiao: Let me explain.;<<PlayUntil(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站點頭)>>
->Come on, you're worrying too much.
    Michael Hsiao: No, it's not that simple.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: Its suspension is visibly weighed down, meaning it's carrying heavy cargo.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_思考)>>
Thought: Come on! Why is a regular security officer so perceptive...?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
Michael Hsiao: But the driver told me it's empty, saying there are here to pick up cargo.
Michael Hsiao: What do you think, Mr. Dai?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->I did load some cargo into the van.
    Michael Hsiao: Ah, I see.
->You're really worrying too much.
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: ...
Michael Hsiao: You're right.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_思考返回)>>
Michael Hsiao: I've checked their security pass anyway.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_測站點頭)>>
Michael Hsiao: ID verified. Urgent Toilet Paper Roll Inspectors sent by HQ.
Thought: ...Urgent Toilet Paper Roll Inspectors???;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站後傾)>>
Michael Hsiao: Yeah, maybe I am worrying too much.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抓頭)>>
Michael Hsiao: Thank you. Now I feel much at ease.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Uh, you're welcome?
->Uh-huh.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: I'm back to work then. See you.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站後傾返回)>>;<<PlayUntil(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抓頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Bye.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 鄭緯打電話
body:
//可以調查貨車，顯示他是某家公司的快遞貨車
//玩家搭電梯到月台，靠近貨車後
//說要找主角，但如果主角有其它是可以先處理，有空再過來就好。

Wayne Zheng(c): Hey, Jason? Have you left the farm?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->I'm still here.
    Wayne Zheng(c): Great!
->Can I help you?
<<#EndSimple>>

Wayne Zheng(c): Since you're formally a member of Screening now, there's some work for you.
Wayne Zheng(c): Remember the assault the day before yesterday?
Wayne Zheng(c): On top of that, our security system hasn't been very reliable.
Wayne Zheng(c): Now I want Screening staff to work in pairs in the contract rooms, just in case.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Not reliable? How?
    Wayne Zheng(c): Like doors refusing to open, or opening for no apparent reason.
    Wayne Zheng(c): The Logistics team is working on it, although their priority is the Cellar.
->So, you need me to pair up with someone?
    Wayne Zheng(c): Correct.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Wayne Zheng(c): Mr. Liao needs to sign on a few contributors, but can't find a partner.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->No one wants to go with him?
    Wayne Zheng(c): Ugh...
    Wayne Zheng(c): ...That is correct.
    Thought: I can feel how frustrated he is.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭)>>
    Wayne Zheng(c): Working with Mr. Liao could stress people out, you know, haha...
    Thought: Very true.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭返回)>>
->You need me to go with him?
    Wayne Zheng(c): Yes.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Wayne Zheng(c): I just realized you're part of the team now.
Wayne Zheng(c): And you could take this opportunity to gain some field experience.
Wayne Zheng(c): This counts towards your work hours. Find me at my desk if you'd like to.
Wayne Zheng(c): Mr. Liao's time is flexible. So, no hurry.
Wayne Zheng(c): If you have other things to take care of, go do it first.
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Thought: Hmm...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話返回)>>
Thought: That makes a legit excuse for me to stay at the farm.
Thought: Anyway, I should hand this decryption device to Situ and the gang.
23(c): Enough phone calls, Jason!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
23(c): The van is unlocked. Hop on in.
23(c): There's your surprise inside!
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Thought: This better be the good kind of surprise...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 俊恩打電話
body:
//可以調查貨車，顯示他是某家公司的快遞貨車
//玩家搭電梯到月台，靠近貨車後

Justin Wu(c): Hey, Jason? Justin here.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->What's up?
->Hi.
<<#EndSimple>>
Justin Wu(c): Are you still on the farm?
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Yeah, I'm still here.
    Justin Wu(c): I see.
->Can I help you?
->...    
<<#EndSimple>>

Justin Wu(c): I...
Justin Wu(c): Hmm...
Jesse Lai(c): Just tell him already! He's our people now.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭)>>
Jesse Lai(c): If he says no, he says no. No hard feelings! Alright?
Thought: Is that Jesse talking?
Justin Wu(c): Ahem! Say, Jason, since you're still here, would you like to come down to the Cellar to do us a favor?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->What kind of favor?
    Justin Wu(c): It's complicated. I'll explain in person.
->Does this count toward my work hours?
<<#EndSimple>>
Justin Wu(c): Of course. Every hour is paid.

Justin Wu(c): Meet us at the Ops office if you'd like to come.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Aren't we taking a day off today?
    Justin Wu(c): Yes, but things happened...
->Shall I come over now?
    Justin Wu(c): Up to you.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Justin Wu(c): This is not particularly urgent. No hurry, if you have other things to do.

Paxton Luo(c): Found another!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭)>>
Jesse Lai(c): You've got to be kidding me!
Paxton Luo(c): Check this out, Justin!
Justin Wu(c): Yeah, just come over when you're free.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭返回)>>
Justin Wu(c): This will take a while. I'd recommend getting other things done first.
Justin Wu(c): See you later.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Bye.
    //
->I'll consider.
    Justin Wu(c): Thank you.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Thought: What's happening down there...?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話返回)>>
Thought: ...
Thought: Anyway, I should hand this decryption device to Situ and the gang.
23(c): Off the phone, Jason!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
23(c): The van is unlocked. Hop on in.
23(c): There's your surprise inside!
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Thought: This better be the good kind of surprise...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 跟鄭緯說可跟廖哥
body: Wayne Zheng: You've decided to pair up with Mr. Liao? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Not a problem at all. Wayne Zheng: Great!;<> ->Let me think again. Wayne Zheng: Sure thing.;<> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Today you will do something different, not signing on new contributors.;<> Wayne Zheng: The objective is to explain how we handle premature termination to some signed contributors. Thought: But I've never seen any manual about that...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Premature termination? Wayne Zheng: Rejection response during flop generation. They are not fit anymore. Wayne Zheng: We must terminate their contracts ahead of time, and pay them accordingly. ->But I have no idea what to do? Wayne Zheng: That is not a problem. I know everything. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Mr. Liao will navigate the session today. You just sit there and watch. Wayne Zheng: Edith? Where's Mr. Liao?;<> Edith Yeh: He went downstairs.;<>;<> Edith Yeh: He said he can handle it himself. No need to waste time. Wayne Zheng: *Sigh*;<> Wayne Zheng: Catch up with him, Jason. I think he hasn't started yet.;<> Wayne Zheng: I'll leave the rest to you. Edith Yeh: Ahem! Wayne.;<> Wayne Zheng: ...;<> Thought: ...What's up?;<> Wayne Zheng: Aaand one more thing. I told Mr. Liao already...;<> Wayne Zheng: Don't give any benefit that is not listed in the contract. He tends to do that.;<> Wayne Zheng: I know he means well, but that will eat into our overall budget. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Do we have a budget problem? Wayne Zheng: Not yet, but we must prepare proactively. ->I thought you wanted to help contributors as much as possible? Wayne Zheng: Within a reasonable range. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Thought: I can tell he's struggling against himself. Wayne Zheng: ...;<> Wayne Zheng: Everything considered, just use discretion. Wayne Zheng: If Mr. Liao is being overly generous, give him a nudge.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Will do. Wayne Zheng: Thank you. ->Do I, like, stop him right there? Wayne Zheng: No, persuade him.;<> Wayne Zheng: If he doesn't listen, I'll have a talk with him. <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Now go. Mr. Liao should be in one of the contract rooms. <> <<#End>>

title: 到簽約走廊找廖哥

George Liao: You actually came, huh?;<<Play(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_側身右看)>>
<<#Simple(10)>>
->Got a problem?
    George Liao: No. I love having a damn newbie tagging along.
    Thought: I see why no one wants to come now.
->You thought I wouldn't come?
    George Liao: I hoped.
    Thought: I see why no one wants to come now.

->...
<<#EndSimple>>

George Liao: You sit tight and shut up. Don't talk unless I ask you to.;<<Play(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_側身右看抬頭)>>

<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yes.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站點頭)>>

title: 跟廖吉興一起簽約
body: //一進房間，主角跟廖哥都站著停住，有一男一女都坐著了。 George Liao: Hello. I'm George Liao. Nice to meet you. <<#Simple(6)>> ->I'm Jason Dai. <<#GoTo(@有自我介紹嗨喲欸哎)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> George Liao: Where are your manners? Introduce yourself.;<> Thought: You told me to sit tight and shut up... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm Jason Dai. <> ->I'm a damn newbie. Nice to meet you. Thought: Liao stabbed me with his ice-cold stare. <> ->I said shut up, I shut up.;<> George Liao: Use your brain! George Liao: He's our new employee. Jason Dai.;<>;<> <<#EndSimple>> <<@有自我介紹嗨喲欸哎>> George Liao: ... Thought: Why aren't they talking...? Thought: Especially the guy. Weird vibes. <> //廖哥往前走坐上椅子，等主角也靠近坐上椅子 George Liao: As you know, Ms. Chen, your husband's contract has been terminated, because of rejection response. Ruby Chen: ...much. George Liao: Excuse me?;<> Ruby Chen: ...how much?;<> George Liao: I beg your pardon?;<> Ruby Chen: How much money do we get? George Liao: You can find the payout figure in the notice letter we sent earlier.;<> Ruby Chen: ...;<> Ruby Chen: Nine years! He was tortured for NINE YEARS!;<> Ruby Chen: Now you're terminating the contract one year early, and cutting the pay by half...?;<>;<> Timothy Yen: Urk aaahh...;<> Thought: Is he brain-damaged?;<> Ruby Chen: How are we supposed to live? How can he WORK!?;<> George Liao: I'm sorry, Ms. Chen, but we must proceed in accordance with the contract.;<> Ruby Chen: The contract? According to the contract, he has one more year!;<>;<> George Liao: The contract does contain a premature termination clause. We are following—;<> Ruby Chen: ENOUGH LIES!;<> Timothy Yen: Urrgh oe oo urrgh urrgh...;<>;<> Ruby Chen: Hey, hey, are you okay, honey?;<> Timothy Yen: *Cough*;<> George Liao: We can't—;<> Ruby Chen: Now I have one more mouth to feed and less money to do it with.;<> George Liao: Ms. Chen...;<> Ruby Chen: Stop! I don't want to listen! Ruby Chen: You can't do anything! I know it! We are leaving!;<>;<> George Liao: No, I mean...;<>;<> George Liao: ...Have you checked out our subsidy programs? Ruby Chen: Subsidy?;<>;<> George Liao: Yes, we can offer additional subsidies.;<> Thought: Wayne warned me of this... Thought: Shall I stop him?;<> George Liao: You simply need to sign here... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Wait. We can't provide subsidy.;<> Ruby Chen: What does he mean? George Liao: No, he's a newbie. He knows nothing. Just sign here.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Wayne doesn't allow this, Mr. Liao. George Liao: Wayne is not here. I'm the boss in this room.;<> George Liao: And I take all consequences. ->Sorry, my fault. <> ->... <> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> George Liao: Please sign here.;<> //碰一下屏幕 << PlayUntil (簽約機械, MBU_簽約機械_開啟) >>;<< Play (簽約機械, MBU_簽約機械_點擊) >>;<> Ruby Chen: Here, signed... George Liao: Good. I will arrange for additional payment as soon as possible.;<> Ruby Chen: R-really?;<> George Liao: Yes, I promise.;<> Ruby Chen: Thank you! Thank you!;<> George Liao: If there is no objection, you're free to go now.;<> Ruby Chen: Let's go, honey.;<> //兩人離開 <<#End>>

title: 廖哥被抓後回去找阿緯
body:
Tyler Cao: Who do they think they are, those minions of HQ?
Tyler Cao: They can't just walk into the office and take our people away!
Wayne Zheng: I know, but...;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐低頭返回)>>
Wayne Zheng: Jason, you're back.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站抱胸左看)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐起身)>>
Thought: Tyler's angry? That's a rare sight.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看)>>

<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Huh?
->Which they?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Wayne Zheng: Those agents. What did they say before they took Mr. Liao away?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->They said Mr. Liao knew what he had done.
->They said he made someone unhappy.
<<#EndSimple>>
Tyler Cao: ...What?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看抱胸返回)>>

<<#Simple(99999)>>
->As far as I heard, no.

<<#EndSimple>>

Wayne Zheng: They said he may have be an accomplice of Ms. Yeh in a theft of corporate secrets.
Thought: Huh? These incidents are related?
Thought: So, George Liao and Eva Yeh were conspiring together?
Thought: But Situ never mentioned him...
Tyler Cao: They've been terrorizing the whole farm for two days.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站微慌)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看)>>
Tyler Cao: And now they're making arrests...
Wayne Zheng: ...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看返回)>>
Wayne Zheng: I said I know.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站微慌返回)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背站低頭返回)>>
Wayne Zheng: We must find out what this is all about.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背站右看)>>
Wayne Zheng: HQ obviously wants Mr. Liao. The accomplice thing is only an excuse. Or so I believe.
Tyler Cao: Considering what Jason heard, there must be more to the story...;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背站右看返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->I think so, too.
    Wayne Zheng: Care to explain?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Mr. Liao isn't the conspiring type.
        Tyler Cao: You're right.
    ->The agent didn't even mention Ms. Yeh when they took him away.
        Tyler Cao: Right. That doesn't make sense.
    <<#EndSimple>>
->What made you think so?
    Tyler Cao: They took him without a proper explanation. Didn't ask any of us for testimonies, either.
    Tyler Cao: I think they're just using Ms. Yeh as an excuse.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>

Tyler Cao: What shall we do, Wayne?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看返回)>>
Tyler Cao: What now?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站低頭)>>

Wayne Zheng: ...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看返回)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背站抱胸)>>
Wayne Zheng: Jason. Did Mr. Liao offer overly generous subsidies in the contract room?
Tyler Cao: Is that important? We have way more urgent matters!;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站低頭返回)>>
