<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yeah, he did.
    <<@跟啊緯緯坦承廖哥有亂給錢>>
    Wayne Zheng: I see...
->No, he didn't.
    Wayne Zheng: This is of critical importance, Jason. Be honest.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看返回)>>
    Thought: I've never seen him so serious...
    Wayne Zheng: You may think you're helping him, but you really are not.
    Wayne Zheng: Let me ask again. Are you sure that he didn't offer contributors overly generous subsidies?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->OK, he did.
        <<#GoTo(@跟啊緯緯坦承廖哥有亂給錢)>>
    ->He didn't, really.
        Wayne Zheng: Is that so...?
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Tyler Cao: Wayne...?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看返回)>>
Wayne Zheng: Did he do anything unusual in the contract room?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Not that I'm aware of.
    Wayne Zheng: I see.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看)>>
->He made a phone call.
    Wayne Zheng: What? To whom?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I have no idea.
    ->Probably someone higher up in the hierarchy.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Wayne Zheng: Did he call whoever it is by their name?
    Thought: He called them Mister something, although I forgot exactly what...
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I can't quite remember. It's Mister something.
        Wayne Zheng: At least we know it's a man.
    ->Mister Luo.
    ->Mister Chen.
        //
    ->Mister Li.;<<Set($ChuNameRemember,$-1)>>;//正確答案
        Wayne Zheng: I see.
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Wayne Zheng: Did you notice anything else unusual?
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Yes. Edith came to check on us in the middle of the session.;//姐所
    Wayne Zheng: Edith? What for?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->She asked if we needed anything.
    ->I thought you asked her to?
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Wayne Zheng: I didn't...
    Wayne Zheng: Anyway, I will talk to her about it later.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>

Tyler Cao: Why are you asking Jason these random questions?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看返回)>>
Wayne Zheng: I'm trying to gain a better look of the whole picture...;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背站抱胸返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Got any idea?
->But these questions... How could they help?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Wayne Zheng: I need to think, and check a few more things.
//通知音效，電腦有個通知動畫？
Wayne Zheng: Wait...;//阿緯看電腦
<<PlayUntil(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐起身返回)>>
Thought: Why is he staring at the computer?
Wayne Zheng: ...

Wayne Zheng: Jason. You saw the man who took Mr. Liao, right?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Why?
->Yeah, kind of like a beanpole.
<<#EndSimple>>
Wayne Zheng: I need you to find out who he is.;//那個盤查過主角的特勤要一直待在地窖電梯那邊，讓玩家有印象
Thought: ...But why?
<<#Simple(10)>>
->How am I supposed to do that?
    Wayne Zheng: Ask those IIB agents. They are all over the place. Some of them must know something.
->Why?
    Tyler Cao: Does his identity matter?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站插腰)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看)>>
    <<#GoTo(@啊緯說明特勤身分為啥重要欸)>>
->Leave that to me.
    Wayne Zheng: Thank you.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Tyler Cao: Wait, Wayne. Is the agent's identity really that important?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站插腰)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看)>>
<<@啊緯說明特勤身分為啥重要欸>>
Wayne Zheng: When they took Mr. Liao, I made a call to the IIB officer in charge of Ms. Yeh's case.
Thought: Officer in charge? Yuna Hsu?
Wayne Zheng: She just responded, saying she didn't give the order.
Tyler Cao: WHAT? Who could it be, then?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站插腰返回)>>
Wayne Zheng: She has no idea, or so she says. Maybe she just doesn't want me to know.
Wayne Zheng: The bottom line is, she said that agent is not one of her men.
Wayne Zheng: Whoever sent him, they outrank her.
Tyler Cao: That is...;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站思考)>>
Wayne Zheng: That means our theory is plausible. Someone at HQ wants Mr. Liao.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看返回)>>
Wayne Zheng: We must find out who this someone is.
Wayne Zheng: So, Jason, I need you to find out the identity of that agent.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->I know his name.
    Wayne Zheng: Huh? What's his name?
    Thought: Wait... Do I really know...?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Golan Chu.
    ->Logan Chu.
    ->Roland Chu.;<<Set($ChuNameRemember,$-2)>>
    ->Loran Chu.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Wayne Zheng: ...Never heard of that name.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐低頭)>>
    Tyler Cao: Me, neither.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站思考返回)>>
    Wayne Zheng: How did you know?;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐低頭返回)>>
    Thought: Good question... How did I know?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I don't know how I know but I just know.
        Tyler Cao: Are we doing tongue twisters now?
        Wayne Zheng: This is not the best time for jokes, Jason.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看返回)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐抬手)>>
        Thought: I...
        Wayne Zheng: We really need to find out who he is.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站思考)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐抬手返回)>>
    ->He wore a name tag. I saw it.
        Thought: That's not true! Why did I say that?
        Tyler Cao: Ha!
        Wayne Zheng: Let's see if I can find anything...;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看返回)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐炒菜)>>
        Wayne Zheng: ...
        Wayne Zheng: Nope, no result.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐待機)>>
        Wayne Zheng: We must find out more about this guy.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站思考)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Wayne Zheng: Can you do it?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->How am I supposed to do that?
->Leave that to me.
<<#EndSimple>>
//鄭緯: 特勤隊長有提到那個男的找了一個她的手下幫忙帶路。
//鄭緯: 也許可以從這個人下手。
Wayne Zheng: Go around the farm, ask IIB agents you run into.
Wayne Zheng: There must be at least one agent per floor.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐抬手)>>
Wayne Zheng: Maybe we will find something.
Tyler Cao: The thug on this floor is particularly mean.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站思考返回)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐抬手返回)>>
Tyler Cao: The one in the entrance lobby is a lot nicer.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看)>>
Wayne Zheng: Or just too lazy to do his job.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看返回)>>
Tyler Cao: Ugh, you're right.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站低頭)>>
Tyler Cao: But Wayne, having Jason asking around is totally random...;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站低頭返回)>>

Tyler Cao: I'll give Jason a hand, then.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站抬手)>>

Tyler Cao: Hm?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站抬手返回)>>

Tyler Cao: Huh?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看)>>
Wayne Zheng: Especially financial forms and receipts.
Tyler Cao: But why? That would be a mountain of files.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站微慌)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看低頭)>>
Wayne Zheng: Focus on this year's. No...
Wayne Zheng: Just check those from this April on. Go!;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看低頭返回)>>
Tyler Cao: I will. But...;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站微慌返回)>>
Wayne Zheng: But what?
Tyler Cao: You don't think Mr. Liao has done anything wrong, do you?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站低頭)>>
Wayne Zheng: ...;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看低頭)>>
Wayne Zheng: I'm not sure.
Tyler Cao: ...OK. I'll go check his files.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站低頭返回)>>
Wayne Zheng: Thank you.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看低頭返回)>>
<<Set($DLState,穩哥去翻廖哥資料囉)>>

Wayne Zheng: While you look for leads, Jason, I'll be looking for clues, too.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看返回)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看返回)>>
Wayne Zheng: Will keep you updated.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Alright.
    //
->What if I still can't identify the agent by then?
    Wayne Zheng: In that case, we have to improvise.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Wayne Zheng: I simply don't believe this is related to Ms. Yeh.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐低頭)>>
Wayne Zheng: Something big is about to happen, right here at Silencio...
Wayne Zheng: HQ is about to make up their mind about farm closure, too.
Wayne Zheng: I won't allow Screening to be sucked into this vortex without any preparation.
Wayne Zheng: First things first. Find out what's happening to Mr. Liao.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐低頭返回)>>
Wayne Zheng: Jason, find out who that agent is. Tyler and I will comb through his documents for clues.
Wayne Zheng: Go, Jason.
Thought: The identity of that agent...?
Thought: 23 might know something, but I can't get in touch with her now...
<<#End>>

title: 找特勤時去貨車
body: //玩家去貨車時看見一個穿著送貨員衣服的女生，從畫面外走過來 //靠近時自動進對話 Nin Situ: Jason? What's up?;<> Thought: What uniform is that...? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Situ? Nin Situ: It's me. ->Is that some sort of disguise? Nin Situ: Yes. <<#EndSimple>> Thought: A sly grin. Nin Situ: I do have a pass, but a little disguise can't hurt. <<#Simple(8)>> ->The cup of coffee is part of your disguise, too? Nin Situ: Huh? That is not. ->You look good in it. Nin Situ: I'll take it as a compliment. Thanks. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: Frances said I can find 23's favorite coffee blend nearby. So I went to get her some. Nin Situ: She's busy, though. I'll wait till she's freed up. <<#Simple(8)>> ->She asked you to run errands? Nin Situ: No. I just thought she deserves a treat. <<#Simple(6)>> ->You're awfully nice to her. Nin Situ: She's nicer to me.;<> Thought: Her sweet smile is so out of character. <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->You're awfully nice to her. Nin Situ: She's nicer to me.;<> Thought: Her sweet smile is so out of character. <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: What's up? Do you need something? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I need 23 to look someone up for me. Nin Situ: I'm afraid she can't.;<> Nin Situ: All computers onboard are busy crunching the data you retrieved. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Just a quick check on surveillance log files. Thought: The way she looks at me seems to say "no", I guess... ->Okay. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: Sorry. But you can come back later. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->It's OK. ->Maybe I will. <<#EndSimple>> ->Nothing. I'm running out of things to do. Nin Situ: Uh-huh. <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: See you later, then. Keep in touch. <> <> <<#End>>

title: 看到廖哥被抓
body: //離開房間後看到廖哥面前站著兩個特勤，一個是莊詩妍，一個室朱祿一個修長的男生，也是穿西裝的特勤感覺逼格要比其他特勤都高 Thought: ...Agent from HQ? Thought: What is this about? George Liao: How many times do I have to repeat myself!;<> George Liao: I have work to do! George Liao: Whatever investigation it is, I have nothing to do with it! Logan Chu: You know what you have done, Georgie. George Liao: I...;<> Logan Chu: He is very unhappy about it. George Liao: I-I thought... I just... Logan Chu: Come with me. He wants to talk. Shea Zhuang: Sir, you can't take employees away without—;<>;<> Logan Chu: Did I ask for your opinion?;<> Shea Zhuang: N-no, sir... Logan Chu: Don't let me repeat myself.;<> Logan Chu: Come with me, Georgie.;<> George Liao: ...;<> George Liao: OK.;<> Logan Chu: You, back to your work. Shea Zhuang: Yessir. //廖吉興、朱祿、莊詩妍:走掉 <> Thought: ...And Mr. Liao is going with him like that? Thought: What's this about...? Wayne Zheng(c): Jason, come back to the office, now.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What's up? // ->The IIB just took Mr. Liao. Wayne Zheng(c): I know. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng(c): Just come back right now. <> Thought: What now...?;<> <<#End>> //吳晉峰: 欸，士傑…… //呃，剛剛那是廖哥嗎？為什麼他跟著特勤走了？ //->我也不清楚。 // //->廖哥好像做錯什麼事了。 // 蛤？他怎麼可能會搞到總公司特勤要抓他？ //這一定有什麼誤會，我、我去跟他們說……！ //小峰跑去找廖哥

title: 特勤很煩攔查
body:
//玩家靠近就自動進對話

Shea Zhuang: Stop.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站看外)>>
Thought: Her again. Exactly the same thing happened yesterday...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內)>>
Shea Zhuang: Come over here, please.
Thought: Does she know about the alliance between me and Yuna Hsu...?
<<Set($DLState,被詩妍二度攔查該瞬移了)>>
Thought: I'm carrying the decryption device with me. Hopefully it doesn't trigger the scanner.;<<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站看外返回)>>;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬頭)>>
Thought: Is 23 watching? Come on! Say something if you are!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
Shea Zhuang: Excuse me, but I must perform a full scan on you.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Hey, nice to see you again!
    Shea Zhuang: Uh...
    Thought: Huh? Did she hesitate for a moment?;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬頭返回)>>
    Shea Zhuang: Please stand still.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬頭)>>
    Thought: No no no no no don't beep...!
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Sure thing.;<<Set($SheYanImpressionToMC,0)>>
        Shea Zhuang: Thank you for your cooperation.
        Thought: That went rather well.
        <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站掃描)>>
        Shea Zhuang: All clear.
        Thought: Phew...
        Shea Zhuang: You're free to go.
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->Have a nice day.
            Shea Zhuang: Th-thank you...;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站掃描結束抬頭)>>
            Shea Zhuang: You have a nice day, too.
            Thought: She's pretty nice, actually...
            <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站掃描結束抬頭返回)>>
        ->Stop wasting my time.;<<Set($SheYanImpressionToMC,-2)>>
            Shea Zhuang: You're free to go now.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        <<#End>>
    ->Why? You scanned me yesterday!;<<Set($SheYanImpressionToMC,-2)>>
        Shea Zhuang: Stand still.
        <<#GoTo(@跟攔查特勤關係不太好了)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Not you again?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<Set($SheYanImpressionToMC,-2)>>
Shea Zhuang: Please stand still.
<<@跟攔查特勤關係不太好了>>
Thought: No no no no no don't beep...!
<<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站掃描)>>
Shea Zhuang: All clear. You're free to go.
Thought: Phew. For a moment I thought I was done for...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 飲料特勤
body:
//玩家遇到的第一個特勤，如果玩家走道預定生成點就生成她，生成完成就不會改位置了

//買回來
<<#If($BoughtDrinkForDrinkGuy>0)>>
    //if買錯
    <<#If($BoughtDrinkForDrinkGuy=2)>>
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Eh? That's not what I asked for.;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看)>>
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Heh. But I don't have a problem with free soda.
    <<#EndIf>>
    //if買對
    <<#If($BoughtDrinkForDrinkGuy=1)>>
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Thank you.;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看)>>
    <<#EndIf>>
    <<Set($BePlayedSoBoughtDrink,0)>>
    Kaitlyn Zhu: ...;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看返回)>>
    Kaitlyn Zhu: ...
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->So, who is that guy?
        <<PlayUntil(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看)>>
        <<@追問高先生到底是誰>>
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Which guy?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->That agent from HQ.
            Kaitlyn Zhu: You know what? I don't know, haha!;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看比一)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站插腰)>>
            <<#Simple(8)>>
            ->You lied?
                Kaitlyn Zhu: Ahem!;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看比一放下)>>
            ->The fuck??
                Kaitlyn Zhu: Calm! Calm down! ;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看比一放下)>>
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple>>
        ->Do I look like an idiot?
            Kaitlyn Zhu: N-no...;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看比一)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站插腰)>>
            <<#Simple(8)>>
            ->Who is that guy? Spill.
            ->Don't fucking play dumb with me.
                Kaitlyn Zhu: Calm! Calm down!;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看比一放下)>>
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Kaitlyn Zhu: It depends on your perspective!
        Kaitlyn Zhu: I, personally, see it as a harmless joke!;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看比一放下返回)>>
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Between you guys and the IIB, we need to break the ice.;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看手指)>>
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Right...?
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Haha?
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->Good. I remember you now.
        ->Ha! You're SO funny!
            Kaitlyn Zhu: Um...
        ->*Sigh*
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Kaitlyn Zhu: So... That's it!;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看手指返回)>>
        Thought: What a waste of time...;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看返回)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站插腰返回)>>
        <<Set($DLState,朱啟妤買飲料事件結束)>>
        <<#End>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Kaitlyn Zhu: Why are you still here? I said thank you. You're free to go now.;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->You haven't told me who that guy is yet.
        <<#GoTo(@追問高先生到底是誰)>>
    ->Ah, right. Bye then.
        Thought: I can't leave yet!;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看返回)>>
        <<#End>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>








//不信
<<#If($SaidDontTrustDrinkguy=-1)>>
    Kaitlyn Zhu: What? You don't believe me?;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I believe you now. Come on, tell me.
        <<#GoTo(@請教你買飲料仔告訴你他是誰)>>
    ->I don't.
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Don't bother me then.
        <<PlayUntil(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看返回)>>
        <<#End>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>


//知道要幫買飲料過了。
<<#If($DrinkguyToldNeedDrink=true)>>
    Kaitlyn Zhu: Changed your mind?;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Nope.
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Whatever.
    ->OK, you win. What soda do you want?
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Hee hee. That's a good boy.;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看歪頭)>>
        Kaitlyn Zhu: I want Pogari Sweet.
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Go get it! Thank you!;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看歪頭返回)>>
        <<Set($DLState,答應幫朱啟妤買飲料了)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<PlayUntil(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看返回)>>
    <<#End>>
<<#EndIf>>


Kaitlyn Zhu: Hey? Can I help you?;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Do you know that agent sent by HQ?
    Kaitlyn Zhu: Hm?;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看歪頭)>>
    Thought: That clueless look.
    Kaitlyn Zhu: Oooh! I know him.;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看歪頭返回)>>
    Kaitlyn Zhu: You want to know who he is?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Yes. Could you tell me?
        <<@請教你買飲料仔告訴你他是誰>>
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Sure.
        Thought: Huh? That simple?
        Kaitlyn Zhu: But...;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看低頭)>>
        Thought: I knew there has to be a but...
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Go get me a soda.;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看低頭返回)>>;<<Set($DrinkguyToldNeedDrink,true)>>
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->Just a soda? Are you sure?
            Kaitlyn Zhu: Yeah.
        ->Why don't you get it yourself?
            Kaitlyn Zhu: My boss is watching us. Buying soda during work is a big no.;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看低頭)>>
            Kaitlyn Zhu: If you get me a bottle of soda, though, I may steal a sip every once in a while.;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看低頭返回)>>
            Thought: ...
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Deal?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Deal. What do you want?
            Kaitlyn Zhu: Pogari Sweet.
            <<#Simple(8)>>
            ->Don't forget our deal! Tell me who that guy is!
                Kaitlyn Zhu: OK good sure!
            ->Alright.
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple>>
            Kaitlyn Zhu: Just go already.;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看快去)>>
            Kaitlyn Zhu: I'll wait here.;<<Set($DLState,答應幫朱啟妤買飲料了)>>
        ->Okay, I see that you don't really know. ($SaidDontTrustDrinkguy);<<Set($SaidDontTrustDrinkguy,-1)>>
            Kaitlyn Zhu: Whatever you think.
            <<#Simple(6)>>
            ->Okay. What do you want?
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple>>
            Kaitlyn Zhu: You help me out, I help you out.;<<PlayUntil(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看返回)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->You really know?
        Kaitlyn Zhu: I said I do!;<<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看手指)>>
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Don't believe me if you don't want to!
        <<PlayUntil(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看手指返回)>>
        <<#Simple(8)>>        
        ->Okay. Could you tell me?
            <<#GoTo(@請教你買飲料仔告訴你他是誰)>>
        ->Nah, I don't believe you.;<<Set($SaidDontTrustDrinkguy,-1)>>
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Kaitlyn Zhu: Don't waste any more of my time.;<<PlayUntil(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看返回)>>
        <<#End>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Never mind.
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 請徐媛開地窖電梯權限
body:
//到行政大廳後看到徐媛正在跟一個穿著跟她一樣的人在喝咖啡

//靠近後徐媛後那人離開，玩家可以跟徐媛主動說話




Yuna Hsu: Jason Dai. Looking for me?;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐看外)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yes.
->We need to talk.
    //
->Don't play dumb.
    Yuna Hsu: Don't be so mean.
<<#EndSimple>>
Yuna Hsu: Have a seat.
<<Set($DLState,徐媛請來求權限的主角坐下)>>;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐看外返回)>>
//主角淡入淡出
//if有告訴徐媛
<<#If($ToldYuanIntel=2)>>
    Yuna Hsu: Let me guess. You want me to return the favor.
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Correct.
        //
    ->And you don't want to?
        Yuna Hsu: Depends.
    ->How do you know?
        Yuna Hsu: What else could it be? Just a friendly chat?
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Yuna Hsu: What do you want?
    <<@跟徐媛說自己要去運算核心>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I need security clearance for the Flop Core.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Thought: She's frowning.
    Yuna Hsu: ...That, I can do.
    Yuna Hsu: However, why would you want to go there?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->It's classified.
        Yuna Hsu: ...;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭)>>
        Yuna Hsu: Okay, I don't really care, anyway.
        Thought: That's it? She's not gonna press me any further?;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭返回)>>
    ->I need to retrieve some data.
        <<@也是呢，去那裡也只有這種可能了。>>
        Yuna Hsu: Right. Data. The only thing you can find there.
    ->I need to blow it up.
        Yuna Hsu: In that case, I refuse. Too much risk for me.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐前傾)>>
        Thought: For her? She doesn't care about the company...?
        Nin Situ(c): What the hell are you doing? Take it back!
        <<CloseCommunicator()>>
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        ->I was joking. Wanted to see your shocked face.
            Yuna Hsu: Stop wasting my time.
            <<#Simple(8)>>
            ->Sorry. I just need to retrieve some data. Really.
                <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐前傾返回)>>
                <<#GoTo(@也是呢，去那裡也只有這種可能了。)>>
            ->Hey, don't be so serious, eh?
                Thought: I sound like a dumbass...
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple>>
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Nin Situ(c): ...Jason Dai.
        <<CloseCommunicator()>>
        Yuna Hsu: Go away.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐前傾返回)>>
        //淡入淡出主角
        <<Set($DLState,來求權限的主角離座位)>>
        Nin Situ(c): What the hell are you doing? One minute into the conversation and you blew it??
        23(c): I guess we have to go with the original plan, then?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
        Nin Situ(c): Yeah. Jason, meet Lawrence at the elevator to the Cellar.
        <<CloseCommunicator()>>
        Thought: Situ sounds furious. Well, she has a good reason to be mad...
        Thought: Even I am mad at myself...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
        <<#End>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Yuna Hsu: Just yourself?
    Thought: She figured I have partners?
    Nin Situ(c): Don't mention any of us.
    <<CloseCommunicator()>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Just myself.
    ->I'm a lone wolf.
        Yuna Hsu: Good. There will be trouble if you bring someone else along.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐點頭)>>
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->What kind of trouble?
            Yuna Hsu: Why ask? Didn't you say just yourself?
            Thought: Crap... I stepped right into her trap.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭)>>
            <<#Simple(99999)>>
            ->I'm curious.
                Yuna Hsu: In that case, I don't want to explain.
                Thought: Judging by her look...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回)>>
                Thought: She's fairly certain that I'm working with someone else...
            ->Yeah, nothing escapes you, huh?
                Yuna Hsu: You are like an open book.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回)>>
                <<#Simple(6)>>
                ->So, what kind of trouble should I expect?
                    Yuna Hsu: Oh, nothing at all. That was a trick question.
                    Thought: And she's gloating...
                ->...
                <<#EndSimple>>
            <<#EndSimple>>
        ->I don't need to worry about that.
            Yuna Hsu: Indeed.
            Thought: She seems convinced...
            Nin Situ(c): Well done. It's a trick question.
            <<CloseCommunicator()>>
            Thought: If I asked about it, she'd know I have partners...
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->No, I have partners.
        23(c): Jason Dai, Mister Honesty.
        Nin Situ(c): You...
        <<CloseCommunicator()>>
        Yuna Hsu: I knew you have partners.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Yuna Hsu: Hmmm...;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐看內)>>
    Yuna Hsu: I can grant you access, but it's only for this one time.
    Thought: One time is enough.
    Yuna Hsu: But it's not me. A colleague of mine will grant you access.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐看內返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->What do you mean?
    ->Who?
        Yuna Hsu: Let's just say that someone in the IIB owes me a favor.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐抬手)>>
        Yuna Hsu: This is the perfect time for him to pay his debt.
        23(c): I think she's talking about Irvin Lin.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐抬手返回)>>
        23(c): Another senior IIB officer. Hsu sees him as a competitor.
        23(c): My guess is that she wants to have him do the job, then use it to blackmail him.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭)>>
        23(c): It's none of our concern.
        Thought: 23 knows everything, huh...
        23(c): You're thinking, "23 knows everything, huh".
        23(c): Yep! I do know everything!
        Nin Situ(c): Sorry, let's cut 23 off.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回)>>
        <<CloseCommunicator()>>
        Yuna Hsu: What? Cat got your tongue?
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        ->Nothing. I was distracted for a moment.
            Thought: Distracted by 23... 
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Yuna Hsu: I can't trust you, if you keep having focus issues.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐前傾)>>
        Yuna Hsu: OK. You don't need to know who exactly grants you access.
        <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐前傾返回)>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Yuna Hsu: The result is the same—you have what you need.
    Yuna Hsu: ...;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐看機)>>;//操作螢幕
    Yuna Hsu: It's done. Now you can go to the Flop Core.
    Yuna Hsu: Remember, though. Only once.
    <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐看機返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Thank you.
        Yuna Hsu: You're welcome.
    ->Bye.
        Yuna Hsu: Not even a thank you?
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    //主角淡入淡出
    <<Set($DLState,來求權限的主角離座位)>>;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐看機)>>
    23(c): Security clearance verified. You do have access to the Flop Core.
    Nin Situ(c): Well done. Now meet Lawrence at the elevator to the Cellar.
    <<Set($LetYuanHeipOpenAccesses,true)>>
    <<#End>>;//因為其他路線都會接到(跟徐媛說自己要去運算核心)，所以要在這裡end，不然會循環
<<#EndIf>>

//if還沒跟徐媛說
<<#If($ToldYuanIntel<2)>>
    Yuna Hsu: Let me guess. You're willing to tell me who's working for the board?;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐前傾)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Correct.
        //
    ->How do you know?
        Yuna Hsu: What else could it be? Just a friendly chat?
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Yuna Hsu: Who is it?;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐前傾返回)>>
    //IF有解開操作組支線
    <<#If($KnowTruthControlDepartment=0)>>
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Kevin Hu is working for directors in favor of farm closure.
            Yuna Hsu: The division lead of Ops?;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭)>>
            Yuna Hsu: A man like him...
            Yuna Hsu: Huh, it does make sense.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭返回)>>
        ->Liam Hsu is working for directors in favor of farm closure.
            Yuna Hsu: ...;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭)>>
            Yuna Hsu: He is not on my list.
            Yuna Hsu: I will investigate him soon enough.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭返回)>>
        ->Kevin Hu and Liam Hsu are working for directors in favor of farm closure.
            Yuna Hsu: The division lead of Ops?
            Yuna Hsu: A man like him...;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭)>>
            Yuna Hsu: ...
            Yuna Hsu: Liam Hsu is not on my list.
            Yuna Hsu: I will investigate him soon enough.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭返回)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndIf>>
    //IF有解開篩選組支線
    <<#If($KnowTruthSelectDepartment=0)>>
        Thought: It's George Liao...;//姐所路線動畫
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->George Liao of Screening is working for directors against farm closure.
            Yuna Hsu: I remember him. Shea did background research on him.
            Yuna Hsu: If it's him...;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭)>>
            Thought: Did I give her new ideas...?
            Yuna Hsu: Good. I see.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭返回)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndIf>>
    Yuna Hsu: ...
    Yuna Hsu: Jason Dai, I don't think you're stupid enough to deceive me.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐抬頭)>>
    Yuna Hsu: Still, a friendly reminder is due. If you lied, you will pay.
    Yuna Hsu: But for now, I owe you one.;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐抬頭返回)>>
    Yuna Hsu: If you need any favor, say it now.
    <<#GoTo(@跟徐媛說自己要去運算核心)>>
<<#EndIf>>

title: 認真引導特勤
body: //可能之前可以幫過這個人？站在篩選走廊盡頭 //if當下沒接受 <<#If($LuWantBallLineNotAccept=-6)>> Sean Lu: Changed your mind?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. You can count on me. Sean Lu: Thank you.;<>;<>;//這裡結束 <> <<#End>> ->Nope. Sean Lu: Okay. <> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Sean Lu: You again, huh. What's your business? //if今天第二次碰到 <<#If($GoYehOfficeFirst=0)>> Thought: We met once earlier today. <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Do you know that agent sent by HQ? Sean Lu: Which one are we talking about? Sean Lu: All IIB agents are from HQ. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I mean the special one, just came here today. ->This one doesn't look like IIB. <<#EndSimple>> ->I need the name of the agent who took George Liao. Sean Lu: George Liao? <<#EndSimple>> Sean Lu: Hmm...;<> Sean Lu: I've never heard about this. Sean Lu: However, I know where you can find the answer. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Where? Sean Lu: Uh, hold on for a second... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Sean Lu: You must do me a favor first.;<> //IF剛剛幫過料事件 <<#If($BePlayedSoBoughtDrink=0)>> Thought: Not this favor thing again...? <<#Simple(8)>> ->Another favor? You'd better not be shitting me. ->Do you think I'd fall for the same trick twice? <> Sean Lu: Huh? Someone from the IIB tricked you? Sean Lu: Don't tell me it's Kaitlyn Zhu? The agent on the consultation floor?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. Sean Lu: I'm sorry.;<> Sean Lu: We have a very strict code of conduct. I'll report that to my boss. Thought: He's surprisingly reasonable. ->No. Sean Lu: Sorry, I must have misunderstood.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Sean Lu: I promise. You can trust me. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Sean Lu: I need, um, hmm...;<> Thought: He's...shy? Sean Lu: I need you to get the phone number of someone in the Screening division. Could you? Thought: Picking up girls, huh? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Gimme the name. Sean Lu: Quentin Qiu.;<> ->Sure. Sean Lu: Please get his phone number for me.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Sean Lu: He just went into the office. Thought: ...QQ? <<#Simple(8)>> ->Sure thing. Piece of cake. Sean Lu: We have a deal then.;<> ->You're interested in him? Sean Lu: Of course. That's why I'm asking for his phone number.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Sean Lu: It's OK if he says no. Just let me know.;<> Sean Lu: Success or not, I'll tell you what I know. Sean Lu: How about that?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Deal. Remember your promise.;<> Sean Lu: I will.;<> <<#End>> ->I need to think about it.;<> Sean Lu: No problem. Come find me if you change your mind.;<> <<#End>> ->Why don't you just go inside and ask him? Sean Lu: I'm a bit, uh, nervous... Sean Lu: So...;<> Thought: I can't imagine he's the shy type... Sean Lu: What do you say?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Deal. Remember your promise.;<> Sean Lu: I will.;<> <<#End>> ->I need to think about it.;<> Sean Lu: No problem. Come find me if you change your mind.;<> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>>

title: 去莊詩妍位置遇到孫茹
body:
//剛好看到孫茹掃描完一個人放她走
//第二日電梯一定要介紹到孫如
//

Rose Sun: Oh, hi!;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機返回)>>
Rose Sun: How's it going?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->I need to talk to the IIB agent on this floor.;//解支線開這個
->Where's the IIB agent? She's usually here.;//沒解支線開這個
   Rose Sun:  She's on a restroom break. I'm covering for her.
->What are you doing?
    Rose Sun: I'm covering for Shea.
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Shea?
        Rose Sun: The IIB agent in charge of this floor. She's usually here, checking people going to and from the Cellar.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Rose Sun: She's taking a restroom break.
<<#EndSimple>>


<<#Simple(8)>>
->You're pretty nice to her.
    Rose Sun: She's a pretty nice person. One of a kind in the IIB.
->I see you've got time to kill?
    Rose Sun: That's rude.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬頭)>>
    Rose Sun: I'm off work, OK?;<<PlayUntil(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬頭返回)>>
    
->...
<<#EndSimple>>

Rose Sun: She was here, looking kind of edgy. So I asked her what's wrong.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬手)>>
Rose Sun: She said she needed to go to the restroom but couldn't leave unless there's someone covering for her.
<<PlayUntil(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬手返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Just a few minutes. Does it matter?
    Rose Sun: That's what I said, hahaha!;<<PlayUntil(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬頭返回)>>
    
->Then you offered to cover for her?
    Rose Sun: Yeah, I'm just that nice.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬頭)>>
    Rose Sun: Haha!;<<PlayUntil(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬頭返回)>>
    
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Rose Sun: She's meticulous. And a big fan of her boss, too.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身比一)>>
Thought: ...A big fan of Yuna Hsu?
Rose Sun: But she's not mean to us. Not your typical IIB snob.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身比一返回)>>
Rose Sun: So I thought she deserves a break.

Rose Sun: You're looking for her?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yes. I need to ask her something.
    Rose Sun: About what?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->About someone.
        Rose Sun: Who?
    ->Never mind.
        Rose Sun: Don't keep me hanging!
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Sort of.
    Rose Sun: Uh-huh.
<<#EndSimple>>
//if篩選組走孫茹路線
<<#If($IntoCellarByHelpSun>-1)>>
    //if有幫她修燈
    <<#If($IntoCellarByHelpSun=1)>>
        Rose Sun: Hey.
        Rose Sun: I haven't got a chance to thank you for fixing the elevator light.
        Rose Sun: That helped me a lot.
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->Don't mention it.
            //
        ->Well, you owe me one.
            Rose Sun: Put it on my tab.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndIf>>
<<#EndIf>>









//莊詩妍走過來對話椅後主角從側站改程正站，未來的阿凡妳動畫做到這裡跟我說一下我跟妳說銘
Rose Sun: Yeah!;<<Set($DLState,莊詩妍上完廁所來找孫如)>>
Rose Sun: She's coming.
Rose Sun: Hey, Shea!;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬頭)>>;<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側轉正)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看)>>
Rose Sun: That took you a while.
Rose Sun: Stomach bug or something?
Shea Zhuang: Shhh!;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站害羞)>>
Rose Sun: Ah, sorry, haha...;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬頭返回)>>
//if是解支線過來
<<#If($LuWantBallLineNotAccept=10)>>
    Thought: She was with the guy who took George Liao.
<<#EndIf>>

Rose Sun: Oh, this one here is Mr. Dai.;<<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站害羞返回)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Nice to meet you.
    Shea Zhuang: Nice to meet you, too.
->You searched me. Remember?
    Shea Zhuang: I do.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站點頭)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Shea Zhuang: I searched you twice, if my memory serves.


//if好
<<#If($SheYanImpressionToMC=0)>>
    Thought: She showed me a friendly smile.
<<#EndIf>>

//if不好
<<#If($SheYanImpressionToMC=-2)>>
    Thought: She doesn't want to look me in the eye.
<<#EndIf>>


Rose Sun: Say...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看轉右)>>
Rose Sun: He's looking for someone, and you probably know who this someone is?;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬手)>>

Shea Zhuang: Yes? Who is it that you're looking for?;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬手返回)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看轉左)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->The agent who was with you earlier today.
->The agent who was really mean to you.
<<#EndSimple>>
Shea Zhuang: ...You mean?;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機)>>
Thought: Her guard is up.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->The guy with you outside the contract rooms.
->The guy who took my colleague.
<<#EndSimple>>
Shea Zhuang: That one, huh...
Shea Zhuang: Sorry...;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機返回)>>;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->What for?
    Shea Zhuang: For your colleague.
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Don't be. You have a job to do.
    ->I don't blame you. It's him.
        Shea Zhuang: Hmm...
    ->Just tell me who he is if you feel sorry.
        Rose Sun: Hey! Mind your attitude!
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Just tell me who he is already.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Shea Zhuang: ...
Shea Zhuang: Why do you want to know?;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->That is irrelevant.
    Rose Sun: If you want answers, give answers first, alright?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->What do you care?
        Rose Sun: Huh!?
    ->Sorry, I'm not very inclined to tell.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Shea Zhuang: It's alright. I'm just curious.;<<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站否認)>>
    <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站否認返回)>>
->I need to find out why he took my colleague.
    Shea Zhuang: That I can tell you right away.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬手)>>
    Thought: Oh?
    Shea Zhuang: Your colleague may have played a part in Eva Yeh's espionage activities.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬手返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->No. That is not the real reason.
        Shea Zhuang: It's the official reason.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭)>>
        Thought: ...Official reason?
        Thought: That means she doesn't buy it, either.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭返回)>>
    ->You believe that? Seriously?
        Shea Zhuang: I...;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭)>>
        Thought: That means she doesn't buy it, either.
        <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭返回)>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Shea Zhuang: ...
Shea Zhuang: What would you do if I told you his identity?;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->I'll pass the information to the Screening lead.
    Shea Zhuang: Why?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Because he asked me to find out.
    ->We are trying to get to the bottom of this.
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Run some more investigations on him, maybe?
->I'm not sure yet.
<<#EndSimple>>
Shea Zhuang: I see...;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站思考)>>
Thought: I can't tell what's going on in her head...
Thought: One thing I'm sure of is that she does know something.

Shea Zhuang: ...
Shea Zhuang: I guess I shouldn't talk about this with you.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站思考返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Why? He told you not to?
    Shea Zhuang: Not specifically. I just feel this should be classified information.
->You think I could rat you out?
    Shea Zhuang: N-no!;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站否認)>>
    Shea Zhuang: You don't have a reason to. Right...?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Of course not.
    ->What do you think?
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Shea Zhuang: I see.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站否認返回)>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>

Shea Zhuang: ...
Rose Sun: Don't tell him if you think it's a bad idea.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機返回)>>
Shea Zhuang: It's OK.
Shea Zhuang: Hmm...;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭)>>
Shea Zhuang: First of all, I'm not sure who exactly he is.
Shea Zhuang: All I know is that he works directly for the board, not the IIB.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機)>>
Shea Zhuang: That's all I know.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->The board?
    Shea Zhuang: The board of directors, of Vision Corp.
    Thought: I can tell she feels weird that I don't know which board she's referring to.
->How do you know he works for the board?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Shea Zhuang: He showed me a pass issued by the board.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬雙手)>>
Thought: Yes, this is a major lead.
Rose Sun: The board sending their own henchmen to our farm? I'm flattered!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看轉右)>>;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬雙手返回)>>
Shea Zhuang: I was surprised too. He approached me without going through my superior.
Shea Zhuang: Something is going on...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看轉左)>>
Shea Zhuang: ...
Shea Zhuang: Mr. Dai.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站守門)>>
Thought: Huh? What now?
Shea Zhuang: I told you who he is. In exchange, I want something from you, too.
Shea Zhuang: Let's make a deal.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Isn't it too late? I already have what I need.
    Shea Zhuang: Oh...
    Shea Zhuang: Y-you're right...;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站守門低頭)>>
    Rose Sun: Hahaha! Well played, Jason Dai!
    Shea Zhuang: Anyway...!;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站守門低頭返回)>>
->Sure. How can I help you?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>


Shea Zhuang: Whatever you find out about this man, could you keep me in the loop?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Why do you want to know?
    Shea Zhuang: My boss is interested, although she didn't explicitly say so.
    Shea Zhuang: I want to help her.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站守門返回)>>
    Thought: Maybe Yuna Hsu is somehow involved, too...;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機返回)>>
    Rose Sun: Want to impress your boss, huh?
    Shea Zhuang: No, it's not like that.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站害羞)>>
    Shea Zhuang: I'm just trying to contribute more to the IIB...
    Rose Sun: So? What do you say? Help this poor girl to impress her boss?
    Shea Zhuang: I'm not trying to impress!
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Why not?;<<Set($ToldYenIWillShareInfo,0)>>
        Shea Zhuang: Thank you!;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機)>>;<<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站害羞返回)>>
    ->I'll be the judge of that.;<<Set($ToldYenIWillJudgeByMySelf,0)>>
        Shea Zhuang: I see...;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機)>>;<<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站害羞返回)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Why not?;<<Set($ToldYenIWillShareInfo,0)>>
    Shea Zhuang: Thank you!;<<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站守門返回)>>
->I'll be the judge of that.;<<Set($ToldYenIWillJudgeByMySelf,0)>>
    Shea Zhuang: I see...;<<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站守門返回)>>
<<#EndSimple>>

Shea Zhuang: I'll stay here for a while.
Shea Zhuang: If you need me, come find me any time.
Shea Zhuang: Don't forget to keep me in the loop, will you?;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機返回)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Sure thing.
    Shea Zhuang: Thank you.;<<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站點頭)>>
->I can't promise anything.
    Shea Zhuang: I know.;<<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站點頭)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Rose Sun: Now that you're all settled, I'm going home.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身收機)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看轉右)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->You didn't have to stay to begin with.
    Rose Sun: Nonsense!
    Rose Sun: Who's to protect poor Shea if I were not here?
    Shea Zhuang: I can protect myself!
    Rose Sun: Sure you can, haha!
->Thank you.
    Rose Sun: Don't mention it!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Rose Sun: Bye, you two.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身招呼)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Bye.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Shea Zhuang: Bye.;<<PlayUntil(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身招呼返回)>>;<<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站點頭)>>
<<Set($InspectWhoTakeLiau,0)>>
<<#End>>

title: 要球球的聯絡方式
body:
//穩哥認真用電腦中



//第一次沒要的話
<<#If($LuWantBallLineNotAccept=-1.5)>>
    Quentin Qiu: What's up?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺)>>
    <<#GoTo(@跟球球要聯絡方式壓)>>
<<#EndIf>>








Quentin Qiu: Yo Jayster! What's up?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺)>>
Quentin Qiu: Great timing! Tyler is busy with stuff and I'm sooo bored.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭)>>
Thought: He doesn't know about Mr. Liao yet?
Thought: I guess Tyler didn't tell him, then...;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->You don't know about Mr. Liao?
    Quentin Qiu: Mr. Liao?
    Quentin Qiu: Ah, right, he went to HQ for a meeting or something.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比一)>>
    Thought: ...That's what they told him?
    Quentin Qiu: Is there anything I should know about the meeting?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比一返回)>>
->Stop bugging him if he's busy.
    Quentin Qiu: I didn't, alright? He'd stab me in the face if I didn't leave him alone.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Quentin Qiu: So, what's up, Jayster?
<<@跟球球要聯絡方式壓>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->I need your phone number.
    //IF已經找過莊詩妍了
    <<#If($InspectWhoTakeLiau=0)>>
        Quentin Qiu: Sure thing. Sending over right away.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺返回)>>
        Quentin Qiu: ...
        Quentin Qiu: Aaaaand it's done!
        Quentin Qiu: What's it? Are you sure you don't need anything else?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺)>>
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Yeah.
            //
        ->Don't you wonder what I need your phone number for?
            Quentin Qiu: ...
            Quentin Qiu: Um, no?
            <<#Simple(99999)>>
            ->Someone asked me to get it.
                Quentin Qiu: Huh? Who?
                Quentin Qiu: Nah, whoever!
                Quentin Qiu: Jayster won't do me any harm.
            ->Aha.
            <<#EndSimple>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Quentin Qiu: OK now. I have work to do.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺返回)>>
        <<Set($LuWantBallLineNotAccept,0)>>
        <<#End>>
    <<#EndIf>>
    Quentin Qiu: I win, Tyler C.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭)>>
    Tyler Cao: This is not a competition.
    <<PlayUntil(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->What are you guys talking about?
        Quentin Qiu: See whose phone number you're gonna ask for first, his or mine.
        Tyler Cao: Told you there's no competition.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站左看)>>
        Quentin Qiu: Why do you care then?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭)>>
        Tyler Cao: Whatever. I've got better things to do.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭返回)>>
        Quentin Qiu: Heh.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭返回)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站左看返回)>>
    ->Can I have your number?
        Quentin Qiu: Of course you can...
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Quentin Qiu: But what do you need my phone number for?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->An IIB agent asked me to get it.
        Quentin Qiu: Huh?
        Tyler Cao: Huh?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭)>>
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        ->Huh?
            Quentin Qiu: Shut up! Don't you huh me! Haha!
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Quentin Qiu: Is it a girl agent or what?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手)>>
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->No, it's a guy.
            Quentin Qiu: Eh?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手返回)>>
        ->Does it have to be a girl?
            Quentin Qiu: Not really.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手返回)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Quentin Qiu: ...;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭)>>
        Quentin Qiu: OK! Give it to him!;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭返回)>>
        Quentin Qiu: Can't wait to see what he wants, hahaha!
        Tyler Cao: What if he wants to date you?
        Quentin Qiu: I'll tell him no. Easy enough!;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭)>>
        Quentin Qiu: I might say no even if it's a girl. I'm picky.
        Tyler Cao: Yeah, right.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側坐抬頭返回)>>;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭返回)>>
    ->Well, we're friends now, no?
        Quentin Qiu: Yeah! Best buddies!
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Quentin Qiu: Sending it over now.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺返回)>>
    //發出音效
    Quentin Qiu: You got it? Keep in touch!
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Thank you.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Quentin Qiu: That's it? I have work to do. Talk to you later.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺)>>
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Bye.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<PlayUntil(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺返回)>>
    <<Set($LuWantBallLineNotAccept,0)>>
    <<#End>>
->Nothing.;<<Set($LuWantBallLineNotAccept,-1.5)>>
    Quentin Qiu: Ah, OK.
    <<PlayUntil(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺返回)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 回去給球球聯絡方式
body:

Sean Lu: Did you get it?
<<#Simple(99999)>>

->Not yet.

    <<#Simple(99999)>>

    ->Didn't see him there.

<<#EndSimple>>

<<#Simple(8)>>
->Say, what do you need his number for?
    Sean Lu: Um, I want to friend him in this online game.

    Thought: Uh-huh.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->I see.

        Thought: Never heard QQ mention any of this.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>

->Can you tell me who might know something about that agent now?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Sean Lu: Let me tell you who might know something about George Liao.
//IF已經找過莊詩妍了
<<#If($InspectWhoTakeLiau=0)>>
    Thought: I've already found Shea Zhuang.
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->No need. I found her.
        Sean Lu: Ah, did you?;<<Play(陸石崇,MBU_陸石崇_正站右看拿機低頭返回)>>
    ->You mean Shea Zhuang.
        Sean Lu: Correct.;<<Play(陸石崇,MBU_陸石崇_正站右看拿機低頭返回)>>
        Sean Lu: Looks like you have already found her, though.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Sean Lu: Then why did you...?
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Why did I what?
        Sean Lu: ...
        Sean Lu: Why did you bother to get his phone number for me?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Just wanted to be a nice guy.
        ->I wanted to see what you need his number for.
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Sean Lu: Ha, I see.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Sean Lu: Never mind. Forget about it.
    Sean Lu: Our deal doesn't have a point anymore.
    Sean Lu: You don't need my help. Still, I must thank you for what you did.
    Sean Lu: I appreciate it, Jason Dai.;<<Play(陸石崇,MBU_陸石崇_正站右看拿機返回)>>

    <<PlayUntil(陸石崇,MBU_陸石崇_正站右看返回)>>

<<#EndIf>>

Sean Lu: I have a colleague deployed next to the elevator to the Cellar. She must know something.

->What's she like?
    Sean Lu: I'm not good at describing stuff.;<<Play(陸石崇,MBU_陸石崇_正站右看拿機低頭返回)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Sean Lu: She's the only agent on that floor. You can't miss her.

title: 最後回去跟阿緯討論廖哥事件
body: //時間到或成功跟詩妍說到話後讓穩哥跟阿偉準備好自動進對話 Wayne Zheng: How's it going? Got any leads?;<>;<> Thought: Judging by the sound of it, he's not expecting much. //if有茶道。 <<#If($InspectWhoTakeLiau=0)>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->The agent works for the board of directors. ->Mr. Liao probably offended someone on the board. <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Hmm... Wayne Zheng: This is way worse than we expected...;<>;<> Tyler Cao: But it fits right into your theory, Wayne.;<> Wayne Zheng: I'd rather be wrong... Wayne Zheng: This is invaluable information. Well done, Jason.;<>;<>;<> //if解支線 <<#If($LuWantBallLineNotAccept=10)>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->It took me a while. Wayne Zheng: Great work. ->Piece of cake. Wayne Zheng: I knew I can depend on you. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@跳過直接自己找詩妍路線對話)>> <<#EndIf>> //如果直接去找，不做if <<#Simple(8)>> ->I think I knew one of the agents who took Mr. Liao. Tyler Cao: Yeah? You had a lead in the beginning?;<> Tyler Cao: Nice. Beats Wayne's "try everything" strategy by miles.;<> Tyler Cao: Sorry Wayne, I didn't mean to—;<> Wayne Zheng: No offense taken.;<> Wayne Zheng: Well done, Jason. That saved us a ton of time.;<>;<> ->Actually, it's easier than you may have thought. Tyler Cao: I knew we could depend on you!;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@跳過直接自己找詩妍路線對話)>> <<#EndIf>> //如果沒查到，不做if <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sorry, I haven't found anything yet. ->No. // ->I'm working on it. Wayne Zheng: Good. Thank you.;<>;<> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: It's alright. Let's put that aside for now. <<@跳過直接自己找詩妍路線對話>> Wayne Zheng: While you were working on that, Tyler and I found out something.;<> Wayne Zheng: ...;<> Thought: Judging by their faces, this something can't be good... Wayne Zheng: Mr. Liao used funds that shouldn't be touched.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Embezzlement? ->He really is guilty? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: It's complicated.;<> Wayne Zheng: I've noticed that our divisional budget has been increasing for months. Wayne Zheng: Back then I thought it must be some sort of incentive from HQ, for our outstanding performance... Tyler Cao: I just ran an itemized check. Turns out a large part of the increased budget doesn't make sense at all.;<>;<> Tyler Cao: And there are two sets of budget sheets in Mr. Liao's computer. One looks normal, while the other...;<> Tyler Cao: We suspect some unknown party is secretly funding us. Tyler Cao: Someone at HQ is sending us additional funds in the name of budget allocation. Wayne Zheng: Mr. Liao was aware of it, and actively helped this someone to cover it up. Wayne Zheng: He is in charge of accounting, but I should have done proper supervision. This is my fault, too.;<>;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Wait. What you're trying to say is...? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Simply put, someone has been channeling money into our budget. Wayne Zheng: And Mr. Liao is helping them to cover up. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why did he do that? ->I know. What I don't get is who gives out free money? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: My first thought was money laundering. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Did Mr. Liao send these additional funds somewhere? ->In that case, we should have lots of unexplained expenditures, too? Wayne Zheng: That is where things start to get weird. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: All our expenditures are well justified.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->So what? We have a secret Santa who keeps giving us money? Wayne Zheng: Not exactly. Wayne Zheng: This secret Santa is somehow going out of his or her way to stay secret. ->Why did Mr. Liao bother to hide anything if all expenditures are justified? Wayne Zheng: It's not up to Mr. Liao... Wayne Zheng: This secret funder of ours seriously wants to stay anonymous. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Everything considered, I'm confident that it's not money laundering. Wayne Zheng: This secret funder doesn't want to be seen, not even by us.;<> Wayne Zheng: Mr. Liao is his or her mole, to keep their tracks covered.;<> Wayne Zheng: ...Anyway, this is way more complicated than we expected.;<> Wayne Zheng: ... Tyler Cao: But your theory still stands, Wayne.;<>;<> //if 有茶道 <<#If($InspectWhoTakeLiau=0)>> <> Wayne Zheng: You're right... <<#Simple(8)>> ->What theory? Tyler Cao: Wayne came up with a legit possibility.;<> <> ->Why do they want to take their mole away? Tyler Cao: Because Mr. Liao failed to spend the money as instructed.;<> <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: I suppose this might have to do with the farm closure thing.;<> Wayne Zheng: The board is discussing whether or not to shut down Silencio in the next few years.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Isn't it up to the CEO? Thought: His reaction says I asked a silly question. Wayne Zheng: The CEO does manage all flop businesses under Vision. Wayne Zheng: But critical decisions like the addition or removal of farms are made by the board. ->Are they really shutting this farm down? Wayne Zheng: Yes, but not right away. Wayne Zheng: From the decision to the actual shutdown, the process should take 5 to 10 years. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: As far as I know, many board members are against this idea. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What is our position? Wayne Zheng: We are definitely against farm closure. <<#Simple(6)>> ->We, or just you? Wayne Zheng: Um... Tyler Cao: Maybe not everyone, but I'm pretty sure the overwhelming majority of Screening is with Wayne.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Thank you, Tyler.;<> <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Silencio is a lifeline for the impoverished around here. I'm talking about hundreds of thousands. Wayne Zheng: I thought we had covered this before? ->Does that really change the fate of this farm? Wayne Zheng: I'm not sure. It might. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: Keep going, Wayne. What does that have to do with Mr. Liao?;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Ah, sorry. Wayne Zheng: My theory is that some board members are doing this to thwart the farm closure plan.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Like, paying us to fight harder? Wayne Zheng: No, it can't be that simple. Wayne Zheng: If they wanted to motivate us, they should have let us know about the incentive, right? Wayne Zheng: The fact is, they're trying hard to cover it up. ->For example, by channeling funds into Silencio to boost our balance sheets? Wayne Zheng: Yes. You're sharp. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: Those directors against farm closure, I suppose, plan to spruce up Silencio's numbers to win over those still on the fence.;<> Wayne Zheng: Giving us free money is the most effective way. Tyler Cao: We are taking in a record number of contributors these days...;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I thought having more contributors doesn't necessarily mean making more money? Tyler Cao: I had the same question. Wayne came up with a plausible explanation. ->Not much of a plan, but it simply works. Tyler Cao: Correct. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Taking in more contributors means we are providing for more of the unemployed population.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->For politicians, it means more votes. Wayne Zheng: Spot on! ->But that doesn't increase profit. Wayne Zheng: Profit is not their goal. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: For these directors, old farms like Silencio are not considered money makers anymore. Wayne Zheng: They want us to patch up the unemployment issue, in order to gain political leverage.;<> Wayne Zheng: Do you understand what I'm talking about, Jason?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sorry, you're starting to lose me. Wayne Zheng: Simply put, for every contributor we take in, there's one less unemployed person out there.;<> Wayne Zheng: This means a lot to politicians. For exchange, they may make policies in favor of Vision. <> ->That makes perfect sense. <<#EndSimple>> //if之前有說出朱力的名字 <<#If($ChuNameRemember=-3||$ChuNameRemember=-4)>> Wayne Zheng: Talking about the board, I managed to find something based on the name you provided. Wayne Zheng: Logan Chu, background, none. There's hardly anything about him in Vision's database.;<> Wayne Zheng: However, we found out that he used to work for the government. Wayne Zheng: His boss back then was Jordan Li.;<> Tyler Cao: Do you mean that Jordan Li...?;<> Wayne Zheng: Exactly. After retiring from the government, he joined Vision as a board director. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Now we know which director is against farm closure. ->He had plenty of reasons to bring Logan Zhu over. //if有記得李姓 <<#If($ChuNameRemember=-2||$ChuNameRemember=-4)>> Wayne Zheng:And you said the person on the other end of the call was "Mr. Li". <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: We have enough pieces to build a plausible case. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: Now there's only one question. If Mr. Liao has been secretly working for a director... Wayne Zheng: Why did they take him away?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because he exposed their secret plans? Wayne Zheng: No way. We didn't suspect a thing until that special agent showed up.;<> Tyler Cao: Maybe he told it to someone else? Wayne Zheng: That is a possibility, however...;<> ->He failed to follow orders? Wayne Zheng: I agree with you. Wayne Zheng: This is the most likely reason. ->I can't think of any reason. <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: Because of those subsidies he gave out, maybe?;<> Wayne Zheng: Yeah. Members of the board gave us extra funding, hoping to take in more contributors. Tyler Cao: However, Mr. Liao used the money to subsidize those in need.;<>;<> Tyler Cao: Now they're angry and want answers.;<> Wayne Zheng: Correct. Wayne Zheng: I thought it's just me overthinking. Now that Jason has confirmed the involvement of the board...;<>;<> Tyler Cao: Our theory is basically confirmed.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What should we do now? // ->Are you sure? Have we ruled out all other possibilities? Wayne Zheng: We don't know. The only way to find out is forward. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Based on what we know, I think it's time to contact those directors. Tyler Cao: Direct contact? Is it even possible?;<>;<> Tyler Cao: Plus, we don't know exactly which directors are against farm closure... Wayne Zheng: I have my network.;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Suppose we do make contact. What then? Wayne Zheng: I have a few ideas. ->I don't think this is a sound approach. Wayne Zheng: It's our only approach. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Once I manage to establish contact, I will offer to work for them in Mr. Liao's stead.;<> Tyler Cao: What?;<> Wayne Zheng: Their interest is aligned with ours. We are essentially on the same side.;<> Wayne Zheng: Mr. Liao lacks flexibility. I would make a much better mole. Tyler Cao: But—;<> Wayne Zheng: I will try to make a deal—they leave Mr. Liao alone, and I take over whatever he used to do.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->This could work. Tyler Cao: Not you too, Jason...;<> <> ->This is too risky. Tyler Cao: Right, so many things could go wrong... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: I have made up my mind. Wayne Zheng: Just leave the rest to me. Tyler Cao: Wayne...;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Hey, come on! It's a good thing!;<> Wayne Zheng: Weren't we worried sick about farm closure? Wayne Zheng: If this works out, it's not an issue anymore. Tyler Cao: You're right. Wayne Zheng: All good, then. Wayne Zheng: Back to work, Tyler. Remember, don't tell anyone about this. Tyler Cao: Alright. Tyler Cao: ...;<> Tyler Cao: Just be careful, Wayne. Wayne Zheng: I will. //泰銘走調 <> Wayne Zheng: ...;<>;<> <> //啊偉坐下，垂頭喪氣 <<#Simple(8)>> ->Are you alright? <<@讓阿偉開始說他之前整個大搞啦>> Wayne Zheng: I... Wayne Zheng: No.;<> <<#Simple(12)>> ->Because of Mr. Liao? ->Because of farm closure? ->Are you blaming yourself for what happened? Wayne Zheng: No. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: I, I'm just— Wayne Zheng: It's just that I was so sure that I did make this farm better. Wayne Zheng: I believed in helping contributors. Happy contributors generate more flops. We make more money and help even more contributors. Wayne Zheng: I thought I built a self-sustaining cycle. Wayne Zheng: Turns out we didn't make more money after all. Without this secret funding, we're nothing. Wayne Zheng: Today I realized we don't have what it takes to help anyone. Wayne Zheng: I'm such a failure.;<> Thought: A heavy blow to his confidence... Wayne Zheng: ... <<#Simple(12)>> ->What's your plan going forward? ->Don't blame yourself. You have done your best. <<@阿偉開始說他雖然之前搞錯但他不會放棄得啦>> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: I'm not giving up. I don't think my goal is impractical.;<> Wayne Zheng: With today's lesson, I can see how far away that goal really is. Wayne Zheng: We can do so much going forward, starting with establishing contact with members of the board.;<> ->You didn't fail. The real game is just beginning. Wayne Zheng: Jason... Wayne Zheng: You're right.;<> Wayne Zheng: Thank you. I guess that's exactly what I need to hear. <> <<#GoTo(@阿偉開始說他雖然之前搞錯但他不會放棄得啦)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Sorry for tarnishing the morale. Wayne Zheng: And thank you again. I couldn't have proven my theory if not for you. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Your theory is not 100% proven yet, no? Wayne Zheng: Haha, yeah, right. ->No big deal. You're doing all the hard work. Wayne Zheng: Haha. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: You're free to go now. See you later. <> //if何歆翊好結局。 <<#If($ConvinceHeShinYeeWeiLove=3)>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Bye. // ->Brighten up! Don't forget you have a date! ($DLStateFloat) ->Happy dating. ($DLStateFloat3) Wayne Zheng: Huh? How did you know?;<> Wayne Zheng: Did Cynthia tell you!? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Not important. Just take your chance. ->Yeah, I gave her a push. <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Cynthia did mention that she didn't make up her mind until she had a talk with you.;<> Wayne Zheng: And all this time I thought I was gonna take the initiative, haha... Wayne Zheng: I can't thank you enough, Jason. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Nah, don't mention it. Wayne Zheng: Ha, has anyone ever told you that you're cool? Thought: Yeah, 23 keeps telling me that... ->Thank me with a raise. Wayne Zheng: Haha, I'm afraid I can't. Wayne Zheng: But I'll buy you one heck of big dinner! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Bye, Jason.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Bye. // ->Let me know if you need anything. Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: Yeah, thanks! ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> // <<#GoTo(@啊委跟主角說廖哥事件結束可離開)>> ->I'll be going then? Wayne Zheng: Uh...;<> Wayne Zheng: Sure. Thank you for helping me out. Wayne Zheng: ... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Bye. Wayne Zheng: Bye. ->Are you alright? <> <<#GoTo(@讓阿偉開始說他之前整個大搞啦)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Bye, Jason.;<> <<@啊委跟主角說廖哥事件結束可離開>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Bye. // ->Let me know if you need anything. Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: Yeah, thanks! ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> //if沒查到，不做if Wayne Zheng: No. That's not enough. Wayne Zheng: All theories are baseless until we find out who took Mr. Liao. Tyler Cao: What do we do, then?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What's you guys' theory? Tyler Cao: Not mine. Wayne came up with this theory...;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: It's nothing. Irrelevant. Wayne Zheng: It's no more than an assumption unless we find out who we are dealing with.;<>;<> ->So, we can't do anything? Wayne Zheng: Yes, for now. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: The issues you found in Mr. Liao's files, Tyler, they are worth pursuing. Tyler Cao: Ah, yeah...;<> Wayne Zheng: I will take over from here. Thank you both for your help.;<> Tyler Cao: So...that's it?;<> Wayne Zheng: You have more ideas?;<> Tyler Cao:Nope...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Sorry, it's my fault. I didn't find anything useful. Wayne Zheng: Don't blame yourself. It was a desperate push. I didn't expect much.;<> Wayne Zheng: You tried your best. Wayne Zheng: If anything, I should apologize for wasting your time.;<> ->I'm out of ideas, too. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: That's it, then. You both are dismissed.;<> Wayne Zheng: Remember, don't tell anyone about this. If people ask, play dumb. Tyler Cao: Yeah. Bye.;<> Wayne Zheng: Bye. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <> <<#End>>
