title: 下車走進去
body:
//看到兩人再爭執，z軸前後吵架
<<Set($DidGetOffTheCar,true)>>
Yale Yang: I don't get it! What are you doing this for!?
Thought: Liam Hsu!?
Liam Hsu: You don't need to know. I...
Liam Hsu: ...Jason Dai!?;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置激動返回)>>
Thought: He's holding a disruptor...
//小楊轉身
<<Set($DLState,小羊被抓包轉身)>>
Yale Yang: Jason...;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動看外)>>
<<#Simple(12)>>
->Mr. Hsu! Are you helping Yale take those things off?
    Yale Yang: R-right! He's helping—
    Liam Hsu: I'm helping myself, not him.
->I see you're in this together.
    Liam Hsu: Leave Yale out of it.
->You're the saboteur, Liam Hsu.
    Liam Hsu: ...
    Thought: He's not denying.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Yale Yang: Don't jump to conclusions, Jason. Mr. Hsu is just—
Liam Hsu: Yes, I installed these disruptors. I admit.;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置激動)>>;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動看外返回)>>
<<#Simple(10)>>
->You're a good actor.
->Why?
    Liam Hsu: ...
    Thought: He doesn't want to answer?
->Do you have any idea how many people you're hurting?
    Liam Hsu: I do.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Yale Yang: Why can't you just wait for me outside, Jason?;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動看外)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->You were acting weird. I have to check on you.
->I was worried about you.
->Then what? Let you cover up for him?
<<#EndSimple>>
Yale Yang: I—
Liam Hsu: You heard me.;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置激動返回)>>
Liam Hsu: Yale doesn't know a thing about it. It's me all along.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動看外返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Doesn't know a thing? He told me to wait outside.
    Liam Hsu: ...You did that?;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置激動)>>
    Yale Yang: I did...
    Liam Hsu: ...
    Liam Hsu: How did you know I'm here?;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置激動返回)>>
    <<#GoTo(@小楊說明他怎麼知道許大哥再地窖電梯搞事)>>
->Doesn't know a thing? How did he know you're here?
    <<@小楊說明他怎麼知道許大哥再地窖電梯搞事>>
    Yale Yang: I didn't know for sure, although...;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動說明)>>
    Yale Yang: Hearing it from Packs, I had this hunch.
    Yale Yang: Mr. Hsu said he had errands to run. So he called me over to cover for him.
    Yale Yang: I've hardly ever seen him in such a hurry. Plus, he looked very nervous.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動說明返回)>>
    Yale Yang: So I followed him out, trying to make sure he's OK. But he was already in a car, driving towards the elevator.
    Yale Yang: I didn't suspect anything back then...;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動低頭)>>
    Yale Yang: Until they located a disruptor here.
    Yale Yang: ...
    Yale Yang: I was hoping it's not Mr. Hsu when we arrived.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動低頭返回)>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Liam Hsu: ...
Liam Hsu: Enough talk. Take me to Justin.;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置低頭)>>
Liam Hsu: He sent you to disarm these disruptors, right?
<<#Simple(8)>>
->You're willing to go with us, just like that?
    Liam Hsu: I should have turned myself in, a long time ago.
    Liam Hsu: Now it's too late.
->What made you think it's him?
    Liam Hsu: Only he knows the Cella this well.
    Liam Hsu: ...
    Liam Hsu: And he's the only one who cares so much about the Cellar.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Yale Yang: Mr. Hsu...
Liam Hsu: I figure they're all waiting in the office?;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置低頭返回)>>
Yale Yang: ...Yeah.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動低頭)>>
Liam Hsu: Then I should confess while everyone is present.
Yale Yang: ...
Yale Yang: Wait...;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動低頭返回)>>
Yale Yang: Before we go, let's make up a story. Please.
Liam Hsu: Yale...
Yale Yang: Please, Jason!;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動看外)>>
Yale Yang: Mr. Hsu must have his reasons. Please help me keep this a secret for now.
Yale Yang: I beg you.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->OK. I agree that he must have his reasons.;<<Set($DLState,答應小楊幫許世良掩護)>>
    Yale Yang: Thank you.
    Yale Yang: ...
->No. Think about all those people he hurt!
    Yale Yang: I know, but...
->Sorry, no can do.
    Yale Yang: But...
<<#EndSimple>>
Yale Yang: If they know about this, Ms. Hsu is done for!
Liam Hsu: Yale Yang!;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動看外返回)>>
Liam Hsu: Enough.
Liam Hsu: What I did was wrong. Plain and simple.;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置低頭)>>
Liam Hsu: Don't try to make excuses for me.
//if答應幫忙
<<#If($DLState=答應小楊幫許世良掩護)>>
    Liam Hsu: Jason Dai. Thank you for your good intentions, however...
<<#EndIf>>
Liam Hsu: I screwed up.;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置低頭返回)>>
Liam Hsu: I failed you, all of you.
Liam Hsu: It's only a matter of time that I get caught.;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置說話)>>
Liam Hsu: Now is the time to face consequences that are long overdue.
Liam Hsu: I can't take this guilt anymore.
Liam Hsu: Let me explain everything to Justin. Please.;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置說話返回)>>
Yale Yang: ...;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手)>>
Yale Yang: I see.
Liam Hsu: Yeah.
Liam Hsu: Let's go.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手低頭)>>
//許大哥走調
<<Set($DLState,許大哥被抓包後走回車上)>>
<<#Wait(2)>>
Yale Yang: ...;//低頭握拳
Yale Yang: ...;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手低頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Are you alright?
    Yale Yang: No...;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手看外)>>
    Yale Yang: But thank you nonetheless.
    Thought: That was the saddest smile I've seen.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手看外返回)>>
->Why didn't you just tell me you thought it's Mr. Hsu?
    Yale Yang: I was hoping against hope that it's not him...;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手看外)>>
    Yale Yang: Even if it was him, I was still hoping...
    <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手看外返回)>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Yale Yang: ...
Yale Yang: Let's go.;<<PlayUntil(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手低頭)>>
Yale Yang: Time to see Justin.
<<#End>>

title: 等到最後車上談話
body:
//小楊走回車上

Yale Yang: Sorry for keeping you waiting.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外)>>
<<#Simple(10)>>
->The disruptor is disarmed?
    Yale Yang: Um...
    Yale Yang: Yeah, it is.
->That was pretty quick.
    Yale Yang: Right.
->That took a long while. Is it that hard?
    Yale Yang: Um...
    Yale Yang: Yeah, harder than I thought.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
//if有劉采欣
<<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=true)>>
    Justin Wu(c): Jason, Yale, come back to the office, right now.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外返回)>>;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->But we just disarmed one disruptor.
    ->Why such hurry?
        Justin Wu(c): Just come back now and you will know.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<CloseCommunicator()>>
    Yale Yang: He hung up...?
    Yale Yang: What do you think this is about?;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內)>>
    <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Maybe they had some really big discovery.
        Yale Yang: Could be.
    ->Someone got hurt?
        Yale Yang: Huh? What made you think so?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->No idea. Just a random guess.
        ->When people are this urgent, there's usually bleeding involved.
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->I have no idea.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Yale Yang: Hmm...
    Yale Yang: Whatever it is, let's just hurry up.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內返回)>>
    <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外返回)>>
    <<#End>>    
<<#EndIf>>


//if沒留采欣
<<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=false)>>
    Justin Wu(c): ...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外返回)>>
    Justin Wu(c): Yale, Jason?;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->What's up?
    ->Yeah, we're both here.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Justin Wu(c): Hmm...
    Jesse Lai(c): Tell them already!
    Justin Wu(c): Did you find any disruptor?
    Yale Yang: Um, we did...?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外)>>
    Justin Wu(c): OK. Now come back to the office.
    Yale Yang: Why? We just disarmed one.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車低頭)>>
    Justin Wu(c): It doesn't matter anymore. Jesse and Packs have found a way to disarm them all from here.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Shouldn't we take them down, as well?
        Justin Wu(c): That is true, but we can take our time.
    ->Can they do that?
        Justin Wu(c): I have the same question, but Jesse is absolutely confident.
        Jesse Lai(c): Trust me, I'm the professional!
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Yale Yang: Didn't they say we need to find more disruptors to backtrace the remote control signal?
    Justin Wu(c): It's complicated. Will explain later.
    Justin Wu(c): Come back now.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車低頭返回)>>
    <<CloseCommunicator()>>
    Yale Yang: He hung up.
    Yale Yang: What's happening?;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->I'm feeling like a fool, running around for nothing.
    ->Less work is always good.
        Yale Yang: Haha, can't argue with that...
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Yale Yang: Let's go.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內返回)>>
    <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外返回)>>
    <<#End>>
<<#EndIf>>

title: 有下車走廊遇到大夥
body:
//if 有讓采欣待著
<<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=true)>>
    //走道安裝發送走廊，發現采欣胖胖賴潔都坐在外面
    Paxton Luo: You're back! Do you know that Cathy—;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_正站插腰左看)>>
    Jesse Lai: Don't bother, Packs.;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站看內)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內)>>
    Jesse Lai: They already know.;<<Play(賴潔,MBU_賴潔_階梯捧臉轉左看)>>
    Paxton Luo: Mr. Hsu...;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_正站插腰左看返回正站左看)>>
    Jesse Lai: Liam Hsu, why the fuck are you doing this?
    Thought: They know it, too? How come?;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站看內返回)>>
    Liam Hsu: Let's talk inside.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回)>>;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站看內返回)>>
    Jesse Lai: You broke his heart. Do you know that?
    Liam Hsu: ...;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站低頭)>>
    Liam Hsu: I know.
    Jesse Lai: You don't know shit. What the hell are you thinking?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內)>>;<<Play(賴潔,MBU_賴潔_階梯左看激動)>>;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_正站左看低頭)>>
    Jesse Lai: I thought I've finally found a team of good people. Turns out there are trash like you everywhere!;<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_側站手後看內)>>;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站低頭)>>
    Cathy Hsieh: Jesse!
    Cathy Hsieh: That's enough.;<<Play(賴潔,MBU_賴潔_階梯左看激動返回)>>
    Jesse Lai: ...;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站低頭返回)>>
    Jesse Lai: Justin is waiting inside.;<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_側站手後看內返回)>>;<<Play(賴潔,MBU_賴潔_階梯左看返回)>>;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_正站左看低頭返回)>>
    <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回)>>;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#EndIf>>


//if 沒讓采欣待著
<<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=false)>>
    //走道安裝發送走廊，發現胖胖賴潔都坐在外面
    Paxton Luo: Why are you guys back? We only called Cathy.;<<Play(賴潔,MBU_賴潔_階梯捧臉轉左看)>>;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_正站插腰左看)>>
    <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->What are you doing outside?
        //if第一次選過作這裡幹嘛
        <<#If($AskWhyLaiJeDrinkCoffee=true)>>
            Jesse Lai: Can't I have a cup of coffee and chill?
            Jesse Lai: It's a free country, dude! Haha.
        <<#EndIf>>
        Paxton Luo: We found a way to have the predictive AI model do the job. Now we can take a break.
    ->We found something.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Paxton Luo: Eh? Mr. Hsu? What are you doing here?;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_正站插腰左看返回正站左看)>>;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站看內)>>
    Liam Hsu: ...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回)>>;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站看內返回)>>
    Jesse Lai: What is it?
    Thought: Jesse sounds hostile.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內)>>
    Paxton Luo: Yeah, and what's with the crappy faces?
    Liam Hsu: Is Justin in the office?;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站低頭)>>;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站看內返回)>>
    Jesse Lai: ...He is.
    Thought: I can tell that Jesse is starting to figure it out...
    //許大哥走進操作組辦公室
    <<Set($DLState,許大哥跟小楊走進操作組辦公室)>>
    Jesse Lai: ...;<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_看內返回)>>;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站低頭返回)>>;<<Play(賴潔,MBU_賴潔_階梯左看返回)>>;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_正站左看返回)>>
    Paxton Luo: Eh...?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回)>>
    Jesse Lai: Let's go, Packs.
    Paxton Luo: S-sure?
    //其他人都走回辦公室
<<#EndIf>>

title: 最後進到操作辦公室
body: //if沒下車+沒讓采欣留下 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=false&&$DidGetOffTheCar=false)>> //吳俊恩斜坐側站、賴潔回座位斜坐 Justin Wu: Sorry for sending you on a wild-goose chase. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What's the situation now? ->Not a problem at all. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Your genius Jesse has found out that these disruptors' remote control network is based on triangulation location.;<> Jesse Lai: We can grab control by erasing the ID flag and backtracing the coordinates. Thought: Huh?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Huh? ->Speak English, please. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Paxton Luo: That's not how you explain things to the average layperson... Kaylee Chen: In other words, we can control all disruptors as long as we have three of them.;<>;<> Jesse Lai: Then shut down them all with one button!;<> Cathy Hsieh: How about finding their controller?;<> Jesse Lai: That, hmm... Paxton Luo: She can't. Jesse Lai: Can't yet. All I need is a bit more time...;<>;<> Yale Yang: That means we won't find out who's the culprit, right...?;<>;<> Kaylee Chen: Correct.;<> Jesse Lai: Hey! I said I need a bit more ti—;<> Justin Wu: About the identity of the culprit, Packs has something to say.;<> <> Paxton Luo: Ah, yes. Uh...;<>;<>;<> Paxton Luo: Basically, we can narrow down the list of suspects to employees of this farm.;<> Paxton Luo: Or more specifically, the Cellar staff. Paxton Luo: I'll spare you of the technical specifics. Paxton Luo: These disruptors are connected to Silencio's intranet. Paxton Luo: You know what a pain in the ass Vision can be when it comes to data security. Whoever has access to the intranet has to be an insider. Paxton Luo: I'm trying to narrow the list down even further. It's tough, but doable.;<> Yale Yang: ...;<> Cathy Hsieh: That's it?;<>;<>;<> Justin Wu: Yeah, we have done everything that can be done.;<>;<> Justin Wu: The bottom line is, we don't have any imminent threat anymore, not that Jesse can shut down all disruptors.;<> Justin Wu: I will take care of the rest. You're all free to go. Justin Wu: Thank you again, and sorry for that wild-goose chase.;<> Cathy Hsieh: I don't mind!;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I can go now? Justin Wu: Yes.;<> Justin Wu: Not go home. Jason, Cathy, Yale, return to your original posts. ->Can I help you with anything else? Justin Wu: Not now, but maybe soon. Justin Wu: I will let you know. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: Meeting adjourned. Stand by for further instructions. Paxton Luo: Bye.;<> Jesse Lai: Bye.;<> Cathy Hsieh: Bye.;<> Kaylee Chen: Bye.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <> //三人離開 Justin Wu: Oh, right.;<> Justin Wu: Come here for a moment, Jason. <<#Simple(6)>> ->What is it? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: I'm glad that you chose Ops.;<> Justin Wu: You have seen a lot of ugly things since yesterday. For that I'm sorry. Justin Wu: But this is the norm in the Cellar. Justin Wu: This farm is a sick place. Naturally, your job includes inhumane tasks.;<> Justin Wu: ...;<> Justin Wu: What I'm trying to say is, if you think it's unacceptable... Justin Wu: Don't hesitate to let me know.;<> Justin Wu: You're not obliged to force yourself. I wouldn't want you to. Justin Wu: Do you understand? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. ->I'm OK. I know what I'm getting into. <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: Right. Thought: A sad smile... Justin Wu: That's all I wanted to say.;<> Justin Wu: Now you're dismissed for sure. See you later. <<#Simple(6)>> ->See you later. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> //if沒下車+有讓采欣留下 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=true&&$DidGetOffTheCar=false)>> //吳俊恩斜坐抱頭 Thought: What's the situation now...?;<> Justin Wu: Where is he?;<> Jesse Lai: He said he'll be here soon.;<> Justin Wu: ... Yale Yang: What do we do now? Justin Wu: Yale, you—;<>;<>;<> Liam Hsu: Here I am.;<>;<>;<>;<>;<> //攝影機tag許大哥 Yale Yang: Mr. Hsu!? Why did you—;<>;<> Liam Hsu: Quiet, Yale.;<>;<> Liam Hsu: ... Justin Wu: ...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What's going on now? ->Mr. Hsu? What is he doing here? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: Liam Hsu is the one who controls these disruptors. Thought: What? But he...?;<> Yale Yang: It can't be true! How could he—;<> Liam Hsu: Enough, Yale. Don't bother to cover it up.;<> Yale Yang: But...;<> Justin Wu: Cover it up? Yale knows all along? Thought: Justin's shocked.;<> Liam Hsu: He doesn't. He just saw me taking a disruptor off near the elevator.;<> Thought: He told me to wait in the car. So that was for...?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You didn't tell me. Are you trying to cover up for him? Liam Hsu: You did that? I told you not to.;<> Liam Hsu: I'm responsible for what I did. You have nothing to do with it. <> ->No. Yale knew about it, and told me to stay in the car. Liam Hsu: Yale was not sure. He just saw me going to the elevator earlier.;<> Liam Hsu: He didn't suspect anything until you brought up the disruptor. Liam Hsu: He's a smart boy.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yale Yang: I did... Justin Wu: I have no doubt about Yale. You did it on your own.;<>;<> Liam Hsu: Correct.;<>;<> <<#GoTo(@俊恩一個苦惱許大哥到底在銃三小)>> <<#EndIf>> //if有下車+有讓采欣留下 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=true&&$DidGetOffTheCar=true)>> //吳俊恩斜坐抱頭 <> <<@俊恩一個苦惱許大哥到底在銃三小>> Justin Wu: ...;<> Justin Wu: ...;<>;<> Justin Wu: Why? Liam Hsu: Because I must accelerate the process of farm closure. Justin Wu: ...What?;<>;<> Liam Hsu: I thought a malfunctioning Cellar would urge the board to make up their mind. Justin Wu: ...;<>;<> Justin Wu: I thought about all possibilities.;<>;<> Justin Wu: You could be doing it for the money... Justin Wu: Or you could be trying to take revenge on somebody... Justin Wu: I could deal with these scenarios. They make sense.;<> Justin Wu: But now you're telling me you hurt so many people, to shut down the farm?? Justin Wu: Are you nuts? We want this farm shut down to avoid hurting people!;<> <>;<> <<#EndIf>> //if有下車+沒讓采欣留下 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=false&&$DidGetOffTheCar=true)>> //吳俊恩斜坐抱頭 Justin Wu: Hm? Why are you coming back?;<> Justin Wu: The simulation is still runnin— Justin Wu: Mr. Hsu? Liam Hsu: Justin...;<> Liam Hsu: I installed those disruptors. Justin Wu: You...;<>;<> <>;<> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: ...;<> Justin Wu: Why? Liam Hsu: Because I must accelerate the process of farm closure.;<> Justin Wu: ...What?;<> Liam Hsu: I thought a malfunctioning Cellar would urge the board to make up their mind. Justin Wu: ...;<> <<#EndIf>> Justin Wu: You want to save people...by hurting them? Justin Wu: Listen to yourself! Are you making any sense?;<> Justin Wu: Do you really believe you're doing good!?;<> Liam Hsu: No, this is not what I intended... Justin Wu: What happened, happened! Your intention doesn't matter!;<>;<> Justin Wu: I don't know what you are thinking, what are you excuses. Justin Wu: But whatever reason you had, you should have talked to me!;<> Justin Wu: The last thing you should do is to screw around on your own! Liam Hsu: ...;<> Liam Hsu: I'm sorry. Liam Hsu: I failed you all.;<>;<> Justin Wu: ...;<>;<> Justin Wu: How did this happen...?;<> Justin Wu: Where did you get these disruptors?;<> Liam Hsu: Kevin Hu. He gave them to me.;<>;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: The Ops lead? Paxton Luo: That asshole!?;<> Justin Wu: Go on. Talk.;<> Liam Hsu: Last year he called me to his office and bombarded me with questions.;<>;<> Justin Wu: Questions, like what? Liam Hsu: About farm closure. He wanted to know what I thought.;<> Liam Hsu: ... Liam Hsu: He said if I could cause malfunctions every once in a while, the board will eventually make up their mind. Liam Hsu: Then he gave me these disruptors.;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->And you did as he said? Liam Hsu: I thought it's a good idea. We both wanted to shut this terrible place down. ->And where did he get disruptors from? Liam Hsu: What?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->How could a farm executive possess these things? ->They are military grade. You can't just buy them in the market. Justin Wu: Good point. Liam Hsu: I don't know. But I'm sure he's backed by someone higher up. Liam Hsu: This backer of his wants to shut down this farm. He was transferred here as part of the plan.;<> Liam Hsu: That's why no one could oust him from the office, not even the farm manager. Jesse Lai: And I thought he was just a harmless asshole... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: You agreed to work with him like that? By putting so many people at risk?;<> Liam Hsu: I didn't intend to. My plan was to cause small troubles here and there.;<> Liam Hsu: I never tampered with any critical system. I swear. Jesse Lai: How do you explain yesterday?;<>;<> Liam Hsu: ... Justin Wu: He did it?;<>;<> Liam Hsu: Yes. He set all disruptors to maximum power and activated them all at once, without telling me. Liam Hsu: I never thought anyone could have done that, not even him.;<> Justin Wu: The board is about to call for a meeting regarding farm closure. He must be desperate to make a point.;<> Yale Yang: That's why you punched him?;<> Justin Wu: What do you mean?;<>;<> Yale Yang: I've been thinking, ever since I found out it's you...;<> Yale Yang: About your rage yesterday, about that punch. Yale Yang: How can you live with yourself? Liam Hsu: ... Yale Yang: At least now I know you're a bad man, Mr. Hsu.;<> Liam Hsu: No, I am a bad man. I'm rotten.;<>;<> Liam Hsu: I deserve punishment. Justin Wu: Your feelings don't matter, Mr. Hsu.;<> Justin Wu: Our priority is to minimize the damage you caused, and prevent the situation from getting worse.;<> Paxton Luo: But we don't have the whole truth yet?;<>;<> Paxton Luo: Who is Kevin Hu's backer? Jesse Lai: And we won't find out any time soon. The asshole is hospitalized thanks to Mr. Hsu here.;<>;<>;<> Liam Hsu: ...;<> Justin Wu: ...;<>;<> Justin Wu: It's someone on the board.;<> Paxton Luo: Hm? Justin Wu: I heard some directors of the board want to have Silencio shut down. Justin Wu: Not all of them. After all, Silencio is still a source of profit.;<> Justin Wu: I guess one or more pro-closure directors planned this mess.;<> Justin Wu: To convince the others that we are in no operating condition. Paxton Luo: Directors of the board plotting against us? Justin Wu: Did Hu ever mention anything about the board or specific directors, Mr. Hsu? Liam Hsu: ...;<> Liam Hsu: No. Liam Hsu: But there was a special agent from HQ, telling him to "speed it up".;<> Liam Hsu: I remember that guy, because he showed a board-issued pass. Justin Wu: That confirms the involvement of directors.;<> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: I'm going. Paxton Luo: What? Where?;<>;<>;<> Justin Wu: To HQ. Jesse Lai: Are you sure about this, Justin?;<> Justin Wu: I am. Justin Wu: I convince pro-closure directors to let me replace Hu.;<> Justin Wu: I'm a better fit, as either their agent or the division lead.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You want to take over everything from Hu? Justin Wu: Yes. Justin Wu: But not in his stupid style. ->You want a promotion out of it? Justin Wu: I want a chance to right all the wrongs out of it. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Kaylee Chen: ...I will contact HQ for an appointment.;<>;<> Justin Wu: Thank you, Kaylee.;<> Justin Wu: And...;<>;<> Justin Wu: Mr. Hsu. Justin Wu: I won't advise you on what to do next.;<> Justin Wu: Think about how to clean up after yourself. Liam Hsu: ...;<> Liam Hsu: I'll remove all disruptors first.;<> Justin Wu: That is a good start. <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=true)>> Justin Wu: And you, Cathy. Cathy Hsieh: Ah, yes?;<> Cathy Hsieh: What do you want me to do? Justin Wu: You did well today. Cathy Hsieh: Oh.;<> <<#EndIf>> Justin Wu: I must be on my way.;<> Liam Hsu: Me, too. I have disruptors to take care of.;<>;<> Justin Wu: So much for today, everyone. Justin Wu: I'll leave the office to you, Jesse. Jesse Lai: ...You can count on me. Justin Wu: Let's go, Mr. Hsu. //俊恩走調。 <> <<#Wait(3)>> Jesse Lai: ...;<>;//這句賴潔不要放動畫，她還在走路 Paxton Luo: ...;<> Paxton Luo: So...what do we do now?;<> Jesse Lai: Now that Mr. Hsu is removing all disruptors, we don't have much to do here.;<> Jesse Lai: Feel free to go home if you want to. Yale Yang: I'm going home, then.;<>;<> <>;<>;<>;<> <<#Wait(3)>> Jesse Lai: ... Cathy Hsieh: Yale is...;<>;<> Jesse Lai: He needs some quiet time.;<> Cathy Hsieh: ...Yeah.;<> Jesse Lai: Go back to Screening, Cathy. You have work to do there.;<> Cathy Hsieh: ... Cathy Hsieh: Sure. Bye.;<> Cathy Hsieh: Good work today, everyone. <>;<> Jesse Lai: What about you, Packs? Paxton Luo: Me...?;<> Paxton Luo: I want to stay for a while. Paxton Luo: I have this feeling that we must have forgotten something...;<> Jesse Lai: Packs. Paxton Luo: Just a quick double check!;<> Jesse Lai: ...;<> Jesse Lai: Okay. Jesse Lai: As to you, Kaylee... Kaylee Chen: I'm contacting HQ for Justin's appointment. Then I'll make a report of today's events.;<> Jesse Lai: Meticulous as ever.;<> Jesse Lai: Now, you, Jason...;<> Jesse Lai: Just go home. There's nothing you can do here.;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sure. // ->Ouch! That hurts. Jesse Lai: I'm being honest! <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: See you later. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> //三人走去車上 <> <<#End>>

title: 跟隆生到地窖電梯
body: //先去找徐媛拿到通行權限 <<#If($LetYuanHeipOpenAccesses=true)>> Lawrence Chang: Hey, Jason. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Hey. // ->Do you have the forged pass with you? Lawrence Chang: Of course! ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#If($LetYuanHeipOpenAccesses=false)>> 23(c): Is everyone there? Now I'm hacking into the elevator control system. 23(c): You have one hour before the alarm rings. 23(c): There should be enough time if you hurry up. <<#EndIf>> Nin Situ(c): Lawrence, Jason. Ready? Lawrence Chang: Of course!;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm ready. ->Ready or not, here I come. <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ(c): Good. Nin Situ(c): Remember. Once you're in the elevator, we will be cut off. Nin Situ(c): If anything happens, improvise. Lawrence Chang: Roger!;<> Nin Situ(c): And one last bit of update before you go. Nin Situ(c): That forged pass you're carrying, your title should be engineering manager, not inspector. Lawrence Chang: Does it matter? All I need to do is to tap it on a lock. No one's gonna ask.;<> Nin Situ(c): Correct, but staying up to date won't hurt.;<> //地窖電梯開了 Nin Situ(c): Good luck.;<> <> <> //兩人淡入淡出進電梯 <<#End>>

title: 核心事件後回到建修組
body: //晉電梯裡一段時間不講話(兩人喘氣？)隆生全程摸傷口 Lawrence Chang: Ouch!;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What was that? // ->Are you OK? Lawrence Chang: Sure, just feeling a bit numb, haha... Thought: He looks pale... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Did Vision send those mercenaries, or...?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why would they need mercenaries? Lawrence Chang: I'm confused, too...;<> Lawrence Chang: But if they did hire mercenaries, there has to be some big secret to keep. <> ->I don't think Vision sent them. Lawrence Chang: Then how did they get into the Flop Core?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->How did we get into the Flop Core? Lawrence Chang: Um... Lawrence Chang: You have a point. ->Right. In that case, they must be working for Vision. <<#EndSimple>> <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Hopefully Nin knows something. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Not counting on it. She has no idea who we're dealing with. Lawrence Chang: Don't be so sure. Nin and 23 know all sorts of people. Lawrence Chang: Just a description might ring a bell. ->Say, why did you insist on going into the Flop Core alone? Lawrence Chang: Will explain later. Promise.;<> Thought: Looks like I can't get an answer now... Lawrence Chang: ...;<> Lawrence Chang: Um, Jason... <<#GoTo(@拜託別跟寧姊說我堅持一人進去)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Um, Jason... <<@拜託別跟寧姊說我堅持一人進去>> Lawrence Chang: Please don't tell Nin that I went into the Flop Core alone. Would you?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Why? Lawrence Chang: I, uh, I have reasons. So, please...? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->OK.;<>;//答應要記錄後來司徒會問 ->Depends. I'll be the judge of that. Lawrence Chang: Oh...;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->But you must tell me what this is all about later. Lawrence Chang: ...I promise. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->No. I have to tell her. Lawrence Chang: ... Lawrence Chang: OK, I see. <> <<#EndSimple>> ->No. I have to tell her. Lawrence Chang: ... Lawrence Chang: OK, I see. <> <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Ah! The data!;<>;//隆生拿出破解器 Lawrence Chang: Phew. I thought I dropped it. Lawrence Chang: Once up there, we call Nin pronto, and immediately go to the van for rendezvous.;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: ...After that encounter, Vision could be on high alert now.;<> Lawrence Chang: Maybe there's an all-out war waiting for us up there. Lawrence Chang: I still think we're wasting time. Should have busted Shane Yan last night.;<> Lawrence Chang: Can't let trash like him walk around. The footage Frances recorded is enough to justify an arrest. Thought: Can't argue with that...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah, maybe we should have caught their leader first.;<>;//有同意先抓人比較對 Lawrence Chang: I know, right? ->But Situ said we must do a thorough investigation first. Lawrence Chang: She did say that. What do you think, Jason? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'd say we should arrest Shane Yan first, too.;<>;//有同意先抓人比較對 ->Acting before we see the whole picture could screw it up. ->I don't want to think. Just do whatever she says. Lawrence Chang: ... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: If we still can't find any clue in this data we retrieved...;<> Lawrence Chang: ... Lawrence Chang: Then I'll try to convince Nin to go after Shane Yan. Lawrence Chang: Will you support me, Jason?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Of course. We should have done that yesterday. Lawrence Chang: Great. With what just happened, plus your support... Lawrence Chang: I'm positive that she will change her mind. ->I still think we should follow through with the investigation. Lawrence Chang: Follow through? <<@到隆生覺得主角說話像司徒寧理性>> Lawrence Chang: You sound exactly like Nin... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Is that a bad thing? ->You don't approve? Lawrence Chang: No, it's just that... ->... <<#EndSimple>> //if剛剛說也同意先逮捕嚴勝和 <<#If($AgreedShouldTakeYenFirst=true)>> Lawrence Chang: Didn't you just agree that we should arrest him first...? Lawrence Chang: How come... <<#EndIf>> Lawrence Chang: You and Nin, you're like robots, always talking about the big picture, thinking it over, so on and so forth.;<> Lawrence Chang: I don't mean it's wrong. But... Lawrence Chang: How could you be so detached when bad people like that remain at large?;<> Lawrence Chang: You... <<#Simple(8)>> ->You mean, we're heartless? Lawrence Chang: ...A little, maybe. ->I'm forcing myself to put personal feelings aside. Lawrence Chang: ... Lawrence Chang: Oh. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: ...We can leave that discussion for later. ->What we need is an open discussion, not taking sides. <<#GoTo(@到隆生覺得主角說話像司徒寧理性)>> <<#EndSimple>> //這裡切鋼骨區 <> Lawrence Chang: Hey, we're almost there.;<> Lawrence Chang: We might need to evacuate immediately, Jason. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Evacuate from Silencio? Lawrence Chang: Yes. It's not safe here. ->We're not gonna find a battalion of cops waiting for us when this door opens, are we? Lawrence Chang: ...;<> Thought: He's seriously considering this possibility... Lawrence Chang: N-no! That's not possible...right? Haha...;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Radio doesn't work down there. It will take Vision a while to find out. <<#Simple(8)>> ->But we must act fast. Lawrence Chang: Agreed. ->Don't we look suspicious if we leave the farm now? Lawrence Chang: You're right...;<> Lawrence Chang: I'll leave the decision to Nin. Lawrence Chang: But 23 will definitely wipe us from the surveillance records.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Now, time to move.;<> <<#End>>

    ->...;<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>

    <<#Simple(8)>>

    ->...

    <<#End>>

<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
    Terminal C-2: Member of Operations Division. Jason Dai. Verified.
    Terminal C-2: Caution. External power supply failure. Certain functions are down.
    <<@回去好好操作操作組辦公室介面>>

    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Activate: Elevator.
        Terminal C-2: Action complete.;//升降梯降下來
    ->Activate: Indoor lighting.
        Terminal C-2: Lighting is on.;<<Set($DLState,偷開燈讓23阻止開燈)>>
        23(c): Oi! Idiot!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭)>>
        23(c): Are you trying to alert everybody?
        Terminal C-2: Lighting is off.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭返回)>>;<<Set($DLState,偷開燈讓23阻止關燈)>>
        23(c): I've turned off the lights. Also called the elevator down for you.
        23(c): Get into the control room. Now.
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->You can control this panel from there?
            23(c): Need you to turn the terminal on first.
            23(c): OK, get moving.
        ->Sorry, I thought it's too dark in here.
            23(c): Use your brain, dude.
            23(c): OK, get moving.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        <<#End>>
    ->Activate: Cellar surveillance.
        Terminal C-2: Failure establishing connection. Action failed.
        <<#GoTo(@回去好好操作操作組辦公室介面)>>
    ->Activate: Communication system.
        Terminal C-2: Failure establishing connection. Action failed.
        <<#GoTo(@回去好好操作操作組辦公室介面)>>
    23(c): That was easy. I'm glad you chose Ops.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#End>>;//升降梯降下來
<<#EndIf>>

title: 進入控制室準備插破解器
body:
//進入控制室以後

<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yeah, I'm in.
    23(c): Good.
->How did you know? You have no visual.
    23(c): Radio interference from the system inside.
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): There should be a big ass console right in front of you. Look for a port.;<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭)>>
<<Set($DLStateFloat,0)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Looking.
    <<Set($DLStateFloat,-1)>>
->What does it look like?
    <<Set($DLStateFloat,1)>>
    23(c): A square one, with light dots around it.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Find it and plug the decryption device in.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->That's it?
    23(c): Neat, huh? Designed by yours truly.
    23(c): I always say, user experience is a thing.
    Thought: I can't tell if she's serious...
->Roger.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Hurry up, Jason. I saw a bunch of people coming down to the Cellar.;<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭返回)>>
23(c): Shuttle destination, this office.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Who are they?
    23(c): Don't have visual. But the access log says they are HQ staff.
->OK. I'm trying.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話返回)>>
<<#End>>

Senior employees told me they've never seen anything like it.;<>;<> Cynthia Ho: Simultaneous malfunction across the whole Cellar. This can't be natural... <<#Simple(8)>> ->You suspect sabotage? A miracle! <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@何歆翊開始提及戀愛約人話題)>> <<#EndIf>> //if=4 <<#If($LinGinHueDiskEnding=4)>> Cynthia Ho: I must thank you. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What for? // ->You're welcome. Thought: I didn't help much... <<#EndIf>> <<@何歆翊開始提及戀愛約人話題>> ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// Cynthia Ho: ...;<> Cynthia Ho: ... Cynthia Ho: *Sigh*;<> Cynthia Ho: Um... Thought: Huh...? Cynthia Ho: Ja-Jason.;<> Cynthia Ho: This is out of nowhere, but... Cynthia Ho: Can I ask you for a favor? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Is it the me-specific kind of favor? Cynthia Ho: I sense a "no" is coming, haha!;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Depends on what it is. Cynthia Ho: Right, haha... ->I'd avoid work when I can. Cynthia Ho: Relax, it's not work. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Shouldn't you tell me what the favor is first? Cynthia Ho: Right, haha... <<#EndSimple>> //Single ConvinceHeShinYeeWeiLove =0; //if 路線3鼓勵主動去約 <<#If($ConvinceHeShinYeeWeiLove=3)>> Cynthia Ho: There's something I need to tell you... Cynthia Ho: Remember the conversation about relationships we had?;<> Cynthia Ho: I thought hard about it after you left. Cynthia Ho: Now I'm going to ask Wayne out!;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why? Cynthia Ho: What why? Didn't you tell me to take initiative? Haha!;<> <> ->My word counted that much? Cynthia Ho: I was on the fence. Your word was like the final straw. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I know the feeling. // ->Um, you wanted to say "the decisive push"? Cynthia Ho: Eh? Is there a difference?;<> Cynthia Ho: Anyway! It's not important! <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cynthia Ho: The point is, Wayne and I, we are having a date next week! <<#Simple(8)>> ->Congrats. Cynthia Ho: That doesn't feel sincere, haha!;<> <> ->Wish you guys all the best. Cynthia Ho: Thanks! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cynthia Ho: Thank you, really... Cynthia Ho: I was about to give up on Wayne.;<> Cynthia Ho: Because I was afraid of hurting his feelings...;<> Cynthia Ho: I knew I had to give it a try. We could make things work. Cynthia Ho: Still, there's the fear that I might hurt his feelings and he'd never forgive me.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->You really thought you could hurt his feelings? Cynthia Ho: Yes.;<> Cynthia Ho: I'm very career-minded.;<> Cynthia Ho: If we ended up together, I might break his heart. Cynthia Ho: I was afraid that I can never love him as much as he loves me. Cynthia Ho: I thought maybe he needs me far more than I need him.;<> Thought: ...!? Thought: Fran said something like that when we started this relationship.;<> Thought: And I was like, "I don't care!";<>;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cynthia Ho: I tried to imagine what life would be like if we started a relationship. The answer is…"about the same".;<> Cynthia Ho: I fill my days with work, hobbies, passion... Cynthia Ho: I can't make more time for Wayne.;<> Cynthia Ho: What if we break up and Wayne hates me for not loving him enough? Cynthia Ho: What if Wayne thinks I never cared about him?;<> Cynthia Ho: After our conversation, though, I changed my mind...;<> Cynthia Ho: You said sharing my worries with him also shows how much I care about him.;<> Cynthia Ho: That made up my mind. Cynthia Ho: I do love Wayne, from the bottom of my heart. Cynthia Ho: The reason being, he's a good man, full of empathy. Cynthia Ho: Even if this relationship doesn't have a good ending... Cynthia Ho: I still can't afford to miss the opportunity just because of silly worries! Cynthia Ho: I love him. Yeah, I love Wayne Zheng. <<#Simple(8)>> ->You will definitely have a good ending. Cynthia Ho: Yes! ->I see you've thought it over. Cynthia Ho: Haha, I did! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cynthia Ho: All thanks to you, Jason! <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Don't thank me. You did the thinking. Cynthia Ho: I could have chosen differently if not for you. ->Yeah, I'm good at this! Cynthia Ho: Hahaha! ->Don't blame me if it doesn't work out in the end. Cynthia Ho: I won't. Hahaha! <<#EndSimple>> Cynthia Ho: ... <<#GoTo(@何歆翊戀愛話題結束點)>> ///////////////////////////////////////////還沒寫完//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// <<#EndIf>> //if 路線1鼓勵主動去約 <<#If($ConvinceHeShinYeeWeiLove=1)>> Cynthia Ho: Remember the conversation about relationships we had?;<> Cynthia Ho: You said I should take the initiative and ask him out. I thought it's a bad idea. Cynthia Ho: And... <<#EndIf>> //if 路線2鼓勵主動去約 <<#If($ConvinceHeShinYeeWeiLove=2)>> Cynthia Ho: Remember the conversation about relationships we had?;<> Cynthia Ho: You said I shouldn't take too much initiative, so I gave the thought a rest... Cynthia Ho: Don't feel guilty or anything. I made the decision myself. Cynthia Ho: And... <<#EndIf>> //if 路線4鼓勵主動去約 <<#If($ConvinceHeShinYeeWeiLove=4)>> Cynthia Ho: Remember the conversation about relationships we had?;<> Cynthia Ho: You said I should give Wayne a bit more time. Cynthia Ho: Guess what? He did come to ask me out. Cynthia Ho: But... <<#EndIf>> //IF沒解過支線(代表只在阿緯面談門口見過) <<#If($LieYouDontFindLin=0)>> //沒有解過第二日廖哥指派的支線，所以沒有決定幫不幫林靜慧拖延 Cynthia Ho: I know this is weird, we have met only once and all.;<> Cynthia Ho: But since you know Wayne... <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>> Cynthia Ho: And you'll be working closely with him... <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Come on, to the point already! Cynthia Ho: Ah, sorry!;<> <> ->This is sounding increasingly complicated. Cynthia Ho: Is it? Haha... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Cynthia Ho: I need you to do me a favor, and tell Wayne no. Thought: Eh...? Cynthia Ho: He asked me out to the movies earlier today. I wanted to say no...;<> //IF沒解過支線(代表指在阿緯面談門口見過) <<#If($LieYouDontFindLin=0)>> Thought: Right. The Screening gang kept pushing Wayne to make his move. Thought: Not a very good move, by the looks of it. <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Why don't you just tell him yourself? Cynthia Ho: ...;<> ->You don't like him? Cynthia Ho: I do like him. It's just that... Cynthia Ho: It's complicated!;<> <<#EndSimple>> Cynthia Ho: If I rejected him straightforward, what happened next would be very awkward. Cynthia Ho: I can see him blushing all over and rambling...;<> Thought: I can imagine that, too.;<> Cynthia Ho: He's cute when he does that, though, haha.;<> Cynthia Ho: But I just don't want to break his heart...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->So, what, you'd feel better if he just shrugs it off after being rejected? ->You mean, Wayne is stressing you out? Cynthia Ho: I don't mean that.;<> Cynthia Ho: Wayne's reaction is a big part of the problem, though.;<> Cynthia Ho: I know he does that because I mean the world to him. Cynthia Ho: The thing is, I don't have anything to show in response. That makes me feel... guilty, I guess?;<> Cynthia Ho: Maybe not guilty, but very, very stressed.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Thought: Complicated. Yeah.;<> Cynthia Ho: ...;<> Cynthia Ho: No, I can't!;<> Cynthia Ho: Can't run! Can't hide!;<> Cynthia Ho: I know I must face Wayne myself. Cynthia Ho: Sorry for wasting your time. Please forget what I asked.;<> Thought: Poor Wayne...;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Do you think you don't like Wayne enough? Cynthia Ho: I don't think so.;<> Cynthia Ho: I do like him, a lot! I'd totally like to go with him, too. ->You're not ready for a relationship yet? Cynthia Ho: Relationship...?;<> Cynthia Ho: It's funny, talking about relationship like a teenager when I'm 30 plus years old. Cynthia Ho: It's not like I'm not ready... <<#Simple(6)>> ->You're not into men. Cynthia Ho: Oh, no. I'm pretty sure I'm heterosexual. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Cynthia Ho: I guess I'm just not ready to make commitments...? <<#Simple(6)>> ->Commitments? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cynthia Ho: A large part of my life is about work.;<> Cynthia Ho: Being in a relationship, I'll feel obliged to give at least half of my time to my boyfriend. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I know the feeling.;<> Cynthia Ho: Right?;<> Thought: ...Do I really know the feeling? Thought: I don't have much life to speak of, myself...;<> ->But it's the least you should do, no? Cynthia Ho: That's why I need to tell Wayne no. I simply can't do it. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cynthia Ho: If we ended up together, I might break his heart.;<> Cynthia Ho: I was afraid that I can never love him as much as he loves me.;<> Cynthia Ho: I thought maybe he needs me far more than I need him. Thought: ...!? Thought: Fran said something like that when we started this relationship.;<>;<> Thought: And I was like, "I don't care!";<>;<> <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Maybe Wayne doesn't mind. Cynthia Ho: ... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Listen. Nothing is perfect. You guys can make it work. ->Maybe you should give him a chance and see how he reacts? <> Cynthia Ho: A chance...;<> Cynthia Ho: I... Thought: She's swaying.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Maybe you're not meant for each other. Thought: I get an awkward smile in response. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cynthia Ho: I do want someone to love me, a relationship where we support each other. Cynthia Ho: But if freedom is at stake, I guess I must let relationships go.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You don't have to choose one over the other. Cynthia Ho: Is that so? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Maybe you can find a like-minded partner. ->Between relationship and freedom, there has to be a balance point somewhere. <> Cynthia Ho: ...;<> Cynthia Ho: You're right. Cynthia Ho: I need to think about this...;<> <<#If($DLStateFloat=2)>> <> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Smart choice. Cynthia Ho: Haha, hopefully I can look back when I'm 80 years old and still call it smart.;<> <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<@何歆翊戀愛話題結束點>> <<#End>>

title: 23評論攔查事件
body: //玩家離開特勤以後幾秒，或按電梯 23(c): Heart pounding, huh? <<#Simple(8)>> ->Not at all. 23(c): Heeeey! 23(c): Come on, show me some drama. 23(c): But yeah, you know you can always trust my work! ->Yeah. I thought I was done for. ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): It's my work, man! They can't find it that easily! 23(c): Not with crappy scanners like that one! <<#Simple(8)>> ->You intended to keep me worrying? 23(c): Suspense makes great drama! Learn to appreciate the art. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Damn. 23(c): Heh heh. ->I think I know how Lawrence feels about you now. 23(c): Overwhelming worship. Say no more. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Thank you. I know I could trust you. 23(c): Uh, that, um... 23(c): Of course! Thought: ...She's not used to direct compliments? ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Now that Yuna Hsu agreed to let you go... 23(c): You didn't have to worry even if you were caught. Haha. Thought: Easier said than done... 23(c): Come to the shuttle platform for rendezvous. <<#End>>

Cynthia Ho: I think I have a decision now!;<> Cynthia Ho: Thank you for your time. Cynthia Ho: See you later!;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Thought: Now Wayne owes me a favor.;<> Thought: Hold on, could it be that she wasn't talking about Wayne...?;<> <> <<#End>> ->You guys are adults. Cynthia Ho: ...Okay. <<#EndSimple>> Cynthia Ho: Still, thank you for your time. Cynthia Ho: See you later! <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Thought: That was a good answer. It's none of my problems. <<#End>> ->Totally. Go ask him out. Cynthia Ho: Oh...;<> Cynthia Ho: That's what it's like from the male perspective? Cynthia Ho: I see.     ->...

->No.
    Edith Yeh: ...

->...
<<#EndSimple>>

<<Set($DLState,葉慈恩起身下簽約室椅子)>>

->...

title: 跟采欣一起搭地窖電梯中
body: //這次地窖電梯一堆無人機在附近維修噴火花 Cathy Hsieh: ... Thought: ...;<> Cathy Hsieh: ...Jason. Cathy Hsieh: Can we have a chat?;<> Cathy Hsieh: I need a distraction from this vibration...;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sure, of course. Cathy Hsieh: Thank you...;<> ->You don't have to ask. Haha. Cathy Hsieh: Because you work for Ops now... Cathy Hsieh: It kinda feels like you're not "one of us"?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->No such thing! Cathy Hsieh: Really? Good to know! ->You spent plenty of time at Ops, too. Cathy Hsieh: Ah, you're right... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#Wait(2)>> Cathy Hsieh: Hey. ->I'm not quite in the mood.;<> Cathy Hsieh: Oh... Cathy Hsieh: ... Cathy Hsieh: ...;<> <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: Why are you going down to the Cellar? //if說不想聊天 <<#If($DLState=第一次跟采欣搭地窖電梯說不想聊天)>> Thought: There she is, starting a conversation anyway.;<> <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Justin asked me to. Didn't explain. Cathy Hsieh: Oh? I was called down, too.;<> Cathy Hsieh: I mean, by Justin. <> ->Why ask? Cathy Hsieh: Because Justin called me, told me to come down to the Cellar but didn't explain why.;<> Cathy Hsieh: I thought maybe he called you, too. Isn't Ops supposed to be having a break today? <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Oh, right. Justin called me, too. ->He didn't explain anything to you, either? <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: Hmm...;<> Cathy Hsieh: Calling out of the blue, wanting you and me both...? Cathy Hsieh: That's weird... <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah, a bit weird. ->Weird? How? Cathy Hsieh: Because we have nothing in common. Like, I'm a programmer... Cathy Hsieh: You're... I think you only operate machines, right? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Only operate machines? Cathy Hsieh: Ah...;<> Cathy Hsieh: Sorry, I don't mean it that way! I was trying to say that... Cathy Hsieh: That you're no help if they need programming support.;<> Cathy Hsieh: Uh, no, that came out even wrong-er. I mean that— Cathy Hsieh: I'm sorry...;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No offense taken! Haha. ->Ouch! That hurts. Cathy Hsieh: I-I'm really sorry.;<> ->Never mind. Cathy Hsieh: Yeah...;<> <<#EndSimple>> ->Correct. <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: Hmm...;<> Cathy Hsieh: I hope this is about something important! Thought: She's super excited all of a sudden. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Important stuff means lots of work. Cathy Hsieh: Right. But again, it's a great opportunity to prove ourselves to them! ->Why so excited? Cathy Hsieh: Eh? Am I...? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. Doesn't take an expert to tell. ->Listen to yourself. <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: ...;<> Cathy Hsieh: If so, this would be the first time that Justin gives me any important task. Thought: I thought she visits Ops for training, not work...?;<> Cathy Hsieh: He never gave me anything important to do, ever since I first went there.;<> Cathy Hsieh: He's like, treating me as a visitor, a guest.;<> <<#Simple(10)>> ->What do you usually do there? Cathy Hsieh: Training and learning...;<> Cathy Hsieh: Plus listening to Jesse bragging about her work... Thought: I get it that she's not very happy about this latter part. <> <<#Simple(10)>> ->But the plan was all about learning and training, no? ->Sounds cozy to me. Cathy Hsieh: Cozy, but I don't sense much recognition...;<> ->You want to prove yourself? Cathy Hsieh: Yes!;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->I know that feeling, being an outsider. Cathy Hsieh: Right.;<> ->So? <> ->... <> <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: So I hope Justin will let me do something that matters this time. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I'd prefer less work any day. Cathy Hsieh: Very practical attitude, haha... ->Given this urgency, it has to be something big. Cathy Hsieh: Yes! ->Maybe just some random errands to run. Cathy Hsieh: N-no way! Cathy Hsieh: So much trouble, just for random errands? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: ...;<> Cathy Hsieh: I want Justin to trust me more... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why do you care so much about what they think? <<@采欣說為何要讓啊俊認可>> Cathy Hsieh: I can't help it, wanting to be recognized by outstanding people...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What about Jesse? She's rather outstanding. Cathy Hsieh: She doesn't count!;<> Cathy Hsieh: She's outstanding alright, but hardly ever serious. <> ->Why specifically Justin, though? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: He's straight forward, no courtesy nonsense.;<> Cathy Hsieh: A few encouraging words from him will mean a lot to me. <<#Simple(8)>> ->He never said anything encouraging to you before? Cathy Hsieh: He did, but that was different...;<> <<#GoTo(@給工作才是真的覺得有利害到)>> ->Assigning you work means approval? Cathy Hsieh: Yeah.;<> <<@給工作才是真的覺得有利害到>> Cathy Hsieh: Assigning me important work means he trusts my capabilities. <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Thought: This is a surprise, that she cares about it so much. ->I see that you really want to transfer to Ops. Cathy Hsieh: Not you, too!?;<> Cathy Hsieh: QQ keeps saying, no, complaining about that! Cathy Hsieh: What made you think so? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because you care about Justin's opinions a lot? Cathy Hsieh: That is right, but...;<> Cathy Hsieh: It's really not because I want to transfer to Ops. <<#GoTo(@采欣說為何要讓啊俊認可)>> ->Everything you said makes me think so. Cathy Hsieh: Ah, really...? Cathy Hsieh: But that's not what I want!;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Alright. // ->Why do you care so much about Justin's opinions, then? <<#GoTo(@采欣說為何要讓啊俊認可)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: ...;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: Um... Cathy Hsieh: ...Is it just me, or this elevator is dropping faster than usual?;<>;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->It's just you. ->It does seem faster...? ->Stop thinking about it. ->It's safe. Don't worry. <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: Hmm...;<> //突然晃動跟燈光閃爍 <> Cathy Hsieh: Ahhhhhh!;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: *Whimper* Thought: She's on the verge of tears. <<#Simple(8)>> ->It's OK, it's OK. ->We're almost there. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: *Whimper* //進入地窖區域以後 <<#End>>

title: 跟采欣前往安裝發送走廊
body:

Cathy Hsieh: Uh, Jason, please?
Cathy Hsieh: Don't tell QQ I freaked out, could you?
Cathy Hsieh: Please.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Sure.

    Cathy Hsieh: Please!
    Cathy Hsieh: He'd mock me for ages!
    <<#Simple(99999)>>

        Cathy Hsieh: Please do!
    ->Haha!
        Cathy Hsieh: Hey!!!
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Cathy Hsieh: *Sigh*
->Huh? You freaked out?
    Cathy Hsieh: Never mind.
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

//走去開車

title: 安裝發送走廊遇到賴潔喝咖啡
body:

<<#EndSimple>>

Cathy Hsieh: Hey, Jesse...

<<#EndSimple>>

title: 進操作組開始說明地窖故障調查事件
body: //主角也到說明點後 Justin Wu: Thank you for coming, Jason and Cathy. Cathy Hsieh: Y-you're welcome.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Don't mention it. // ->What's the situation now? Justin Wu:I will get to it in a bit. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Oi! Everyone's here. Let's start?;<> Paxton Luo: Aren't we waiting for Wyatt and Penelope?;<>;<>;<> Kaylee Chen: They're occupied.;<> Jesse Lai: Let's get down to business, then.;<>;<>;<> Justin Wu: But Yale—;<>;<> Jesse Lai: Forget about him! We don't have that kind of time to lose. Paxton Luo: Then you'll have to repeat everything when Yale comes in.;<> Jesse Lai: ...;<> Jesse Lai: Screw that. Let's start anyway.;<>;<> Jesse Lai: Yale's a smart boy. Doesn't need us to cover all the details.;<> //{Narrator: Computer beeps.} <>;<>;<> Kaylee Chen: One more located, Justin.;<>;<> Justin Wu: Good.;<> Thought: One more what...?;<> Justin Wu: Put everything on the screen, Kaylee. Kaylee Chen: On it.;<> <>;<> <>;<>;<> //窗戶轉成螢幕，顯示出一個結構圖有幾處標出紅點 //{Narrator: The giant window darkens and turns into a screen.} //{Narrator: On the screen is a map, with multiple red marks.} Justin Wu: Jason, Cathy, let's start from the conclusion. Justin Wu: Yesterday's incident is in fact the result of sabotage operations.;<>;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: What!?;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->And the reason being? ->Are you sure? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: Over to you, Packs.;<> Jesse Lai: Are you sure? He's gonna waste hours on bragging.;<>;<> Kaylee Chen: Agreed.;<>;<> Paxton Luo: Tsk. Leave it to the real professional.;<>;<>;<> Paxton Luo: First and foremost, who is the most professional hardware engineer in this office? 'Tis I, Packs the Great!;<> Jesse Lai: ...See?;<>;<> Thought: Justin agrees with a weak smile. Paxton Luo: Why the sneer? A good speech starts with establishing the authority.;<> Jesse Lai: Get on with it!;<> Paxton Luo: A long time ago, I noticed an unusual surge of maintenance service tickets related to power supply.;<> Paxton Luo: Malfunctions with no apparent cause. If left unattended, these problems usually go away on their own. Paxton Luo: We have been chalking it up to outdated hardware so far. Justin Wu: However, such issues have been proliferating since this April.;<>;<>;<> Justin Wu: Moreover, a pattern is showing, one zone at a time. Random malfunction doesn't explain it anymore. Paxton Luo: AHEM!;<>;<>;<> Justin Wu: Ah, sorry, it's your show...;<> Paxton Luo: Like Justin said. Every time, it starts with a cluster of issues in one specific zone. Paxton Luo: Then they spread out, plaguing the systems one zone at a time. Paxton Luo: They are mostly unremarkable issues, although the scale has been quietly escalating.;<> Paxton Luo: A wise one like me would ponder, and connect the dots. Paxton Luo: Turns out there are patterns. Cathy Hsieh: Can we identify the cause of these issues?;<>;<>;<>;<> Paxton Luo: We can pretty rule out software glitches. As to hardware... Paxton Luo: A team under my leadership examined the power supply system thoroughly.;<>;<>;<> Paxton Luo: However, the quest was fruitless.;<> Paxton Luo: As a result, we put the investigation aside. Nothing really happened. Paxton Luo: Until yesterday, that is...;<> <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Are you sure these malfunctions are connected? Jesse Lai: I don't trust a bragging fatso either, but I do agree with him in this case.;<>;<> Jesse Lai: However... <<#GoTo(@老實說就算他把他觀察到的狀況跟我說，我在事情發生前)>> ->In other words, you kind of knew this will happen? Paxton Luo: I... Jesse Lai: You want to ask why he didn't do anything in advance?;<> <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. // ->That's not what I'm trying to say. Jesse Lai: ... Jesse Lai: Anyway. <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Don't blame him. He couldn't do anything about it. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I wasn't accusing. Jesse Lai: Good to know.;<> Jesse Lai: Sorry if I sounded offensive. ->If he did anything at all, maybe yesterday's episode could have been avoided. Jesse Lai: I know, but... Paxton Luo: Don't defend me. It is my fault.;<>;<> Paxton Luo: I apologize, Jason.;<>;<> Jesse Lai: Even if you blame yourself, too, Paxton...;<>;<> Jesse Lai: I still won't say it's your fault.;<> Paxton Luo: ...Thank you. Jesse Lai: I'm just making my own informed decisions. <>;<>;<> <<#GoTo(@主角不滿胖胖應該可以多做點什麼事情結束)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<@老實說就算他把他觀察到的狀況跟我說，我在事情發生前>> Jesse Lai: Honestly, I wouldn't believe him even if you threw all the evidence in my face, until yesterday. <>;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<@主角不滿胖胖應該可以多做點什麼事情結束>> Paxton Luo: ...;<> Paxton Luo: I've been having this nagging suspicion since yesterday. So I'm coming in for another look.;<>;<> Paxton Luo: We checked all generators last time. This time I decided to trace the cables.;<> Paxton Luo: And I found this.;<> //胖胖拿出一個黃色的方型裝置 Cathy Hsieh: What's this?;<> Thought: I've seen something like this in the army... Paxton Luo: I've never seen it before. Asked around, no result. Thought: It's a disruptor that damages electronic devices by creating power surges.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->It's a disruptor, for electronic devices. <>;<>;<>;<> Paxton Luo: How did you know?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->That is irrelevant. Paxton Luo: Ugh, oh...;<> Paxton Luo: A-anyway... ->Seen it in the army. Paxton Luo: Ha, I didn't know you served in the army.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Paxton Luo: ...You are correct.;<>;<>;<> ->... <> <<#EndSimple>> Paxton Luo: I did a full analysis. This thing creates power surges to disrupt electronic devices. Paxton Luo: We were focusing on key nodes of the power supply system, but overlooked the cables connecting everything together. Cathy Hsieh: That proves the theory of sabotage...;<>;<> <>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Do we have any suspect? Paxton Luo: ...Not yet. <<@說不知道到底誰要這樣亂搞地窖哩>> Justin Wu: It doesn't make sense. Why would anyone bother? Justin Wu: Vision's competitors have better targets than outdated wrecks like Silencio. ->Can we find a possible motive? Justin Wu: No clue. <<#GoTo(@說不知道到底誰要這樣亂搞地窖哩)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: Packs informed me, then I summoned you guys immediately.;<>;<> Justin Wu: We must take care of these disruptors before something happens again. <> //楊冶平走過來，一邊看著螢幕 Yale Yang: ...The hell?;<>;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: Yale?;<>;<> Yale Yang: So you're saying... Yale Yang: The incident yesterday was in fact the result of sabotage? Justin Wu: That's the theory for now.;<> Yale Yang: Mr. Hsu had some kind of emergency, so he called me in to cover...;<> Yale Yang: Who could have thought...;<>;<> Justin Wu: As we know, yesterday's malfunction was Cellar-wide.;<>;<> Justin Wu: That means we have these disruptors all over the place.;<>;<> Yale Yang: Installing them all over the Cellar...? Justin Wu: We may be dealing with not just one person, but a group.;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->It does seem so. // ->Or one person, doing it over a long time. Paxton Luo: Um...;<>;<> Justin Wu: Any reason you'd suspect that, Jason?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You said it started a long time ago. ->It happens one zone at a time, doesn't it? Justin Wu: ...;<> Jesse Lai: ...;<>;<> Jesse Lai: I think he's got a good point.;<> Justin Wu: Agreed. Justin Wu: It would indeed take a long time to install disruptors one zone at a time...;<> Paxton Luo: Are we really dealing with one single person?;<> ->They'd be caught by now if there's a whole group of them. Justin Wu: Yes. But on the other hand, covering the entire Cellar with one person is unrealistic.;<>;<> <<#EndSimple>> <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yale Yang: I understand all that. Now, what did you call us here for?;<>;<> Justin Wu: We need people for some legwork, literally. Cathy Hsieh: Legwork?;<>;<> Justin Wu: Right. We have disruptors all over the place, right?;<> Justin Wu: They are armed with remote control modules. However, probably to prevent backtracing...;<> Justin Wu: ...They're interconnected with multinodal cellular networks encrypted end to end.;<> Thought: Multi what...?;<> Yale Yang: Makes sense.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Um, English, please? ->I'm not making any sense out of it. Jesse Lai: Oh, right, we have a layperson among us. //大家看向主角 <>;<>;<>;<> <<#Simple(10)>> ->Got a problem? ->Stop office bullying. ->Well, sorry for disappointing. Jesse Lai: Haha!;<> Paxton Luo: Heh.;<>;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: Hey, Jason has his own unique skill set!;<> Thought: These people...;<>;<>;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: Ahem! Justin Wu: Simply put, it's impossible to backtrace the control signal with this sample we have. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: However, if we collect at least three of them, we may locate the signal source by cross reference and inference.;<> Paxton Luo: Meaning solving the "who did it" part!;<> Cathy Hsieh: Wait. You mean, we only need three samples?;<>;<> Justin Wu: Correct. Is something wrong? Cathy Hsieh: Do we...really need all of us running around to retrieve them?;<> Justin Wu: We do, and there's a good reason.;<>;<>;<> Justin Wu: The culprit might be alerted when Packs disarmed this one here. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->"Might be"? Justin Wu: Right. Depends on whether they're monitoring the disruptor network.;<> Paxton Luo: Or they might have already made a run for it, leaving these disruptors behind.;<>;<>;<> Paxton Luo: But I admit, that is unlikely.;<> <>;<>;<> ->How could they be alerted? Justin Wu: If they can remote control disruptors, naturally, they can see their working status. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: It doesn't take a genius to connect the dots. Maybe they're already busy taking down disruptors to cover their trace. Cathy Hsieh: That means...;<> Yale Yang: Means we must race against them before all disruptors are gone.;<> Justin Wu: Correct. Justin Wu: That is why we need as many people as possible. Sorry for ruining your day off.;<> Yale Yang: I'm not having a day off, though. I've been servicing the racking system on Station 4.;<>;<>;<> Yale Yang: Is there any reason why you need me here? Justin Wu: ...;<>;<>;<> Thought: Jesse cast Justin a nervous glance. What's the deal?;<> Justin Wu: Having a racker on the team would be very helpful. Justin Wu: If our locating model works correctly, many disruptors are deployed in places accessible only to rackers.;<>;<> Yale Yang: Are you indicating...;<> Justin Wu: Yes. We believe there's a high chance that the culprit is a racker.;<> Yale Yang: No way!;<>;<>;<>;<> Yale Yang: We are working our asses off to keep the Cellar running. Why would we want to shoot ourselves in the foot?;<> Yale Yang: ...;<> Justin Wu: It's only a possibility.;<>;<> Thought: Yale is visibly shaken by the mere idea...;<> Justin Wu: Cathy. You're from Screening. With special permits from Ops, you'll have better reach and coverage than any of us.;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: That's the only reason you called me...?;<> Justin Wu: Yes. Why? Cathy Hsieh: N-nothing...;<> Thought: Cathy looks hurt. Yale Yang: One question. How did you locate these disruptors, if they're backtracing-proof?;<> Jesse Lai: Good question!;<>;<>;<> Jesse Lai: All thanks to my genius prediction model! Jesse Lai: I built an inference and prediction model based on what we know.;<>;<> Jesse Lai: First, provide it with all malfunction logs from before...;<> Paxton Luo: Collected and compiled by me.;<> Jesse Lai: Then we have a list of potential disruptor locations!;<> Thought: Ah, that's what they meant by "one more".;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Potential location? You mean, we may find nothing there? Justin Wu: No. We are prioritizing sites with 100% probability. Paxton Luo: Considering it's Jesse's model, 100% probability probably doesn't mean much.;<> Jesse Lai: Shut up. <> ->How many locations do we have now? Justin Wu: 13 so far. Out of these, only two are 100% hits. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: 100% means there is definitely a disruptor at the location. Paxton Luo: The model is faulty. It just made a mistake not too long ago.;<>;<>;<>;<> Paxton Luo: Didn't it say there's an active disruptor right in this office? Well, do you see any?;<> Jesse Lai: Be realistic. All predictive models have exceptions.;<>;<> Yale Yang: Shall we start now, Yale?;<> Thought: Yale looks like he's ready to kill somebody.;<> Yale Yang: Can't wait to catch that bastard.;<> Justin Wu: Patience. I intend to keep you for racker-only locations.;<>;<> Justin Wu: Now we have two targets, both accessible to Jason and Cathy. Justin Wu: Packs is busy finding a proper destination for you.;<>;<> Yale Yang: ...Hurry up, Packs.;<>;<>;<> Paxton Luo: I'm working on it!;//緊張推眼鏡;<>;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: Maybe I can stay here and help you guys?;<>;<> Justin Wu: Huh? Why?;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: Uh, because...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->We need more people in the field. Justin Wu: Indeed. ->Cathy will do more good in the office than the field.;<> Justin Wu: Now that you've mentioned it... Justin Wu: Hmm...;<>;<>;<> Jesse Lai: I could use some help here. Justin Wu: Good. Cathy, please help Jesse out.;<> Cathy Hsieh: Y-yessir!;<>;<> <<#GoTo(@跳過說還是要讓采欣去找干擾器)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: Retrieving disruptors is the top priority. Please work with Jason and Yale. Cathy Hsieh: You're right...;<> Cathy Hsieh: OK, forget what I just said. Haha... <<@跳過說還是要讓采欣去找干擾器>> Justin Wu: Good. Let's begin.;<>;<> Justin Wu: Kaylee, what's Jason's destination?;<>;<>;<> Kaylee Chen: Cellar entrance, right by the elevator going up.;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I just came from there. Paxton Luo: He's right. Damn, I hate backtracking... ->That's like, in plain sight? Paxton Luo: In plain sight, but least expected. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> Yale Yang: Wait. You said the elevator!?;<>;<>;<> Yale Yang: Are you sure?;<> Thought: What's with the urgency? Kaylee Chen: Yes, if Jesse's predictive model is working as it's supposed to.;<> Jesse Lai: It's working fabulously!;<>;<>;<> Justin Wu: That settles it.;<>;<> Justin Wu: Jason, check the entrance elevator and retrieve any disruptor there.;<>;<> Justin Wu: Call in when it's done. We will send you the next location.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Roger. // ->Hold on. How am I supposed to take it down? Justin Wu: It's straightforward enough. Call me when you find it. I'll talk you through it. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> Paxton Luo: The taking down part could take some time.;<>;<>;<> Paxton Luo: I spent like a quarter hour on the first one.;<> Yale Yang: ...I'll go with Jason.;<>;<> Justin Wu: But you're reserved for racker-only locations.;<> Yale Yang: I can make a quick trip while Packs works on it. Justin Wu: Yes, although... Yale Yang: I can help Jason take it off. I know what I'm doing.;<>;<> Yale Yang: A live demonstration will be good for him, too. Jesse Lai: That's not like you, Yale.;<>;<>;<> Yale Yang: What?;<> Jesse Lai: Actually thinking things through before diving into action. Very un-Yale.;<>;<>;<> Yale Yang: Hey, this is not the best time for that...;<>;<> Jesse Lai: I was only trying to say you're weird today.;//聳肩;<>;<> Yale Yang: Do you agree, Justin? I'll go with Jason if yes.;<>;<> Justin Wu: ...;<> Justin Wu: Yes, please go with him.;<> //if沒讓采欣留下來。 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=false)>> Justin Wu: Cathy, I don't have a location for you yet. Justin Wu: Please wait here for a bit. Cathy Hsieh: OK. <<#EndIf>> <> Justin Wu: You two, get moving now. The next location will come soon.;<> Yale Yang: Yessir. Let's go, Jason.;<>;<>;<> Thought: Why is he in such a hurry?;<> <> //兩人離開 //如果是采欣留下路線，她會做到一台電腦前 <<#End>>

title: 車子到站以後
body:
Yale Yang: Wait for me here.
Thought: Huh?
Yale Yang: I'm taking down the disruptor. Be right back.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站看外)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Sure.
    Yale Yang: Yeah.
    <<#End>>
->Why?
->No.
    Yale Yang: Come on. Just a disruptor. Doesn't take both of us to take it down.
    Yale Yang: I work faster by myself.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Okay.
        Yale Yang: Yeah.
        <<#End>>
    ->Didn't you say I need a live demonstration?
        Yale Yang: Maybe next time. I can handle this one.
        Yale Yang: It's faster that way. Trust me.
        <<#GoTo(@小楊要衝下車不管主角)>>
    ->Let me help. I won't get in your way.
        Yale Yang: No.
        <<@小楊要衝下車不管主角>>
        Thought: ...Why is he trying so hard to keep me here?
        Yale Yang: I'll handle it alone.
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Okay.
            Yale Yang: Thank you.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站看外返回)>>
            <<#End>>
        ->What's wrong with you?
        ->Something wrong, Yale?
            Yale Yang: ...
            Yale Yang: Please just wait here, Jason.
            Yale Yang: I will take care of this myself.
            Yale Yang: Please.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站看外返回)>>
            Thought: What's wrong with him...?
            <<#End>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Yale Yang: Be right back.
    <<#End>>
<<#EndSimple>>
//可以按e下車
