<<#End>>

title: 跟采欣搭地窖電梯回去
body: Cathy Hsieh: ... Cathy Hsieh: ...;<> Cathy Hsieh: The elevator feels safer now that maintenance bots are gone.;<> Cathy Hsieh: I hope it won't shake now. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Don't set expectations too high. Cathy Hsieh: Don't say that! Now I'm nervous again... ->Right. Relax. Cathy Hsieh: Yes! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: But it's still moving faster than usual.;<> <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Is it? You're just too nervous. Cathy Hsieh: I mean, really! ->It is faster. Cathy Hsieh: See? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: I guess they cranked the speed up.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah, a bit weird. // ->Can they crank up and down elevator speed at will? Cathy Hsieh: Not at will. Maybe they did something during this round of maintenance.;<> Cathy Hsieh: This elevator is slow. It takes forever to go up or down. Thought: Totally agreed.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: ...;<> Cathy Hsieh: ...;<> //if 沒發現 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=false&&$DidGetOffTheCar=false)>> Cathy Hsieh: Hey, Jason.;<> Cathy Hsieh: Do you know what's wrong with Yale...?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I guess it's just stress? Cathy Hsieh: He's stressed every day. Cathy Hsieh: But today he seems different.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Especially stressed today, then. Cathy Hsieh: Maybe. Haha... ->What do you think? Cathy Hsieh: I feel he's worried about something. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->I feel he's trying to hide something. Cathy Hsieh: Me, too! Cathy Hsieh: He seems to be worried about something.;<> ->Actually, I don't think there's anything wrong. Cathy Hsieh: Don't you? Cathy Hsieh: Maybe it's just me reading too much into it!;<> <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#Wait(2)>> Cathy Hsieh: We're almost there.;<> Cathy Hsieh: Told you the elevator's faster now!;<> Cathy Hsieh: So, see you later?;<> Cathy Hsieh: Bye. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> //if 發現 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=true||$DidGetOffTheCar=true)>> Cathy Hsieh: ... Cathy Hsieh: ...;<> Cathy Hsieh: Do you think Yale is OK?;<> //if當初採欣問小樣怎樣選沒什麼 <<#If($DidSiadToTsaiYenNothing=true)>> Cathy Hsieh: He said he is, but... <<#EndIf>> Cathy Hsieh: He must be sad, after Mr. Hsu... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He's a grown man. He can deal with it. Cathy Hsieh: But... ->He will ask if he needs help. Cathy Hsieh: Hopefully... ->We need to check on him more often. Cathy Hsieh: You're right! <<#EndSimple>> Thought: He needs to talk with somebody, if not a therapist. Cathy Hsieh: We all know that he idolizes Mr. Hsu. What happened could have destroyed his world.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why do you care so much? Cathy Hsieh: ...;<> Cathy Hsieh: Maybe because we have too much in common. Cathy Hsieh: We both idolize someone and strive to earn their approval...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->In your case, Justin? Cathy Hsieh: ...Yeah. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why him? // ->Poor Wayne. Cathy Hsieh: It's not like that! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: I'm not like Yale. I don't have personal feelings involved.;<> Cathy Hsieh: I just want to earn the recognition of an outstanding engineer. Cathy Hsieh: ...Or so I believe.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Don't build your confidence on other people's recognition. Cathy Hsieh: But I can't live on self-recognition...;<> Cathy Hsieh: Or else I'd end up like QQ. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Haha! Cathy Hsieh: Haha! ->Have a little of both. Cathy Hsieh: Right. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Sometimes I feel like that, too. Cathy Hsieh: Really!?;<> Cathy Hsieh: But you look like... <<#Simple(6)>> ->Like what? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: Like the composed type?;<> Cathy Hsieh: Someone not easily swayed. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I'll take that as a compliment. Thank you. Cathy Hsieh: Haha! ->People do say that sometimes. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Who is yours? Cathy Hsieh: N-never mind. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Well, life goes on. Cathy Hsieh: Haha, it does...;<> ->... <> <<#EndSimple>> //if有幫助采欣留下來 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=true)>> Cathy Hsieh: Oh! Thank you for vouching for me back there. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Did I? Cathy Hsieh: Yes. You convinced Justin to let me stay. ->Nah, don't mention it. Cathy Hsieh: I owe you a big thank you! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Cathy Hsieh: I guess Justin would have sent me on fetch quests if not for you.;<> Cathy Hsieh: I really don't want to be an errand girl... Cathy Hsieh: My skills are more helpful in the office! Like, I found out who installed those disruptors.;<> //if主角有下車 <<#If($DidGetOffTheCar=true)>> Cathy Hsieh: But you did, too, in your own way. <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> Cathy Hsieh: ... Cathy Hsieh: It's quite an eventful day...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Lots of shuttle rides. Cathy Hsieh: And elevator rides, too. <<#Simple(8)>> ->True. Haha. ->*Sigh* ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->I could use a break. Cathy Hsieh: Same here... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#Wait(2)>> Cathy Hsieh: Hey, we're almost there!;<> Cathy Hsieh: Told you the elevator's faster now!;<> Cathy Hsieh: So, see you later?;<> Cathy Hsieh: Bye. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>>

title: 跟莊詩妍搭電梯去找徐媛
body:
//兩人進入電梯後
Shea Zhuang: ...
Shea Zhuang: ...;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看)>>
//if篩選路線且有跟莊小姐對話過
<<#If($InspectWhoTakeLiau=0)>>
   Shea Zhuang: Mr. Dai. About the information we talked about last time...?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I said I'll be the judge of that. ($ToldYenIWillJudgeByMySelf);//有選這句才出現
        Shea Zhuang: ...And your judgment is?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->That agent probably serves Jordan Li. ($ChuNameRemember)
            <<@告訴莊詩妍情報讓她歡喜>>
            Shea Zhuang: Really!?;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看開心)>>
            Shea Zhuang: That is...
            Shea Zhuang: That could be extremely helpful to my boss!
            Thought: She's genuinely happy about it.
            <<#Simple(8)>>
            ->Great.
                Shea Zhuang: Yes, great. Thank you!
            ->Not necessarily.
                Shea Zhuang: Ah...
                Shea Zhuang: I'll see what my boss makes of it.
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple>>
            Shea Zhuang: Anyway, that seals our deal!;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看開心返回)>>
            <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看返回)>>
        ->Not now.
            Shea Zhuang: ...I see.
            <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看返回)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->That agent probably serves Jordan Li. ($ChuNameRemember);//有選答應會說這句才出現
        <<#GoTo(@告訴莊詩妍情報讓她歡喜)>>
    ->Sorry, we haven't found out anything new yet.
    ->Not now.
        Shea Zhuang: ...I see.
        <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看返回)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>
Shea Zhuang: ...
Shea Zhuang: ...;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->What kind of person would you say your boss is?;<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看)>>
    Shea Zhuang: ...
    Thought: She doesn't want to answer?
    Shea Zhuang: A good chess player.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看)>>
    Thought: That was unexpected.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->What do you mean?
        Shea Zhuang: She always sees five steps into the future and prepares for everything.
        Shea Zhuang: She's abnormally seasoned for her age.
    ->I thought you'd call her terrifying.
        Shea Zhuang: She can be harsh sometimes, but never terrifying.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Thought: I see that she has her own cult of personality...;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看返回)>>;<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看返回)>>
->What do you think your boss wants me for?;<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看)>>
    Shea Zhuang: I should not make assumptions.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Why? Just a harmless guess.
        Shea Zhuang:  She said we are paid to get things done, not to have speculative opinions.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看)>>
        Shea Zhuang: I have no opinion unless she asks for it.
        Shea Zhuang: Speculations undermine leadership.
        Shea Zhuang: So she said.;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看返回)>>
        Thought: ...I can visualize her saying that.
    ->Okay.
    ->...
    <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看返回)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Shea Zhuang: We have arrived.
<<#End>>
//兩人出電梯
//莊詩妍走向徐媛。

title: 跟徐媛首次交換情報
body: //徐媛正翹著二郎腿看資料之類的 //看要不要加罵飲料騙人仔跟幫詩妍說話 Shea Zhuang: He's here, ma'am. Yuna Hsu: Good. You're dismissed. Shea Zhuang: Yes, ma'am.;<> <> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: Have a seat. //主角淡入淡出 <> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: Any progress?;<> <<@回到徐媛問主角有沒有啥進展壓欸啊>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->First, something about your agents. ($BePlayedSoBoughtDrink) <> Yuna Hsu: Oh? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->One of them tricked me into buying her soda. ->One of them is drinking soda on duty. //if有完成陸石崇任務縣 <<#If($ToldLuYouGotPrank=true)>> Yuna Hsu: I know about her. Sean told me.;<> Yuna Hsu: Punishment has been administered. <<#EndIf>> //if沒有完成陸石崇任務縣 <<#If($ToldLuYouGotPrank=false)>> Yuna Hsu: Soda? I know who it is then. Yuna Hsu: Punishment will be administered.;<> <<#EndIf>> Thought: Yeah, she deserves it. Yuna Hsu: Her behavior is very unprofessional.;<> Yuna Hsu: For that, I apologize. Thought: She's surprisingly reasonable.;<> Yuna Hsu: Now tell me what you know. <<#GoTo(@回到徐媛問主角有沒有啥進展壓欸啊)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Why do you think I should have any progress? Yuna Hsu: It's been a while since we last talked.;<> Yuna Hsu: Don't tell me you did nothing this whole time? Thought: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: What have you found?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->OK. I do have some progress. ($KnowTruthControlDepartment);//有解開操作支線才進來 ->OK. I do have some progress. ($KnowTruthSelectDepartment);//有解開篩選支線才進來 Yuna Hsu: Please share.;<> <<#GoTo(@回答徐媛自己發現啥了耶呀)>> ->Sorry to disappoint. ->I don't have anything to share. <> <<#GoTo(@不得不說，這回答挺讓人失望的。)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Sort of. ($KnowTruthControlDepartment);//有解開操作支線才進來 ->Sort of. ($KnowTruthSelectDepartment);//有解開篩選支線才進來 Yuna Hsu: Please share. <> <<@回答徐媛自己發現啥了耶呀>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Some directors of the board are pulling strings, trying to keep Silencio running. ($MCBelongSelectDepartment);//篩選組路線才有 ->Some directors of the board are pulling strings, trying to shut Silencio down. ($MCBelongControlDepartment);//操作組路線才有 <<@有真的告訴徐媛情報>> <> Yuna Hsu: Oh? Yuna Hsu: Are you sure? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I am. ->Believe it or not. <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: I knew there are factions regarding the fate of Silencio, but directors shouldn't be personally involved. Yuna Hsu: This is breaking the equilibrium.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Now your turn. Yuna Hsu: OK. ->How does that information help you? Yuna Hsu: To get the dirt on board directors?;<> Yuna Hsu: It's more helpful than you think. Yuna Hsu: Of course, I could always use a little more intel.;<> Thought: ... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: Now let's see what I can share with you. ->The board of directors will soon call a meeting to decide the fate of Silencio. Yuna Hsu: ... Thought: Gah, that cold stare... Yuna Hsu: Are you kidding me?;<> Yuna Hsu: It took you this long to find out what every single soul at this farm already knows? Thought: Busted...;<> Yuna Hsu: Consider this a warning. Stop wasting time, yours as well as mine.;<> Yuna Hsu: Do you have anything valuable or not?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Some directors are pulling strings to manipulate the fate of Silencio. <<#GoTo(@有真的告訴徐媛情報)>> ->OK. I don't. Yuna Hsu: ... <<#GoTo(@不得不說，這回答挺讓人失望的。)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->You first. Tell me something I don't know. ($DLStateFloat);//選過消失 <> Yuna Hsu: Learned to bargain, huh. I see. Yuna Hsu: I do have something for you, but not before I'm satisfied. <<#Simple(6)>> ->You first. I insist. Yuna Hsu: Heh.;<> Yuna Hsu: Think before you insist. Yuna Hsu: You don't have any leverage in this negotiation.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Thought: ... <<#GoTo(@回答徐媛自己發現啥了耶呀)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->No progress. <<@不得不說，這回答挺讓人失望的。>> Yuna Hsu: How disappointing.;<> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: I will give you some clues, then. Yuna Hsu: Hopefully that will make you more useful.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: As far as I know, certain directors of the board care a lot about Silencio.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I know that. Yuna Hsu: You know nothing. ->So? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: Nobody ever cared so much about Silencio. Something is very wrong.;<> Yuna Hsu: I've considered every single possibility. Cash flow, business strategies, land value, patents, so on and so forth. Yuna Hsu: Silencio is more of a liability than an asset in every sense. So, why such attention? Why now?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why? Thought: Did she just shrug? I can't quite tell... ->Because it's cranking up juicing power to a lethal level? Yuna Hsu: What?;<> Thought: I told her too much. She could have inferred the rest.;<> Yuna Hsu: You're saying they're trying to increase profit at the cost of lives? Yuna Hsu: Oddly specific for a speculation...;<> Thought: Damn... Yuna Hsu: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: We are talking about a death toll potentially in hundreds of thousands. Yuna Hsu: No profit could justify such risk. Thought: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: So, what is really going on?;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: I have no idea yet. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Is that supposed to be helpful? ->That's it? //if沒提供情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=-1)>> Yuna Hsu: Surely better than nothing, no? Yuna Hsu: Especially, better than you did. <<#EndIf>> //if有提供情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=0)>> Yuna Hsu: Patience. I'm coming to it. <<#EndIf>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: I believe the key is not with Silencio itself. Yuna Hsu: We should examine external factors. <<#Simple(8)>> ->That's way too vague. ->Enough riddles. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: Let's just say, whether Silencio goes or stays, profitability is not a factor of consideration.;<> Yuna Hsu: All directors agree on one thing, that Silencio doesn't make any real profit.;<> Yuna Hsu: The reason to keep it is for political leverage. This farm addresses the unemployment issue for the government. Yuna Hsu: As to why it should go, it's rather self-explanatory. High upkeep and zero profit.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Political leverage? Yuna Hsu: The rise of AI has robbed many of their jobs. Flop farming addresses the issue of skyrocketing unemployment.;<> Yuna Hsu: You have seen what's going on in the Cellar. You know what I mean. Yuna Hsu: In that sense, we are doing the government a huge favor. Vision could benefit from that.;<> ->Zero profit? Yuna Hsu: Let's face the fact. Silencio's revenue has been steadily sliding.;<> Yuna Hsu: This farm is so old that it's a joke. Updating it with modern hardware costs more than building a new farm. <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: Things have been like this for a long time.;<> Yuna Hsu: The two factions were relatively at peace, until now. They must have been provoked by something. Yuna Hsu: The only thing I can think of is that Vision must have discovered a new way to generate exponentially more flops.;<> Thought: ...She's reaching the same conclusion as Fran and Situ did. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Are you sure about that? Yuna Hsu: 90% positive.;<> Thought: In other words, not quite sure. ->What does that have to do with Silencio? Yuna Hsu: ...Can't you put two and two together?;<> Yuna Hsu: Silencio is completely redundant if they have a new way to massively increase flops output. Yuna Hsu: With such peace of mind, one faction will take immediate action to shut it down. Then the other will fight back.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: In a sense, the fight over Silencio represents the future of Vision Corp. Yuna Hsu: Path One, befriend the government and wrestle Sunrise for more political power.;<> Yuna Hsu: Path Two, dominate the flop farming business with powerful technology. Yuna Hsu: As the board, they do planning on a macro level.;<> Yuna Hsu: I don't expect you to understand. Just take it as a fact. Thought: This is far beyond me indeed... Yuna Hsu: One thing I'm 100% sure of is that there will be a clash of factions very soon. //IF有提供操作組情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=0&&$MCBelongControlDepartment=0)>> Yuna Hsu: Based on what you found out, the pro-closure faction is already in motion. <<#EndIf>> //IF有提供篩選組情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=0&&$MCBelongSelectDepartment=0)>> Yuna Hsu: Based on what you found out, the against-closure faction is already in motion. <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->But how is your information supposed to help me? Yuna Hsu: ... ->I think I get the idea. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: I hope you understand how dire the situation is. Yuna Hsu: Because considering everything we know so far... Yuna Hsu: Frances must have touched a nerve.;<> Yuna Hsu: She's onto something that both factions want to keep confidential.;<> Yuna Hsu: In other words, she's in more danger than you can imagine. Thought: She's not bluffing. Yuna Hsu: We both need more intel, Jason Dai.;<>;<> Yuna Hsu: Or better still, hard evidence. Yuna Hsu: Directors can't openly break the rules they made. That is the bottom line.;<> //IF有提供操作組情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=0&&$MCBelongControlDepartment=0)>> Yuna Hsu: You said some directors are directly meddling, to shut this farm down. <<#EndIf>> //IF有提供篩選組情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=0&&$MCBelongSelectDepartment=0)>> Yuna Hsu: You said some directors are directly meddling, to keep this farm going. <<#EndIf>> Yuna Hsu: They must have puppets to carry out their plans in the dark. Yuna Hsu: Your next mission is to find out who these puppets are.;<> //IF有解開操作組支線 <<#If($KnowTruthControlDepartment=0)>> Thought: I already know it. Liam Hsu and Kevin Hu...;//姐所路線動畫 <<#EndIf>> //IF有解開篩選組支線 <<#If($KnowTruthSelectDepartment=0)>> Thought: I already know it. George Liao...;//姐所路線動畫 <<#EndIf>> <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->And why should I help you? ->What's in it for me? // ->What if I told you I already know? ($KnowTruthSelectDepartment);<> ->What if I told you I already know? ($KnowTruthControlDepartment);<> Yuna Hsu: Oh? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: Consider me owe you one if you manage to identify any puppet of the directors. Yuna Hsu: This favor will be returned when you're in need.;<> <> //IF剛剛說已經找到了，且其實找到了(操作組版) <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=0&&$DLStateFloat=1)>> Yuna Hsu: If you think you know... Yuna Hsu: Give me a name. <<#EndIf>> //IF剛剛說已經找到了，且其實找到了(篩選組版) <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=0&&$DLStateFloat=1)>> Yuna Hsu: If you think you know... Yuna Hsu: Give me a name. <<#EndIf>> //IF剛剛沒說已經找到了，且其實找到了(操作組版) <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=0&&$DLStateFloat=0)>> <<#GoTo(@徐媛主動問主角是不是其實找到了)>> <<#EndIf>> //IF剛剛沒說已經找到了，且其實找到了(篩選組) <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=0&&$DLStateFloat=0)>> <<@徐媛主動問主角是不是其實找到了>> Yuna Hsu: Or, do you already have a lead? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I know who it is. <> //if剛剛沒給情報。 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=-1)>> Yuna Hsu: I'm not convinced. Yuna Hsu: Especially when you just proved yourself incompetent. <<#Simple(10)>> ->Of course I wouldn't play my trump card right away. ->I mean it. For real. ->Whatever. Suit yourself. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: Give me a name, then. ->No progress. Yuna Hsu: Figured. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //IF有解開操作組支線，且有說要講 <<#If($DLStateFloat=1&&$KnowTruthControlDepartment=0)>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Kevin Hu is working for directors in favor of farm closure.;<> Yuna Hsu: The division lead of Ops?;<> Yuna Hsu: A man like him... Yuna Hsu: Huh, it does make sense.;<> ->Liam Hsu is working for directors in favor of farm closure.;<> Yuna Hsu: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: Liam Hsu is not on my list. Yuna Hsu: I will investigate him soon enough.;<> ->Kevin Hu and Liam Hsu are working for directors in favor of farm closure.;<> Yuna Hsu: The division lead of Ops? Yuna Hsu: A man like him...;<> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: Liam Hsu is not on my list. Yuna Hsu: I will investigate him soon enough.;<> ->It's not time to show my hand yet. Yuna Hsu: I call your bluff. Yuna Hsu: Do you have any card to play at all? <<#Simple(8)>> ->Believe it or not. ->Maybe I do. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: This deal stays open. Come back when you make up your mind. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //IF有解開篩選組支線，且有說要講 <<#If($DLStateFloat=1&&$KnowTruthSelectDepartment=0)>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->George Liao of Screening is working for directors against farm closure.;<> Yuna Hsu: I remember him. Shea did a background check on him. Yuna Hsu: If it's him...;<> Thought: Did I give her new ideas...? Yuna Hsu: Good. I see.;<> ->It's not time to show my hand yet. Yuna Hsu: I call your bluff. Yuna Hsu: Do you have any card to play at all? <<#Simple(8)>> ->Believe it or not. ->Maybe I do. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: This deal stays open. Come back when you make up your mind. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //if告訴徐媛誰幫董事會做事了 <<#If($DLStateFloat=2)>> <> <> <> Yuna Hsu: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: Jason Dai, I don't think you're stupid enough to deceive me. Yuna Hsu: Still, a friendly reminder is due. If you lied, you will pay. Yuna Hsu: But for now, I owe you one.;<> Yuna Hsu: Let me know when you're in need. Thought: I could really use her help someday... <<#EndIf>> //發出逼逼音效，徐媛看了一下投影手表 Yuna Hsu: That wraps it up.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->We're making a good start. //IF有情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel>-1)>> Thought: She smiled. Yuna Hsu: I think so, too. <<#EndIf>> //IF沒情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=-1)>> Yuna Hsu: For you, maybe. I'm not getting anything useful yet. <<#EndIf>> ->Shea Zhuang is a good subordinate. ($InspectWhoTakeLiau);//有走莊詩妍路線才有 <> Yuna Hsu: Why bring her up? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Just sharing a piece of my mind. ->Because of how she idolizes you. <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: I know that. Thought: I can't quite tell if she's smiling. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: Time for you to go.;<> Yuna Hsu: Don't stay. We can't afford to attract attention. Nin Situ(c): Jason, we are getting results. Nin Situ(c): Come back to the van. <> Yuna Hsu: Go. Yuna Hsu: I need to prepare for my next appointment. Yuna Hsu: I'll be in touch. //徐媛淡入淡出開始離開 <<#Simple(3)>> ->What exactly do you want out of this? Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: I want more power. Yuna Hsu: To get power, I need information. Yuna Hsu: You want to settle the score for Frances. Yuna Hsu: For that, you need information, too. Yuna Hsu: Our interests are aligned. That is all you need to know. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: Bye, Jason Dai. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> //主角淡入淡出 <<#Wait(0.5)>> Thought: Time to go to the van. Thought: Maybe this is the end of it... <<#End>>

title: 回車上聽地窖數據結果2
body: Nin Situ: 23?;<>;<> 23(c): ...No. <<#Simple(8)>> ->No what? ->No result yet? ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): No evidence that they're increasing the power of flop generation. Frances Cheng: Nothing at all?;<>;<> 23(c): Nothing at all. Everything fits perfectly together, above or below the counter. Nin Situ: Are you sure?;<> 23(c): I'm 100% positive. Nin Situ: ...;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: What? How could it be?;<> Nin Situ: Show me the files, 23.;<> 23(c): I cross-referenced every single line. There is nothing. Nin Situ: Show me the files, all the same.;<> 23(c): Are you suggesting I overlooked? Nin Situ: I just want to confirm.;<> 23(c): Normally you wouldn't ask. Nin Situ: This is too important to afford any oversight, 23.;<>;<> 23(c): *Sigh* I know. Sorry. It's just... 23(c): ... 23(c): Files sent over.;<>;<>;<> <> //司徒用顯示器看了一下，程芳也一起看 Frances Cheng: They do seem right. Nin Situ: Yeah.;<> Lawrence Chang: What now? Admit we made a big mistake? Lawrence Chang: It can't be. Both Auntie and Frances have proven Vision is selling more flops than it could generate...;<> <> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Maybe they discovered some kind of new technology? Lawrence Chang: And kept it secret? Frances Cheng: Impossible. Ms. Yeh's data shows all those extra flops are from Vision itself.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Maybe they tampered with the record of sourcing?;<> Frances Cheng: That...;<> 23(c): That is a legit possibility, based on what we have. 23(c): However... <> ->Or maybe there is some kind of secret technology hidden in Silencio? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: This is too drastic to keep a technology secret.;<> Frances Cheng: If they did tamper with sourcing records, it can't be for proprietary technology... Nin Situ: They're covering up evidence of crime. Frances Cheng: I'm still in favor of our original theory.;<>;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: I still believe this data from the Cellar has been tampered with.;<> 23(c): Impossible. This is raw data, retrieved right from the Cellar.;<> 23(c): If this is tampered with, it means the Ops Division has never seen the actual data. 23(c): That, in turn, means Ops never managed the Cellar. The Cellar runs itself. They just play along.;<> 23(c): Do you seriously believe that? Frances Cheng: I do. You have no idea what Vision is capable of.;<>;<>;<> 23(c): That is absur— 23(c): ... 23(c): I call it one big hoax, or money laundering scheme.;<> Nin Situ: 23...;<> 23(c): Listen to me, Nin, please. 23(c): We must start over and be practical. It's very likely that our so-called "additional flops" do not exist. Nin Situ: Unlikely. Vision provides flops for many clients. If they don't supply enough, people will find out.;<> 23(c): It is possible. You are aware there's an arms race of flops going on among small and medium enterprises, right?;<> 23(c): They're hoarding up flop contracts like there's no tomorrow. The idea is whoever stops first is out of the game.;<> 23(c): They can't really use up all those flops they paid for. What if— Nin Situ: Sunrise is one of Vision's clients, not to mention Growell and Datum. Are you suggesting they're blind, too? 23(c): Or… Or maybe they're all in this together. There's a gigantic conspiracy—;<> Nin Situ: Vision does not want anyone to see this data. You know how hard they tried.;<>;<> Nin Situ: This isn't some ridiculously sophisticated misdirection campaign. 23(c): Then maybe— Nin Situ: Enough, 23.;<> 23(c): ...;<> Nin Situ: To verify data from the Cellar, we have two options. One, hack into the Flop Core. Nin Situ: Two, retrieve data from other farms with abnormal flops output. 23(c): Other farms? We don't have that kind of time or resources. Nin Situ: Yes. The Flop Core is the only viable option.;<> 23(c): Don't tell me you want to— Nin Situ: I know you hate it. 23(c): ...I hate it? Are you suggesting I am the problem?;<> 23(c): You should hate it too. Infiltrating the Flop Core is a felony. Nin Situ: ... Nin Situ: Your choice, 23.;<> Nin Situ: I won't drag you into something you don't agree with. 23(c): This is so wrong in so many ways... <> Nin Situ: I know. I've made my choice.;<> Nin Situ: Your turn.;<> <> <<#End>> //尷尬的一段等待，張隆生成芳跟士傑面面相覷

title: 回車上聽地窖數據結果3
body: 23(c): ... 23(c): OK. Let's take the Flop Core.;<> Thought: Situ looks immensely relieved.;<>;<> 23(c): But there's one condition. 23(c): You must not lead the operation. 23(c): I know you want to take the front line. Right?;<> Nin Situ: No. I can't let Lawrence and Jason take the risk. That would be— 23(c): Consider this. If you're seen, not necessarily caught...;<> 23(c): That would alert OWL. Can we afford that? Thought: Alert OWL? I thought OWL was backing this operation...?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What does alert OWL mean? ->I thought OWL was backing this operation? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: Wait...;<> Thought: She interrupted me. Frances Cheng: This investigation, it's not sanctioned by OWL?;<> Lawrence Chang: What?;<> Nin Situ: ... 23(c): Nin, I think we should... <> Nin Situ: I know. Nin Situ: You're right, Frances. Sorry for keeping you in the dark. Thought: What the...? Lawrence Chang: No way! You're shitting me!;<>;<> Thought: Lawrence doesn't know, either? 23(c): Let Nin explain. <> Nin Situ: ...;<> Nin Situ: This investigation is a personal project between 23 and I. OWL doesn't know about it. Frances Cheng: That's why they assigned you to other tasks mid-operation.;<> Lawrence Chang: And why we don't have the budget for a second beacon...;<>;//前面可以調查轉送器價格？ 23(c): You all noticed. <> Nin Situ: Correct. But we have a reason to hide this operation from OWL.;<> Nin Situ: OWL belongs to the government, but is ultimately funded by big corporations. It's not a neutral organization. Nin Situ: There are Vision's agents within OWL. We can't let them know about this.;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What happens if OWL finds out? Nin Situ: We will face administrative punishment, which is the least of our problems... ->What will Vision's agents do? 23(c): Protect Vision. 23(c): They will try to exert influence from within, to hinder our progress, if not completely halting it. <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: Our boss will call a stop to this operation for sure. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Then why did you keep us in the dark? Nin Situ: It was my idea. I didn't want to make things more complicated than they already are. ->Did you ask your boss? 23(c): No need. I just know it. <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: You're in enough trouble already. I don't want to have you overwhelmed. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I see your point. // ->How are we supposed to be better off without transparency? Nin Situ: We don't have to waste time on explaining things, and it's easier to foster trust. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: That is all in your favor.;<> Thought: I seldom see Fran this harsh...;<> Nin Situ: ...You're right. Sorry. Consider me corrected. Lawrence Chang: It's you two against both Vision and OWL? Is that what you're saying?;<> Nin Situ: Kind of, although we're against a specific activity of Vision's, not the corporation itself... Lawrence Chang: That. Is. COOL!;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Ready to take on the whole world in order to make things right. That's what heroism is about! Nin Situ: Don't dramatize, Lawrence. Nin Situ: We have practical objective, which is to ensure the safety of the people in the Cellar. Lawrence Chang: Oh...;<> Nin Situ: I apologize for not making this clear sooner.;<> Frances Cheng: ... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Does your renegade activities affect us in any way? ->Hold on. If this is illegal, aren't we your accomplices? Nin Situ: If the operation is compromised, you will be spared as misled/manipulated civilians.;<>;<> Nin Situ: Not guilty, by reason of being uninformed. Frances Cheng: That depends on what you tell them.;<>;<> 23(c): I knew this would happen...;<> 23(c): Guys! This is exactly why we didn't want to let you know. <> Frances Cheng: What do you mean?;<> Thought: Fran's getting angry.;<> <<#Simple(12)>> ->They're planning for our own good, Fran. Frances Cheng: I know. Still... ->In case we doubt you? ->You mean we're to blame? Lawrence Chang: Jason... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: What 23 is trying to say is that if you don't know, you don't know. Honestly uninformed.;<> Nin Situ: Now that you know it, there's a whole new dimension of concerns. Frances Cheng: ...;<> Frances Cheng: I see your point. Sorry for doubting you. Nin Situ: The apology is all mine. We started it. <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Now would you agree to not lead the charge, Nin?;<> <> Nin Situ: I... Nin Situ: If I'm to hold back, Jason and Lawrence must infiltrate the Flop Core together. Nin Situ: I can't have either of them acting alone.;<> Nin Situ: What do you say, Lawrence? Lawrence Chang: I say hell yeah! Been looking forward to some badass action!;<> Nin Situ: Jason?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm OK either way. Thought: Situ is looking at Fran, asking for her opinion?;<> Frances Cheng: As long as Jason agrees.;<> Frances Cheng: We don't have choices. If you go down, Ms. Situ, we all go down with you. <> ->Is it dangerous? Frances Cheng: The risk of being identified is very high, but no physical danger.;<>;<> Frances Cheng: As far as I know, the Flop Core is equipped with a sophisticated surveillance system, but no security guards. Nin Situ: Our intel says the same.;<>;<> <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm going, then. Nin Situ: OK. Thought: Fran seems to approve. <> ->I'm good as long as Fran gives the green light. Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: Go then. There's no physical danger.;<> <> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: Thank you. Nin Situ: Now we have a direction. Next, specific strategy.;<> Nin Situ: Retrieving the data is simple enough. Exactly like what you did before. 23(c): Enter the Flop Core, plug in my decryption device, and call it a day.;<> 23(c): Do you still have the thing, Lawrence?;<> Lawrence Chang: I do. How long does it take?;<> 23(c): About 3 minutes, counting everything. 30 seconds to crack the encryption, then copy everything out. Lawrence Chang: I can see everything in plaintext after decryption?;<> 23(c): What do you care? Just copy everything. You have all the time in the world to examine the data at home. 23(c): The copying part is automated. You just need to plug, unplug, and go. 23(c): Considering the sheer volume of the data, it will take a little while. Nin Situ: Good. Next, let's work out an infiltration plan.;<> Nin Situ: The Flop Core is located on a restricted level. You need security clearance to make the Cellar elevator stop there.;<> Nin Situ: I'm afraid this is the only way to get in. 23(c): There's no farm staff, no permanent security guard.;<>;<> 23(c): As long as can get there, the rest is a breeze. 23(c): Two issues in front of us. First, how to get security clearance. Frances Cheng: Second, an ID card to open the locked door.;<>;<>;<> 23(c): You know your farm well, supervisor. <> Nin Situ: The ID is a non-issue. We can forge one any time.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Forged by who? 23? ->Please, no more funny titles this time. Nin Situ: Rest assured. I'm on top of the ID.;<> Nin Situ: I can't afford to let 23 screw around. 23(c): Hey! I have a serious face for serious occasions, too!;<>;<> Nin Situ: What title do you have in mind?;<> 23(c): Cable management engineer. Nin Situ: ...;<> 23(c): It's legit! There are tons of cables in the Flop Core.;<> 23(c): Totally makes sense. <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: I suggest special inspector dispatched by the CEO.;<> Thought: CEO? Shane Yan? Nin Situ: Inspectors have access to all parts of the farm. Being sent by the CEO means no one dares to question you.;<> //如果你們碰上什麼狀況，還可以利用這點應付。 <<#Simple(8)>> ->Are we both inspectors, me and Lawrence? ->Do we need rehearsing? Nin Situ: No need. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: There is no one in the Flop Core. You don't need to perfect the act. Nin Situ: Take the elevator to the Flop Core, open the door with the ID card, and it's done. Lawrence Chang: So the actual title doesn't matter? We only use the ID card as a key? Nin Situ: Yes and no.;<> Nin Situ: If anything out of our plan happens, you will need to show a proper title.;<> Lawrence Chang: In that case, cable management engineer definitely won't work...;<> Nin Situ: The security clearance is a bit of an issue...;<> <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why? // ->Can't you just hack it? The beacon is on. 23(c): Right. ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): I can grant you security clearance through the beacon.;<> 23(c): But there is one problem.;<> Lawrence Chang: Come on, one problem is basically no problem. 23(c): The Flop Core is under maximum security. A visit by anyone, with clearance or not, triggers an alert. 23(c): I can delay this alert, but not cancel it.;<> 23(c): You must get out before the alert goes out. 23(c): That is the only solution I have. What do you say, Nin?;<> Nin Situ: I say go ahead. You will have more than enough time.;<>;<> //IF有解開路線(選項分成有告訴徐媛跟沒告訴) <<#If($KnowTruthControlDepartment=0||$KnowTruthSelectDepartment=0)>> <> Thought: Maybe I could ask Yuna Hsu for help. She said she'd return the favor... <<#Simple(10)>> ->I think I can get help from Yuna Hsu. ($DLStateFloat);//姐所選項 <> 23(c): The IIB officer? 23(c): She should be able to grant security clearance. Better still, she will give you a legit reason to visit. Nin Situ: Why would she help you? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->In exchange for intel. ($HaventToldEveryIntel);//還沒講 Nin Situ: Intel? Thought: Situ is alerted. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'll give her something unrelated to our investigation. Thought: It is unrelated alright. ->I'll tell her the board of directors' pawns within Silencio. <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: How do you know she will buy it? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->She asked for it, and promised to return the favor. ->I have to take a leap of faith. <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Meaning you don't know what will happen... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah, I don't really know. ->But I'm very optimistic about it. This will work. ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): It doesn't hurt to try. Nin Situ: Go ahead, then. Well done, Jason.;<> Nin Situ: This could be a safer alternative. <> ->I gave her some intel before. ($HaventToldEveryIntel);//已經講了 <<@問情報是給了啥給徐媛>> Nin Situ: Intel? Thought: Situ is alerted. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'll give her something unrelated to our investigation. Thought: It is unrelated alright. ->I told her the board of directors' pawns within Silencio. <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: She already owes you a favor.;<> Nin Situ: This won't compromise our operation.;<> Nin Situ: Go ahead, then. Well done, Jason.;<> Nin Situ: This could be a safer alternative. <> ->Just a feeling that she will want to help. 23(c): Because of what she said...? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. Nin Situ: OK. It's worth a try. ->I did supply her with some intel. <<#GoTo(@問情報是給了啥給徐媛)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: What's the location of Yuna Hsu?;<>;<> 23(c): Entrance lobby, on the first floor. I granted Jason security clearance. Thought: She hasn't moved. Nin Situ: Get going, Jason.;<> Nin Situ: Contact Lawrence when you have the clearance for the Flop Core. <<#Simple(8)>> ->No problem. // ->What if Yuna Hsu says no? Nin Situ: Then we have our original plan. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#GoTo(@跳過沒有要找徐媛對話部分)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Nin Situ: You go to the Cellar elevator first, Jason. Lawrence will follow up later. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Roger. // ->Why? Nin Situ: Don't let people see you two together. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<@跳過沒有要找徐媛對話部分>> //司徒寧分別用桌子滑了兩個東西給主角跟隆生 //司徒寧: 這是一種特製的震撼彈。 Nin Situ: And take this.;<> Nin Situ: A stun grenade. Your last resort. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Stun grenade? ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): My genius design! A flashbang and an EMP generator rolled into one.;<>;<>;<> 23(c): Whatever you're up against, this thing will buy you at least 30 seconds of precious time. 23(c): Works great against OWL agents, too! <> Lawrence Chang: Aren't we stunned, too? Nin Situ: Your package includes contact lenses against the flash, and your earpieces have noise-cancellation against the bang.;<> //兩人戴上隱形眼鏡 //因為上面我認為動畫先不畫，所以戴隱眼也先不畫。之後要修可以交給碩宇，如果他有空的話。by阿凡 Nin Situ: Don't use it unless you absolutely have to. Remember, it's the last resort. Nin Situ: You may need it for the next time. Lawrence Chang: Yes, ma'am! Nin Situ: OK. Go.;<> Lawrence Chang: See you later, Jason!;<> <> <<#End>>

title: 跟隆生搭地窖電梯中
body: Lawrence Chang: Nin got the ID title wrong? Color me surprised.;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah, she looks like the meticulous type. Lawrence Chang: Painstakingly. Lawrence Chang: Painstakingly meticulous. ->To err is human. Lawrence Chang: I've never, ever, seen her make any mistake. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Say, I've never taken this elevator before. This is seriously something.;<> Lawrence Chang: Gigantic underground structure. Wow. <<#Simple(10)>> ->You haven't? Lawrence Chang: Do I have a chance, as part of the Screening staff? <<#Simple(6)>> ->Yeah, right. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->You have no idea how many times I've taken it today... ->I just hope it goes faster this time. Lawrence Chang: Must be a tough day, haha... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: ... Lawrence Chang: ... Lawrence Chang: What's your plan, when this all blows over?;<> Thought: When this all blows over? Thought: Get my life back on track, of course. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Keep working here. Lawrence Chang: You want to work for Vision!? ->Get my life back on track, of course. Lawrence Chang: Right... ->Haven't thought about it yet. Lawrence Chang: Eh? You haven't? <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Don't you want to join me?;<> Thought: Speaking of that, I have no idea what his plan for the future is. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Join you on what? Lawrence Chang: I'm working for Nin!;<> Lawrence Chang: They pay me pretty well! Lawrence Chang: I mean, in case you wonder about the pay, haha! ->Don't wanna. Lawrence Chang: Somehow I feel hurt, hearing that from you.;<> <<#EndSimple>> //if第二日消夜有知道隆生怎麼認識司徒還有想加入鴞隊 <<#If($AskRonWhyKnowNin=0)>> Lawrence Chang: I told you last night, right? <<#EndIf>> Lawrence Chang: I'm working hard toward joining OWL! <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why would you want to do that? Lawrence Chang: Because they're so cool! Lawrence Chang: Just kidding, haha! ->Do they have open recruitment? Lawrence Chang: I don't know, but Nin says there are chances as long as I keep working with her. Thought: I've got a feeling that he's being used... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: OWL helped me, multiple times. I want to be one of them. Thought: Helped? Lawrence Chang: ...;<> Lawrence Chang: I've done flop contribution before. My family went there and brought me along. <<#Simple(8)>> ->How long before? Lawrence Chang: When I was in middle school.;<> Thought: Middle school!? <> ->Why did they bring you along? Lawrence Chang: Because they needed extra money, I guess.;<> Lawrence Chang: Also, how was I supposed to survive on my own, a middle schooler? Thought: Middle school!? <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Nothing long term. I was racked up for about two weeks.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Do they take kids that young? Lawrence Chang: Not anymore, but back then there was no rule against it. ->Was it scary? Lawrence Chang: No. I don't get scared easily, even back then. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Oh, that was for another corporation, not Vision. Name's Tendril. Thought: Tendril, one of Vision's key competitors...;<> Lawrence Chang: The service contract said two weeks, but we didn't finish. There was an accident...;<> Lawrence Chang: ... Thought: He winced. Lawrence Chang: The accident killed both my parents and left me half dead.;//這裡把音效跟音樂切掉;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Tendril planned to let me die and be done with it. Easier to cover up. Lawrence Chang: Then Nin appeared, saved me and exposed Tendril's malpractice.;<> Lawrence Chang: I owe her my life. Thought: Ah...;<> Lawrence Chang: ... <> <<#End>>

title: 跟隆生搭地窖電梯中2
body: //對話停止幾秒 <<#Simple(8)>> ->I'm sorry. ->I don't know what to say. Lawrence Chang: I-it's nothing, really! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Damn! Sorry, I didn't intend to ruin the moment!;<> Lawrence Chang: My point is! Lawrence Chang: There are many terrible corporations like Tendril, and people can't do anything about them.;<> Lawrence Chang: Tendril is still doing what it's been doing all along... Lawrence Chang: That only force that could stop them is Nin and people like her.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Are you talking about her, or OWL? Lawrence Chang: I did ask her that question, you know? Lawrence Chang: And she said...;<> Lawrence Chang: It's all the same. Lawrence Chang: You take the initiative as a person. To get things done, you need power and resources from an organization. Lawrence Chang: OWL provides what you need, at a cost, but generally a good deal.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->That's going a long way to say nothing. Lawrence Chang: It's her style, haha. ->A result-oriented view. Lawrence Chang: Sort of? ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Anyway, that's why I want to join OWL. Lawrence Chang: This might sound childish, mind you... Lawrence Chang: But I'll do what it takes for the power to do the right thing.;<> Lawrence Chang: Don't you want it, Jason? Lawrence Chang: Being an OWL agent, you can protect Ms. Cheng.;<> Thought: ...;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I don't think it's related.;<> Lawrence Chang: ...Oh, I see. ->Maybe.;<> Lawrence Chang: Right? ->She doesn't need my protection.;<> Lawrence Chang: I mean, if only to help her... Lawrence Chang: ... ->You mean, I'm not protecting her now?;<> Lawrence Chang: No, I don't mean that! Thought: The way I said it was too mean... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Sorry, I meant no offense. <<#Simple(8)>> ->None taken. Lawrence Chang: Thank you... ->That was not very nice. Lawrence Chang: Yeah... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: ...;<> Lawrence Chang: ... <<#Simple(10)>> ->Is there someone you want to protect? Lawrence Chang: Now? I guess...no?;<> Lawrence Chang: I want to do something nonetheless, if only to make the world a better place. <<#Simple(8)>> ->By "do something", you mean? Lawrence Chang: Hmm...;<> Lawrence Chang: Help the disadvantaged against oppressors. Lawrence Chang: For example, big corps in the flop farming industry... <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You hate flop farming that much? <<#GoTo(@恨，恨之入骨。)>> ->You think flop farming as a whole is wrong? Lawrence Chang: Absolutely wrong. Lawrence Chang: It does feed families. At the same time, it breaks more.;<> Lawrence Chang: It leaves people permanently scarred. I'm just one example. Lawrence Chang: Nin has been trying to talk me out of it... Lawrence Chang: But I can't. I hate flop farming and everything related to it.;<> <<#GoTo(@不、不過當然不恨篩選組的大家啦！)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->I know the feeling. Lawrence Chang: Right? ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->You hate flop farming? <<@恨，恨之入骨。>> Lawrence Chang: Nin has been trying to talk me out of it... //解鎖路線，之後跟司徒對話可以選出隆聲恨運算 Lawrence Chang: But I do hate flop farming as an industry with a passion. <<@不、不過當然不恨篩選組的大家啦！>> Lawrence Chang: That does not apply to my colleagues at Screening, though!;<> Lawrence Chang: I know there are good people even in the worst place. Lawrence Chang: However...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->They are still facilitating evil? Lawrence Chang: Hm...;<> Lawrence Chang: Probably... Thought: He's trying pretty hard not to be judgmental. <> ->There are more bad people. Lawrence Chang: Exactly. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Ops represents the bad side. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I saw plenty of good people working for Ops. Lawrence Chang: ... Lawrence Chang: Who are the bad guys, then... ->Maybe. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: ...;<> Lawrence Chang: Phew. Let's focus on the operation. //電梯停下 Lawrence Chang: We're almost there. Better get this done quick.;<> <<#End>>

title: 在運算核心遇到警衛2
body: //張龍生自己走到定點等主角，走進去看到蕭勇明走過來 Michael Hsiao: Freeze! Who are you people? Michael Hsiao: Mr. Dai...? Thought: Shit. Didn't they say there's no security officer?;<> Thought: Worse still, he knows me. Michael Hsiao: What are you doing here?;<> <> <<@還是得回答蕭勇明問為啥在運算核心>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm assisting this inspector from HQ.;<> Michael Hsiao: Inspector!?;<>;<> Thought: What's wrong? He seems alerted by that title.;<> Thought: Oh, I forgot. Situ just called in and told us the title should be engineering manager!;<> Michael Hsiao: Is this the inspector?;<> Thought: ...He doesn't know Lawrence. That much I can tell.;<> Michael Hsiao: They told me...;<> Lawrence Chang: No, you got my title wrong. ->I'm with him. Michael Hsiao: Sir? Your name and title?;<>;<> Thought: ...He doesn't know Lawrence. That much I can tell. Lawrence Chang: Good day, officer.;<> ->What are you doing here? ($DLStateFloat);//選過消失 <> Michael Hsiao: Answer me first! Thought: He's adamant... <<#GoTo(@還是得回答蕭勇明問為啥在運算核心)>> <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: I'm from HQ. Engineering manager.;<> Thought: What's that about? Lawrence Chang: The regular servicing of the Flop Core is due. That's why I'm here today. Thought: Ah, right, he's playing his role...;<> Michael Hsiao: Engineering manager?;<> Michael Hsiao: Why are you in farm uniform?;<> Lawrence Chang: You have a problem with my uniform?;<> Michael Hsiao: N-no. I was just curious.;<> Michael Hsiao: Because I was not informed of any visitor today. Michael Hsiao: Pardon me. I need to confirm your identity. Please come this way.;<>;<> <<#End>> //主角隆生自動往前走

title: 在運算核心遇到警衛3
body: Michael Hsiao: You're young for an HQ manager. Lawrence Chang: Ugh. The key, my friend…is bribing the right people!;<> Michael Hsiao: Eh...? Thought: Dude that was awful...;<> Michael Hsiao: I appreciate the humor, hahaha...;<> Michael Hsiao: And may I know your name? Lawrence Chang: ...My name?;<>;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: My name is, hmm...;<> Thought: Shit, he didn't check the name on the fake ID. <<#Simple(8)>> ->There's no time for this. He must report back to HQ within the hour. Michael Hsiao: Sorry, Mr. Dai. I must follow procedures. ->Just show him your ID and be done with it, sir. Lawrence Chang: Ah, right. Here, take this.;<>;<> <<#GoTo(@給蕭永明看通行證)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> Michael Hsiao: Sir, your name is? Lawrence Chang: ...Chen, the family name.;<> Michael Hsiao: Full name, please? Lawrence Chang: It's written right here on my ID! Are you blind?;<> Michael Hsiao: Ah, thank you.;<> <<@給蕭永明看通行證>> //給蕭永明看通行證 Michael Hsiao: Sophie Cao...;//明顯是女生的名字;<> Michael Hsiao: ...Um, sir? //if剛剛說姓陳 <<#If($RonCallHimselfChen=true)>> Michael Hsiao: You said the family name's Chen...?;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: I said Cao. Are you deaf? Michael Hsiao: Ok...ay?;<> Thought: Fuck me...;<> <<#EndIf>> Michael Hsiao: Isn't the name Sophie, kind of, uh, a bit feminine?;<> Lawrence Chang: ...My mom wanted a girl, and Sophie's pretty damn good name.;<> Lawrence Chang: She had a boy in the end, but still thought Sophie's a pretty damn good name. Got a problem, eh? Thought: That's ridiculous, man...;<> Michael Hsiao: No! It's just...unconventional.;<> Thought: Don't tell me that worked!?;<> Lawrence Chang: I'm going in, if you've done asking.;<> Michael Hsiao: I'm sorry, there is one more issue.;<> Michael Hsiao: We just received orders to not let anyone into the Flop Core. Michael Hsiao: If you absolutely have to, please talk to my boss.;<> Michael Hsiao: Since radio doesn't work on this floor, I'm afraid you'll need to take a detour upstairs. Michael Hsiao: I'm terribly sorry for this inconvenience.;<> Lawrence Chang: Ah... <<#Simple(8)>> ->He really doesn't have time for it. ->Can't you see he already has a pass? Michael Hsiao: It's an order. I'm sorry. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Michael Hsiao: Please follow me. I will take you to the security office. Lawrence Chang: WHAT THE FUCK is this, idiot!?;<> Michael Hsiao: Huh...?;<> Thought: Is that intended for...me? <<#Simple(8)>> ->I'M SORRY, SIR! Michael Hsiao: Eh...!? ->What? Lawrence Chang: I'm talking to you, imbecile! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: You didn't inform the security office? Huh? Lawrence Chang: Now you want me to go up again? Lawrence Chang: How long did the ride down take me, huh!?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I'm sorry. I didn't know they have this temporary order. Lawrence Chang: DIDN'T KNOW?? What is the company paying you for!? ->It takes, forever! Lawrence Chang: Right! Forever! Lawrence Chang: And! And... Thought: Come one! Keep the act going! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: I will let your boss know about this! Thought: Oh? Hsiao is freaking out a little.;<> Lawrence Chang: You are a dead man, you! Lawrence Chang: And you, security guy! Do you have any idea how I deal with dipshits like you?;<> Michael Hsiao: ...Um, no? Lawrence Chang: I'll, I... Lawrence Chang: I'll make you, uh... Lawrence Chang: You've seen it! You tell him!;<> Thought: Dude you're leaving this mess to me? <<#Simple(4)>> ->You make them kneel and kowtow! Michael Hsiao: Kneel and kowtow!? Thought: Oops, that was a terrible idea... Lawrence Chang: Damn right! Kowtow till you have a concussion! That's what I call proper punishment!;<> Thought: He wants to go on!? Michael Hsiao: Th-that's... Thought: Huh? Hsiao is shaken? Hey, this could actually work. <<#GoTo(@荒謬嚇蕭永明結束呀呀)>> ->You spank them! Michael Hsiao: S-spank? Thought: Geez what am I doing... Lawrence Chang: Sp— No! I kick their sorry asses!;<> Thought: Nice save! <<#GoTo(@荒謬嚇蕭永明結束呀呀)>> ->You fire them on the spot! Lawrence Chang: Right! That's what I do!;<> Thought: Good. Now Hsiao is seriously freaking out. <<#GoTo(@荒謬嚇蕭永明結束呀呀)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: What? You're scared shitless? I'll tell him, them! Lawrence Chang: ...I make them do 1,000 pushups!;<> Thought: ...This is getting weirder and weirder. Michael Hsiao: Corporal punishment? Michael Hsiao: 1,000 times!? Thought: Huh? Don't tell me he gets scared by that? <<@荒謬嚇蕭永明結束呀呀>> Michael Hsiao: Wait!! Michael Hsiao: Okay...;<> Michael Hsiao: Since you have a pass, I suppose it's alright. Michael Hsiao: Please go in. Thought: Phew. That did it.;<> Lawrence Chang: Dai. You wait outside.;<> Thought: What? That's not part of the script.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Sir, you may need a hand. Lawrence Chang: I don't. You stay here. <<#Simple(8)>> ->You will need me. ->This is not what I was told. Lawrence Chang: Now I tell you to stay, you stay. Michael Hsiao: R-right! Michael Hsiao: Listen to your superior, Mr. Dai. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->OK. I'll wait here. Thought: I have to act along while Hsiao is here... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Good. I'm going in, then.;<> Michael Hsiao: Have a productive day.;<>;<> //張隆生進去 <<#End>>

title: 在運算核心遇到警衛4
body:
Thought: What the hell is Lawrence doing...?
Michael Hsiao: Phew. That was intense.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站插腰)>>
Michael Hsiao: He's got some temper!
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Yeah. Thank you for not provoking him any further.
    Michael Hsiao: I didn't want to get us both fired.
    //IF有幫過蕭勇明
        //而且戴先生你之前還幫過我，再怎麼樣我也不能害到你啊！
    //
->You're seriously afraid of him?
    Michael Hsiao: Of course! Aren't you...?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: He has a pass. Nothing could go wrong!
Thought: ...
Michael Hsiao: I'm having a really bad day. They told me to guard the door here this morning, totally out of the blue.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站插腰低頭)>>
Thought: This morning...?
<<#Simple(8)>>
->This is not your regular duty?
    Michael Hsiao: No.
->What do you mean?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: This is not part of my job.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站插腰低頭返回)>>
Michael Hsiao: You know me, Mr. Dai! I patrol the shuttle platform.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Why the change of duty today?
    //
->You said this assignment is out of the blue?
    Michael Hsiao: Yeah.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: I don't know what's going on...;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站插腰低頭)>>
Michael Hsiao: My boss just sent me here, telling me to watch out of shady figures with fake ID.;//姊所選項
Michael Hsiao: Normally we don't patrol this part of the farm. We don't have the security clearance.
Michael Hsiao: Told me to watch out for an inspector of sorts. I guess it's all false alarm.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站插腰低頭返回)>>
Michael Hsiao: One mistake on their end, a ton of errands for me to run...
//IF一開始有說是監察員
<<#If($ToldShauRonIsSupervisor=true)>>
    Michael Hsiao: Oh, my heart skipped a bit when Mr. Cao said he's an inspector.
    Thought: Mr. Cao? Ah, he means Lawrence.
    Michael Hsiao: I was like, woah, really!?
<<#EndIf>>
Thought: Wait...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
Thought: Does that mean somebody informed Vision of our infiltration plan...?
//突然有逼逼聲
Michael Hsiao: Ha!;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站插腰返回)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
Michael Hsiao: Time's up.
Michael Hsiao: Time for shift change. I should go now.
Thought: Great. I can finally have this place to myself.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Sure. See you later.
    Michael Hsiao: Yes!;<<PlayUntil(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站點頭)>>
->Shift change? Where's the other guard?;<<Set($AskShauNextGuardWho,true)>>
    Michael Hsiao: Oh, I don't know.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抬手)>>
    Thought: Huh?
    Michael Hsiao: The boss told me to just leave when it's time. Someone will come along to fill the gap.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抬手返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Don't you need to do the handover?
    ->Someone? You mean the next guard?
        Michael Hsiao: I have no idea.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Michael Hsiao: I was like, who's supposed to take over? Isn't that gonna leave a gap between shifts?;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抓頭)>>
    Michael Hsiao: The boss told me to shut up. Don't know why such secrecy.
    Thought: ...;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抓頭返回)>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: OK. Bye.
//蕭勇明走調
<<Set($DLState,蕭勇明不守運算核心走掉)>>
Thought: The operation is messy, but generally moving forward...
Thought: Should I check on Lawrence in the Flop Core?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭)>>
Thought: Nope. He took the ID card. I can't open the door now.
Thought: Guess I'll have to wait...
Thought: What the heck is he doing there? I need to ask him later.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭返回)>>
//if有問輪班警衛是誰
<<#If($AskShauNextGuardWho=true)>>
    Thought: And what Hsiao said before he left makes me uneasy...
<<#EndIf>>
<<#End>>

->...
<<#EndSimple>>

23(c): And I heard the Cellar is deserted today. We should seize the opportunity!
23(c): However, ahem...

title: 回座位確定要去地窖偷資料
body:
23(c): Now is the real deal.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐低頭)>>
23(c): Jason. Ready?
<<Set($DLStateFloat,1)>>
<<@23問主角準備好潛入操作組沒>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Infiltrate Ops? ($DLStateFloat)
    <<Set($DLStateFloat,-1)>>
    23(c): Correct. Are you ready?
    <<#GoTo(@23問主角準備好潛入操作組沒)>>
->Any time.
    23(c): Clean and neat! You're my favorite errand boy now.
    23(c): Take that, my ex-favorite.
    Lawrence Chang(c): Come on, I never got any favorite treatment.
->Isn't Lawrence coming?
    23(c): Oi! He's asking you.
    Lawrence Chang(c): Ugh, right now I'm waiting in a super long line...
    23(c): I'll take that as a no.
    23(c): It's just you, Jason.
    23(c): Relax. You have me. This is going to be a walk in the park, almost.
<<#EndSimple>> 

23(c): It's much easier than moving the beacon.
23(c): Just go down, plug in the decryption device, wait a few minutes and voila!
23(c): Simple. See?
<<#Simple(6)>>
->How am I supposed to get down there?    
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): I can grant you elevator access, then...
Lawrence Chang(c): Won't that leave records in the log?
23(c): ...
23(c): It will, but...
Lawrence Chang(c): Didn't Nin mention that—
23(c): Okay, okay! I'm gonna ask her...
23(c): Trying to patch her in. Wait. She's in the middle of a mission...
Nin Situ(c): ...;//一陣雜訊
//突然一陣槍響，主角嚇一跳動畫？
Thought: Ouch, my ears...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐低頭返回)>>
Thought: Is that someone firing guns?
Nin Situ(c): One...more...second...;//雜訊聲
//兩聲槍響。
Nin Situ(c): Done. Sorry for the noise.
Nin Situ(c): What's up?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐低頭)>>
23(c): Jason needs to go down to the Cellar, but he doesn't have elevator access...
<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
    Nin Situ(c): Isn't he an Ops staff? He does have access.
    23(c): ...
    23(c): Uh, right...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐低頭返回)>>
    Nin Situ(c): ...
    <<#GoTo(@跳過關於要不要直接開啟地窖電梯權限)>>
<<#EndIf>>
Nin Situ(c): I see.
Nin Situ(c): ...
Nin Situ(c): Since it's only Jason now, I won't insist on a clean job.
23(c): So...?
Nin Situ(c): You can grant Jason elevator access via the beacon.
23(c): Phew. That solves one big problem.
Nin Situ(c): Feel free to beat my expectations, Jason.
Nin Situ(c): If you can find better ways to acquire elevator access, be my guest.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐低頭返回)>>
<<@跳過關於要不要直接開啟地窖電梯權限>>
Nin Situ(c): The Trashmen are here. Need to go. Situ out.
Thought: The Trashmen? Who or what are those?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐歪頭)>>
23(c): No problem. Bye!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背坐歪頭返回)>>
<<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>>
    23(c): That's it. If you have any fresh idea, give it a try.
    23(c): I'll cover your back if there's nothing you can do.
<<#EndIf>>
23(c): 23 out.
<<#End>>

title: 現在才遇到球球
body:

Quentin Qiu: Hey, Jayster!;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺)>>

//if篩選
<<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>>

        Quentin Qiu: Ha! I knew it!;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手返回)>>

    ->What if I told you that I chose Ops?

        <<#EndSimple>>

        ->Yes and no.
            Quentin Qiu: You're the man!
        ->I had to. For you.
            Quentin Qiu: Say that again in front of Tyler. Haha!
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>


//if操作
<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I chose Ops in the end.
        <<@主角選操作組球球震驚2>>
        Quentin Qiu: Oh...;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手返回)>>

        Quentin Qiu: Why?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->For the money.
        ->I don't like talking to people.
            Quentin Qiu: I know the feeling.
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Quentin Qiu: Your job, your choice! Wish you all the best!;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭)>>
        Quentin Qiu: Wayno said he's making the Screening office permanently open house. Come over when you have time.
        Quentin Qiu: We can hang out later.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭返回)>>
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->Tyler and Jeff said that, too.;//有選要糾
            Quentin Qiu: Then all of us together!
            Quentin Qiu: And you can be our mole within Ops.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後)>>
            <<#Simple(8)>>
            ->I'm not a mole!
                Quentin Qiu: See? Your heart belongs to them already!
            ->What's my mission, commander?
                Quentin Qiu: Collect gossip and keep a record of their dirty deals!
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple>>
            Quentin Qiu: Haha, I was kidding.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後返回)>>
        ->Sure!
            Quentin Qiu: That settles it, then!
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->What if I told you that I chose Ops?
        Quentin Qiu: Huh? Do you think I'd be mad?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手返回)>>
        Quentin Qiu: No! I'm a bigger man than you thought!
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->I thought you hated Ops.
        ->Just curious, haha.
            Quentin Qiu: I hate Ops, but not you!;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比一)>>
            Thought: He's a good buddy.
            Quentin Qiu: But if you work there for too long, I may end up hating you, too.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比一返回)>>
            Quentin Qiu: Let's not worry that far ahead, haha!
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Quentin Qiu: So, you did choose Screening, right?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺抬手)>>
        Thought: Hmm...
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Sorry, I chose Ops.
        ->Wrong.
            <<#GoTo(@主角選操作組球球震驚2)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>

Quentin Qiu: ...;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭)>>
Quentin Qiu: Hey, for real... If there's anything you need help with...
Quentin Qiu: Just come find me. You can always trust me, sweetie.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭返回)>>
//if操作
<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
    Quentin Qiu: Even when you choose to go with Ops.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比讚)>>
<<#EndIf>>

//if篩選

    Quentin Qiu: We're on the same team now!;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺比讚)>>
<<#EndIf>>

<<#Simple(8)>>
->Thank you.

<<#EndSimple>>

<<#EndSimple>>
<<PlayUntil(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺返回)>>

title: 第一次進貨車
body: //按E進入後，司徒程芳坐在裡面。司徒在最裡面，成芳中間，主角在最外面 Frances Cheng: Hey! Surprise...! Thought: Fran! Situ is here, too? 23(c): Show more spirit, F! <<#Simple(8)>> ->Fran? What are you doing here? Frances Cheng: Ms. Situ brought me on. ->Oh, hey! Frances Cheng: Hee hee. ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Liking the surprise, eh?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Very much. 23(c): Smart answer, haha! ->Why are you bringing Fran here? <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: To keep her under protection. We can't leave her alone.;<> 23(c): BTW, I'm in the driver's seat. Can't have so many people in the back. 23(c): Blame the frugal boss for not getting a bigger van. Nin Situ: I spent most of the budget on your hardware upgrade.;<> 23(c): I know. Can't love you enough for that! <> Thought: Wasn't Situ on a dangerous mission a while ago...?;<>;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Didn't expect to see you so soon. ->How's the other mission of yours going? Nin Situ: Tracking down a fugitive. Didn't take long.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Tracking down or shooting down? I heard gunshots.;<> Nin Situ: ... Nin Situ: He held someone hostage. I had to take him out. Nin Situ: Not proud of it, but this is our everyday work. ->I thought this kind of work would take a while. Nin Situ: OWL is very efficient. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: This is not relevant, especially to you and Frances. Thought: She's forcing a change of subject. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Say, why did they assign you other missions? Nin Situ: By which you mean? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->They know you're already knee-deep in a big one. Nin Situ: ... Thought: ...It's like she's actively searching for an answer. <<#GoTo(@司徒解釋臨時任務)>> ->Calling you back in the middle of a dangerous mission doesn't make sense. <<@司徒解釋臨時任務>> Nin Situ: OWL is not your average law enforcement agency. We deal with all sorts of situations.;<> Nin Situ: Hot swapping between multiple missions is more common than you think. Nin Situ: We're required to maintain maximum mobility, in case of emergency. <> <<#EndSimple>> ->You're right. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: Let's finish what we came here to do. Nin Situ: Jason, the decryption device.;<> <>;<>;<>;<> //主角把破解器放桌上滑給司徒。 //司徒把破解器插上電腦 Nin Situ: Do we have the data, 23? 23(c): We do. 23(c): This will take a while. <> Nin Situ: Roger.;<> Nin Situ: Take your time. Nin Situ: Now, then...;<> Nin Situ: How are you feeling, Jason?;<> <> <<@司徒在主角前行工廠完問好不好>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->As good as can be. Nin Situ: Is that so? Good. ->Bad. Nin Situ: Why? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because my life is royally screwed up. ->Because a giant corporation is after my girlfriend. Frances Cheng: J... ->Because Lawrence is not here and I have to do two men's job. ->No particular reason. <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: I see. ->Why ask? ($DLStateFloat);//選過消失 <> Nin Situ: You just went through a series of infiltration activities. I need to evaluate your stress level. <<#GoTo(@司徒在主角前行工廠完問好不好)>> <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: Since yesterday, you saw Yuna Hsu twice. Thought: So 23 told her about what happened in the Cellar. Nin Situ: What do you make of her? Thought: She's one huge walking trouble... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I don't have any particular thought. Nin Situ: I see. ->She's an opportunity. We can use her. Nin Situ: I see. Thought: She likes my response. ->She's a real threat. Nin Situ: I see. ->She's a puppet of Vision's. Nin Situ: I see. <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: How do you feel about your infiltration tasks? Thought: I've gotta do what I've gotta do. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->It should not be my job. ->Dangerous, challenging, and thrilling? ->I've gotta do what I've gotta do. ->I'm not sure how I feel yet. <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: I see. //if有問司徒有沒有殺人 <<#If($AskIfSiTuKillPeople=true)>> Nin Situ: And one more question. Nin Situ: Why did you care so much about whether or not I killed the fugitive?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Curiosity. ->Did I care that much? Nin Situ: I see. <<#GoTo(@司徒開始問殺人如何如何呀)>> ->I need to know what kind of people I'm working with.;<> Nin Situ: Did you find your answer with that question? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I don't care about the fugitive. Just wanted to see your response. <> Nin Situ: To find out how I see the act of killing? Nin Situ: ... <> ->Maybe not quite the answer I need, but it helped. <<#EndSimple>> <<@司徒開始問殺人如何如何呀>> Nin Situ: Do you see the willingness to kill as a moral issue?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Moral issue? Nin Situ: Sorry, let me rephrase. <<@司徒換說法問主角殺人>> Nin Situ: Do you think killing another person is wrong? Regardless of reasons. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No. Under some circumstances, killing is justified. Nin Situ: Does "justified" mean "right"? <> <<@殺人對錯問問看>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I think so. ->Maybe not right, but it's definitely not wrong. Nin Situ: I see. ->Huh? ($DLStateFloat);//選過消失 <> Nin Situ: Is it right to kill another person, under the appropriate circumstance? <<#GoTo(@殺人對錯問問看)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Yeah. Killing is wrong, no matter what reason. Nin Situ: I see. <<#EndSimple>> ->I think killing is wrong, but that's just a personal opinion. Nin Situ: I see. ->Probably. Nin Situ: Let me rephrase. <<#GoTo(@司徒換說法問主角殺人)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Is this some sort of profiling or evaluation? Nin Situ: More or less. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What for? Nin Situ: I need to know what kind of people I'm working with. //if剛剛選過:我想了解我在跟什麼樣的人合作。 <<#If($AskIfSiTuKillPeople2=true)>> Thought: That's what I said... <<#EndIf>> Thought: Should I believe her...? ->Then I refuse to participate. Nin Situ: You could if you want. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->How many more questions do we have? Nin Situ: None. It's done. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: OK, enough questions. Nin Situ: You did well, performing infiltrations without any preparation. Nin Situ: Plus. //if找球球 <<#If($BallHelpOpenDoor=0)>> Nin Situ: You seem to have found your own way to get into Ms. Yeh's office. <<#EndIf>> //if找到方法下地窖 <<#If($IntoCellarByStealID=0||$IntoCellarByHelpSun=0)>> Nin Situ: And according to 23, you found ways to get elevator access, too. Nin Situ: Very well done. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I asked for a few favors. ->Chalk it up to luck. Nin Situ: Being aware of resources you have is a critical talent.;<>;<> Nin Situ: You deserve a pat on the back and then some. Thought: Fran looks very excited...;<>;<> Thought: What's she getting at...? ->... <<#EndSimple>> //if兩次都躲開 <<#If($ControlOfficeHide=true&&$CellarHideCar=true)>> 23(c): And he's got good reflexes, too.;<>;<> <<#GoTo(@23說主角反應很快壓嘿喔)>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> //if兩次都躲開 <<#If($ControlOfficeHide=true&&$CellarHideCar=true)>> 23(c): Don't remember if I told you, Nin.;<>;<> 23(c): He's got some great reflexes. <<@23說主角反應很快壓嘿喔>> 23(c): He dodged witnesses, twice. All on his own, while I had no visual. 23(c): You have an eye for talent, Nin.;<> Nin Situ: I know.;<> <<#EndIf>> //發出警告錯誤音效 23(c): Ah...;<> 23(c): Hey, folks, bad news.;<> 23(c): Or maybe it's good news, depending on your perspective. 23(c): We retrieved waaaay more data than I expected. This is about a whole decade's worth. Nin Situ: Meaning?;<>;<>;<> 23(c): Meaning, first of all, my invention is awesome. 23(c): Then, it will take this crappy computer days to cross reference all records.;<> 23(c): I can build a cluster processor with what we have. That could shorten the process to hours. 23(c): Your call, Nin. Shall we wait here till it's done crunching numbers? Nin Situ: ...;<>;<> Nin Situ: We can afford a few hours.;<> Nin Situ: I will ask the security officer to extend our parking permit. Frances Cheng: Is that safe? Won't they have questions?;<> 23(c): I showed them a visitor's pass from Vision HQ.;<> 23(c): They won't suspect a thing. <<#Simple(6)>> ->How did you get a pass? 23(c): How else? Forged it, of course. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: Are you sure?;<> 23(c): Chillax. These security officers have learned better. No questions asked as long as you have a pass. 23(c): I did plenty of tests with funny titles like Blackboard Technician or Plumbing Aesthetics Assessor.;<> 23(c): As long as the pass looks legit and the barcode works, they don't care. Ha!;<> 23(c): I mean, seriously? Who the heck even has blackboards these days? Hahaha!;<> 23(c): Hahahahaha! //發出逼一聲。 <> Nin Situ: I'm muting her.;<> Frances Cheng: Haha...;<> Nin Situ: Jason, go back to the farm while 23 is working on the data. Nin Situ: Find yourself something to do, and wait for further instructions. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What about Fran? Nin Situ: She stays here. Can't let anyone see her.;<> Frances Cheng: I'm taking the time to learn from Ms. Situ!;<> Thought: Learn what? Nin Situ: Frances is interested in our work, so I'm giving her a tour of things.;<> Frances Cheng: Now I know how to tail someone without getting caught! <<#Simple(8)>> ->What do you need that knowledge for? Frances Cheng: It's cool! Frances Cheng: You're boring, J. ->Wow, teach me when you've got time. Frances Cheng: Sure! ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> ->Roger. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: That's it. Will let you know when we have results. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Copy that. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>>
