title: 第二簽約者進來
body: Chase Luo: Good day. George Liao: Good day, Mr. Luo. My name is George Liao.;<> George Liao: This is Jason Dai, new employee under training. He's here to watch and observe.;<> Thought: Don't I get a chance to speak...?;<> Chase Luo: Ah.;<> Thought: Huh? He's in a whole lot better shape than the previous guy.;<> Chase Luo: Where's my daughter? I don't see her here.;<> George Liao: ...;<> George Liao: We are trying to locate her at the moment, too. Chase Luo: Is that so...;<> Chase Luo: Then the payment for contributing is...? George Liao: Yes, she took it.;<> George Liao: Because you listed her as the sole—;<> Chase Luo: I know what I did.;<> George Liao: ... George Liao: Sir, I'm—;<> Chase Luo: Never mind. Just tell me what happens next.;<> George Liao: You mean...? Chase Luo: I know you don't have any power to do anything about it. Chase Luo: Let's just complete the procedure and be done with it.;<> George Liao: Thank you for understanding, but—;<> Chase Luo: It was a bet. I thought my daughter wouldn't ditch me. Chase Luo: I was aware of possible consequences before being racked up. Chase Luo: Well, I lost. Chase Luo: I have a gambling addiction. It's the reason why I ended up here in the first place.;<> Chase Luo: A good gambler knows when to admit defeat. Chase Luo: Come on. Where should I sign? Let's get this done and... Chase Luo: And... And I'll go home. Chase Luo: ...;<> Thought: He's weeping... Chase Luo: ... George Liao: I have a child, too, Mr. Luo.;<> George Liao: Not my own, but close enough for me to understand how you feel. George Liao: Kids, they don't always grow up like we want them to.;<> George Liao: But it's their life. All we could do is watch and wish them the best.;<> George Liao: Leave the rest to fate. Chase Luo: What are you getting at?;<>;<> George Liao: We take care of ourselves and leave them be. Chase Luo: Is that supposed to make me feel better?;<>;<> George Liao: Making you feel better is not my job. George Liao: My job is to provide clients with actionable plans, such as subsidies.;<> Chase Luo: Subsidies?;<> Thought: Not again? How much money do you have?;<>;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Mr. Liao? George Liao: I know what I'm doing. ->... <<#EndSimple>> George Liao: In your case, not a subsidy, per se.;<> George Liao: Please check this offer out. You may need to provide additional biological data, but there's a good pay for it. Chase Luo: This is...;<> Chase Luo: This is ridiculously generous. Vision will pay that much for my biological data?? George Liao: Yes.;<> Chase Luo: But don't you have it already? You monitored everything while I was racked up. George Liao: We need your permission to use this data for research and publication. Chase Luo: Really...?;<> 23(c): Really? F? Frances Cheng(c):I'm not aware of any policy like that...;<> 23(c): The old guy is inventing excuses on the fly to give away free money. Thought: ...How could he afford to do that? 23(c): Forgot to tell you. F is on the line, too. She's bored. 23(c): Watch your tongue, Jason. <> Thought: ...;<> Chase Luo: I, I can't find a reason to say no... //合作者碰了一下投影幕 << PlayUntil (簽約機械, MBU_簽約機械_開啟) >>;<< Play (簽約機械, MBU_簽約機械_點擊) >>;<> Chase Luo: Here, signed. Now, what's the catch...? George Liao: There's no catch. Payment will arrive in a week or so.;<> Chase Luo: With this money, I could...;<> George Liao: And, Mr. Luo.;<> George Liao: We have your daughter's current contact. I will send that over, too.;<>;<> George Liao: She's not responding to us. But if it's you, things could be different. Chase Luo: I can't thank you enough! I thought she was—;<>;<> George Liao: That concludes our session, if you have no more questions. George Liao: I have other appointments. Pardon me. Chase Luo: Please. Don't let me hold you any longer. George Liao: Bye, Mr. Luo. Chase Luo: Bye, and thank you.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //羅先生起立離開 <<#End>>

title: 廖哥離開前對話
body:
George Liao: I will take care of the subsidies. Don't worry about it.
George Liao: ...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐看內)>>
George Liao: Don't tell Wayne unless he asks.;<<Play(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_簽約側坐看外)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Where do you find the money?
    George Liao: I have my ways.
->What if he does ask?
    George Liao: Tell him or not, your call.
->OK.
<<#EndSimple>>
George Liao: Phew...;<<Play(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_簽約側坐看外返回)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->You saved two families today.
    George Liao: Not me.
    George Liao: Vision is providing the money they need.;<<Play(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_簽約側坐看外)>>
->Who were you calling just now?
    George Liao: Why ask?;<<Play(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_簽約側坐看外)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Because Edith asked me.
        George Liao: What!? When!?;<<Play(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_簽約側坐看外驚訝)>>
        Thought: Dude, aren't you overreacting?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->When you went to the restroom.
            George Liao: Huh...;<<Play(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_簽約側坐看外驚訝返回)>>
        ->Does the time matter?
            George Liao: Of course. If...;<<Play(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_簽約側坐看外驚訝返回)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
        George Liao: ...;<<Play(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_簽約側坐看外低頭)>>
        George Liao: No, it's just me worrying too much.
        George Liao: That phone call was private business. Keep your nose where it belongs.;<<Play(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_簽約側坐看外低頭返回)>>
    ->Can't I be curious?
        George Liao: You're too old for that.
        Thought: Hey, old timer...
        George Liao: That phone call was private business. Keep your nose where it belongs.
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
George Liao: Now, we're all done here.
George Liao: I have work to do. See you later.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->See you.
    //
->That's it?
    George Liao: That's it.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<PlayUntil(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_簽約側坐看外返回)>>
<<#End>>
//廖哥起身走掉了

title: 慈恩突襲後23評論
body: 23(c): What's she poking around for?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Aren't you busy working on the data? 23(c): The computer is busy working on the data. Homo sapiens know to use tools. ->I was wondering that, too. ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Watch out for yourself, Jason. 23(c): Don't get involved in office politics.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Office politics? Between whom? 23(c): How am I supposed to know? 23(c): But I can tell it's about time to pick sides. 23(c): One bad move and they'll swallow you alive. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What do you think I should do? 23(c): Stop lolling around. Figure out what's really going on before it's too late. 23(c): Do what Yuna Hsu is doing. Thought: Yuna Hsu, huh... ->I don't care. I have nothing to do with Vision when this is over. 23(c): You don't know that yet. <<#EndSimple>> ->I don't care. I have nothing to do with Vision when this is over. 23(c): You don't know that yet. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //廖哥開門進來 <> 23(c): Hey, he's back. I'll leave you alone for now. <> <<#End>>

title: 答應幫孫茹卻忘記
body:
Rose Sun: HUH!?
Thought: ...!?
Thought: That was unnecessarily loud...
Rose Sun: What are you doing up here!?;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰)>>
Rose Sun: The lights are still flickering!
Thought: Crap, I forgot.
Rose Sun: Didn't you fix it?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Sorry, I forgot.
    <<@跟孫茹說自己忘了幫忙弄燈>>
    Rose Sun: Forgot!?;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰前傾)>>
    Rose Sun: How could you forget that?
    Rose Sun: You had one job!
    Rose Sun: It's the one thing that you took the elevator ride for!;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰前傾手指)>>
    Thought: Shit...
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I just forgot.
        Rose Sun: ...;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰前傾手指返回)>>
    ->I was running errands for someone else.
        Rose Sun: Errands? From whom?;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰前傾手指返回)>>
        Thought: Can't you just leave it alone...?
        Rose Sun: Never mind! I don't really care.
    ->I went down there but got distracted, so...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Rose Sun: ...;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰前傾返回)>>
    Rose Sun: I see why you're not qualified for Ops now.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->What does that have to do with it?
        Rose Sun: Hmph!
    ->Haha...
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Rose Sun: Forget about it.
->I did what you asked me to, but looks like it's not working?
    Rose Sun: ...No way!
    Rose Sun: Did you really do your job?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I did! Swear!
        Rose Sun: ...;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰低頭)>>
        Rose Sun: OK. Then maybe the malfunction made things worse.
        Rose Sun: Sorry for yelling at you.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站低頭返回)>>
        Thought: Now I'm feeling guilty.
    ->No. Sorry, I forgot, really.
        <<#GoTo(@跟孫茹說自己忘了幫忙弄燈)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>

Rose Sun: I'll send someone else down.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰返回)>>

Rose Sun: Bye.
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Bye.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 等地窖電梯遇到孫茹采欣2
body:
//突然小地震，燈光在閃
Cathy Hsieh: Earthquake!?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站左看)>>
//孫茹走進畫面裡
<<Set($DLState,地震後孫茹靠近采欣)>>
Rose Sun: No, it's something in the Cellar.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站左看轉右)>>
Cathy Hsieh: But—;<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_背站緊張握拳)>>
Rose Sun: They are servicing the power supply system. It does that upon restart.
Rose Sun: Just a minor shake. Relax.
<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Is it safe to take elevator when the building is jerking around?
    Cathy Hsieh: ...!
    //採新慌張轉向孫茹
    Rose Sun: It's totally fine. I promise.
->What, an earthquake every time you flip the power on?
    Rose Sun: Earthquake? Come on, it's just a little shake. Haha!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>

Rose Sun: If the power is back on, it means the Cellar must be in working order again.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰抬頭)>>
Rose Sun: Hopefully they have located the cause...
<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰抬頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Would they restore power before locating the cause?
    Rose Sun: Normally no, but again, the big bosses won't allow us to suspend the Cellar for so long.
    Rose Sun: Sooner or later, they will force us to get things going again.
->They haven't found the cause yet?
    Rose Sun: Yes. That is not normal...
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Rose Sun: Come on, Cathy, don't be so nervous!;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰前傾)>>
Rose Sun: You're shaking all over, haha.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站右看轉左)>>
Cathy Hsieh: I'm scared of earthquakes.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰前傾返回)>>;<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_背站緊張握拳低頭)>>
Cathy Hsieh: Plus, there's the elevator ride...
Rose Sun: Easy. Relax.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰比一)>>
Rose Sun: Jason is there to protect you.
Thought: She's on the verge of a mental breakdown...;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰比一返回)>>;<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_背站緊張握拳低頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Yeah. If Rose says it's safe, it's safe. She's professional.
    Cathy Hsieh: You're right...
->I can't stop a free falling elevator, especially when I'm in it.
    Cathy Hsieh: ...!?
    Rose Sun: Hey! You're not helping!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<Set($DLState,拍張參搞事)>>
Soma Wan: Rose! Help us move something, will ya?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站左看轉右)>>
Rose Sun: Do your own heavy lifting!;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰看外)>>
Nobo Dee: We can't. It's too heavy.
Rose Sun: *Sigh*;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰看外低頭)>>
Rose Sun: Okay. Where is the thing?
Soma Wan: Where else? In the office, of course.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰看外低頭返回)>>
Rose Sun: That's not how you ask for a favor...
Rose Sun: I have to go. Relax, Cathy. It's going to be OK.;<<Set($DLState,拍張參搞事結束)>>;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰看外返回)>>
Cathy Hsieh: Bye...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站右看轉左)>>;<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_背站緊張握拳低頭)>>
Thought: She's not feeling much better.
//電梯門打開，友人順出來主角跟采欣順進去。
<<#End>>

title: 小楊安裝發送難過對話
body: //這裡小楊是做再安裝發送走廊的小台地上 //有發現 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=true||$DidGetOffTheCar=true)>> Yale Yang: Hey Jason, do you mind if we talk for a bit?;<>;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I don't have the energy for this. Yale Yang: Oh, I see. <<#GoTo(@跳楊冶平自己離開情節)>> ->Depends on what it is. Yale Yang: I don't know what to make of Mr. Hsu going forward. <<#Simple(10)>> ->What does that have to do with me? ->Is that really important? Yale Yang: Y-you're right... Yale Yang: Sorry for wasting your time. <<#GoTo(@跳楊冶平自己離開情節)>> ->What do you mean? // ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yale Yang: He's grumpy and stubborn, but I respected him. Yale Yang: He's a capable worker and one heck of a man, never yielding to anything he doesn't agree with.;<> Yale Yang: You know how terrible this place is. He is like a pillar that holds the place up. Yale Yang: To this day, he has been my role model. I wanted to grow into something like him. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why this, all of a sudden? Yale Yang: Sorry. Am I boring you out?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No. I'm just curious. Yale Yang: I don't know. I just feel... <> Yale Yang: ...Lost? ->Sort of. We should move. Yale Yang: Y-you're right... Yale Yang: Sorry for wasting your time. <<#GoTo(@跳楊冶平自己離開情節)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->And now you feel betrayed. Yale Yang: Right...?;<> Yale Yang: That's one way to put it... Thought: He seems surprised that I know his feeling.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Thought: Come on, I've seen this way too many times. Thought: Idolizing someone, trying so hard to grow into their shoes. Yale Yang: It's like, I don't know what to live for anymore... Thought: When this idol crashes and burns, the whole world goes with them. Yale Yang: What do you make of Mr. Hsu?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Rotten bastard. Forget about him. Yale Yang: Really...? Thought: He seems disheartened... ->He's just a man, and a man makes mistakes. Yale Yang: Do we simply forgive him when his mistake has consequences like this...? <<#Simple(8)>> ->He's still the same man. ->I see you have found your own answer. Yale Yang: Yes... ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->A selfish man, sacrificing others for his own agenda. Yale Yang: I see... ->My opinion doesn't matter. You need to find your own answer. Yale Yang: ... Yale Yang: You're right... <<#EndSimple>> Yale Yang: That's all I have to say. Sorry for wasting your time. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yale, you're your own man. Liam Hsu has nothing to do with it. Yale Yang: ... Yale Yang: Thank you, Jason. ->Do you hate him? Yale Yang: I hate what he has done, not the person... Yale Yang: ... Yale Yang: Or maybe they're the same thing. I don't know anymore... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<@跳楊冶平自己離開情節>> Yale Yang: ...;<> Yale Yang: Ah, I just realized I have work to do. Yale Yang: See you then. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. // ->Are you OK? Yale Yang: Yeah, I am. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //小楊離開 <> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //沒發現 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=false&&$DidGetOffTheCar=false)>> Yale Yang: Oh hi, Jason.;<>;<> Yale Yang: What's up? Thought: He looks a bit pale. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Are you OK? Yale Yang: I'm alright. A bit tired is all. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why did you keep me waiting in the car? <<#GoTo(@追問冶平為啥不讓下車時間)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Why did you keep me waiting in the car? <<@追問冶平為啥不讓下車時間>> Yale Yang: Ah, what? Yale Yang: Oh, that. No particular reason.;<> Yale Yang: ... Yale Yang: Say, Jason. Suppose someone in your family is a murderer, will you tell the police? Thought: That's a wild change of subject... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I will. Yale Yang: Why?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because it's the right thing to do. ->I don't want my family to live in constant fear. ->For my own conscience. ->I can't tell why but I just will. <<#EndSimple>> ->I won't. Yale Yang: Why?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->This might sound selfish, but family is family. ->Talk him into turning himself in, maybe. I can't be a snitch. ->He must have a justified reason. ->I can't tell why but I just won't. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Yale Yang: I see... Thought: What happened to him...? Yale Yang: ...;<> Yale Yang: Sorry. That was a weird conversation. <<#EndSimple>> Yale Yang: Ah, I just realized I have work to do. Yale Yang: See you then. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. // ->Are you OK? Yale Yang: Yeah, I am. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //小楊離開 <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>>

title: 第二次陳木海搭話(地窖停車場)
body: //陳木海站在地窖停車場左邊機器旁邊，對話轉身用機器 Woody Chen(c): Hello, Jason Dai. Thought: Woody Chen...!? <<#Simple(8)>> ->Woody Chen. // ->Why call me now? Woody Chen(c): Your line has been busy. I've finally caught a break. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah. // ->You've been calling me all this time? Woody Chen(c): No, I don't need to, but that is not the point. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen(c): Let's cut to the chase. I've made breakthrough. //if只說了故事沒說張延安名字 <<#If($ToldWoodSeaChangStory=1)>> Woody Chen(c): The man you once possessed, I've established contact with him. Woody Chen(c): I will meet up with him later this evening to exchange intel. <<#Simple(8)>> ->That was quick. Woody Chen(c): It's not hard, as long as you have the right connections. ->Count me in. Let's go together. Woody Chen(c): That is what I'm calling you about. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen(c): After the exchange, I will decide what to share with you. Thought: Meaning there are things he won't tell me... <<#Simple(8)>> ->I need to know it all. Woody Chen(c): No. Woody Chen(c): You cannot be there, and I will decide what to share. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Come on, you wouldn't have found him if it weren't for me. Woody Chen(c): Indeed. For that, you have earned your share of intel. Woody Chen(c): However... ->Why? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen(c): Because you did not fully trust me. In return, I will not fully trust you. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I didn't trust you? Woody Chen(c): You chose to keep the name from me, didn't you? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I really didn't know. Woody Chen(c): Sorry, but I think you're lying. ->You call that distrust? Woody Chen(c): Yes, by my standard. <<#EndSimple>> ->But now I trust you, totally. Woody Chen(c): Fabricating trust when it's convenient to you isn't helping. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen(c): Enough talk about that. Woody Chen(c): I have my own standards, and you won't sway me. ->I see. Woody Chen(c): Good. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen(c): That's it, then. Woody Chen(c): Wait for my update. <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> //if有說故事且有說張延安名字 //if有說地點 <<#If($ToldWoodSeaWhereChang=-2||$ToldWoodSeaWhereChang=0)>> Woody Chen(c): I followed the location you provided. //if說錯 <<#If($ToldWoodSeaWhereChang=-2)>> Woody Chen(c): It was incorrect. The wild goose chase wasted too much of my time. Woody Chen(c): Don't tell me things you aren't 100% certain of. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Did you find the guy? Woody Chen(c): ... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen(c): Yes, only after mobilizing a fleet of our kin. <<#EndIf>> //if說對。 <<#If($ToldWoodSeaWhereChang=0)>> Woody Chen(c): Your intel was good. I located him soon enough. <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> Woody Chen(c): Ivan Zhang, usually goes by the name of Felix Zhang. Woody Chen(c): He runs a noodle restaurant for cover, and has a weapons smuggling business on the side. //if不知道地點 <<#If($ToldWoodSeaWhereChang=-2||$ToldWoodSeaWhereChang=-1)>> Woody Chen(c): The restaurant is right on this street. Woody Chen(c): I suppose you have been there. <<#EndIf>> Woody Chen(c): On top of everything, he also does human trafficking, slipping outsiders into Wanpei. Woody Chen(c): He is not your average civilian, but there isn't any visible connection to the Source... <<#Simple(8)>> ->What next? Woody Chen(c): Next... ->I thought I told you he possessed some Source technology? Woody Chen(c): ... Woody Chen(c): Maybe. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen(c): We must have a talk with him. <<#Simple(8)>> ->When? // ->We? Woody Chen(c): Yes. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen(c): This evening. Woody Chen(c): We should find him in his restaurant. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I'm not sure if I'll have time. Woody Chen(c): You will find time, I believe. ->OK. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen(c): Listen. Woody Chen(c): I told you how I do things last time. Woody Chen(c): I'm in touch with everybody, and make sure nobody is in direct contact with anybody. Woody Chen(c): Theoretically this applies to Ivan Zhang, too, although he is not an MBU. Woody Chen(c): I'm taking you with me for two reasons. Woody Chen(c): First, you already know about him. //IF知到地點 <<#If($ToldWoodSeaWhereChang=0)>> Woody Chen(c): And you know about his hideout, too. <<#EndIf>> Woody Chen(c): I do not need to protect his privacy. Woody Chen(c): Two, you gave me this lead, so you deserve to know. Woody Chen(c): This is how we foster trust. Woody Chen(c): Are we clear? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->All clear. Woody Chen(c): Good. ->But does Ivan Zhang know we're coming? Woody Chen(c): Yes. <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen(c): He knows who we are, when we're coming, and why. Woody Chen(c): There's one thing he does not know. Woody Chen(c): That you are the MBU who used to control him. Woody Chen(c): I don't know what you did when you were in control, but chances are he didn't like it, am I right? <> <<#If($WrongSyringe = true)>> <> <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(10)>> ->Yeah. // ->I killed one of his subordinates with his body.($DLStateFloat) Woody Chen(c): ... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen(c): For our own good, do not let him know. Woody Chen(c): Can you do that? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No problem. Woody Chen(c): Good. ->But I want him to know. Woody Chen(c): What? Why? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I want to apologize. ->He deserves to know. ->I just want to. <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen(c): ... Woody Chen(c): I respect your choice. Woody Chen(c): But please make sure it happens after I'm done questioning, will you? Woody Chen(c): We can't afford to compromise this. <<#Simple(999999)>> ->OK. Woody Chen(c): Good. ->I can't promise anything. Woody Chen(c): Then we must cancel the meeting. Woody Chen(c): Let me ask you again. Woody Chen(c): Can you make sure your big reveal happens after I'm done questioning? <<#Simple(999999)>> ->Okay. Woody Chen(c): Good. ->Let's cancel it, then. Woody Chen(c): ... Woody Chen(c): If it's your choice, so be it. Woody Chen(c): This conversation is over. Woody Chen(c): Bye, kin. <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen(c): See you later. <<#End>>
